They had a lot of praise for Tina – whether it was her ability to get things done or how she knows what next steps are needed.

**_Willamette Week_** summed it up well:
"Kotek is **smart, strategic and decisive.** She figured out how to pass difficult bills that make working-class Oregonians' lives better—from a minimum wage increase that acknowledged employers in rural Oregon couldn't pay as much as ones in Portland, to family medical leave, to an end to no-cause evictions. Under her leadership, Democrats passed a school funding increase they'd been chasing for 30 years."
Smarts. Persistence. Focus. All of these traits are crucial for our next governor, especially as issues like homelessness, mental health care, and climate change need urgent attention.

**[But we can't bring Tina to the governor's seat without your support, Peter. name: Jameson Ellis
subject: They stole it, and we now have proof
body:
Trump won

| | | | |
---
| | [ ](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ5b3V0dS5iZSUyRmpmejBNa2NOa3BB&sig=7NUSzEUokyRYs4BMBQonFko445dvx7pZB6ovYnFNLdh4&iat=1652115721&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=72A88A1A466)
---
| | |
---
| | Fellow patriot,

They thought we'd never find out... but they were wrong.

This past week, Dinesh D'Souza released his latest documentary, 2000 Mules.

It is the smoking gun and proves beyond a shadow of a doubt what we already knew... Trump won.

Even Charlie Kirk, Dennis Prager, Dr. Sebastian Gorka, Eric Metaxes, and Larry Elder were skeptical at first... but after being presented with the evidence, they were all convinced True The Vote had gathered the proof needed to warrant an in-depth investigation.

That's why I was shocked this morning to find out that Tucker and his team specifically instructed Catherine Engelbrecht of True The Vote not to mention the movie... and that even Newsmax is also blocking coverage.

This means we cannot depend on influencers, elected officials, or mainstream "conservative" commentators and news media to bring attention to the evidence...

It's up to us.

This is our moment.

We've been given a window of opportunity to make sure something FINALLY gets done.

This isn’t a Republican or Democrat issue... it is an American issue. And if we allow them to steal our right to free and fair elections, then the power no longer belongs to the people, our Constitutional Republic is gone, and liberty is dead.

Not on our watch.

(Although Dan Crenshaw sure seems to be quiet on this issue...)

And that is why I will soon be announcing a public screening of 2000 Mules.

This will be an opportunity to bring your friends, family, and skeptics to connect with other patriots that are ready to act!

We are looking to pack the house with at least 500 patriots...

But I need YOUR help!

Would you consider making a contribution of any amount to my campaign?

Whether $5 or $500, every little bit will help to ensure that our voices are heard!

[Please consider making your contribution by clicking here.](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZzZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbSUyRmphbWVzb25lbGxpc2ZvcmNvbmdyZXNzJTJGZG9uYXRl&sig=6Q7Ssdx488cbRGs9tBCDKh3TZGXFfFgbaReRcDWMEmbH&iat=1652115721&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=72A88A1A467)

name: Laurie Teper
subject: DOWN TO THE WIRE!
body:
**HELLO PATRIOTS!**
**This week is our last effort to GOTV and push Courtney across the finish line!**
**
**
**Saturday, May 14 we are Door Knocking in****friendly territory of Orange****County from 9:00-12:00. We are meeting at the Teper home, 2833 Percussion Dr in Hillsborough (off of Walker). Feel free to park in the pull through driveway.****I 'll have water and snacks to share. It is important to sign up for planning purposes so please sign up HERE:**

<https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0E4CADA629A3FACE9-canvassing>

**Thank you to all who have already been at the polls. We could still use your help!**
Sign up to volunteer at the polls handing out Courtney Geels palm cards. We need to fill slots **FIRST on May 17, then May 14 and May 13 in all 5 counties:** Alamance, Durham, Person, Granville and Orange. Please consider giving 2-3 hours of your time. Ask retired friends, neighbors and family to help! **Anyone who has extra time and is available to be at the polls prior to May 13 is encouraged to do so as well. Just let me know your available times and I will plug you in!**

**
**
**Anyone who is signed up but does not have palm cards, let me know!**

**LAST BUT NOT LEAST ALL VOLUNTEERS AND SUPPORTERS ARE WELCOME TO JOIN THE WATCH PARTY ON MAY 17TH!**

Come join Courtney Geels on Tuesday, May 17 for the Primary Election Watch Party! After you vote and volunteer to hand out cards at the polls, come to celebrate with the Courtney Geels Team and watch the results come in. The party begins at 7:00 p.m.

RSVP HERE: <https://courtneygeelsforcongress.com/event/courtney-geels-watch-party/>

__Fighting for Truth, Justice and Unity Together!__

Laurie Teper
Volunteer Coordinator
Courtney Geels for Congress NC04
Email: [volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)
Cell: (847)212-5651
[courtneygeelsforcongress.com](http://courtneygeelsforcongress.com)

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: C.S. Lewis on Christianity
body:
Young people today grow up being told that their perception of reality is a matter of perspective. Recently, they are even told
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zki5v9csqugminu096kfu9t8hklivkgdsru43ku8_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chi64o31clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbon0opketgn7crnc3ir2c77m9ge6pr4mor3bd5gcspn4pdielpbdc336dq60t1n6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i69j31d5jc5jrcp3666ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp2bs)
| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zus485krc658pgjjgsv617s4nktuau7uaha1oj8g_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chi64o31clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Young people today grow up being told that their perception of reality is a matter of perspective. Recently, they are even told that women can choose to be men and men women. This denial of objective reality—including a denial of an objective good—is destructive of proper education, of religious faith, and of free government. Largely as an antidote to this destructive force, Hillsdale College is releasing its latest free online course, “C.S. Lewis on Christianity.” Taught by Michael Ward, a visiting distinguished fellow at Hillsdale and a professor of theology at Oxford University, this seven-lecture course covers Lewis’s philosophical defense of an objective good and his demonstration of its fulfillment in Christianity. **I am writing today to ask if you would consider helping us meet our goal of raising $500,000 by midnight on May 16, so we can promote this new online course effectively, especially to young people.** **** Hillsdale produces its free online courses, as it does all its work, while refusing to accept government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. We are entirely dependent on private donations. With your tax-deductible gift today, we can enroll tens of thousands of young people in this new free online course and expand Hillsdale’s other outreach efforts. Please help us reach our $500,000 goal. clean_body: Young people today grow up being told that their perception of reality is a matter of perspective. Recently, they are even told | | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear Fellow American, Young people today grow up being told that their perception of reality is a matter of perspective. Recently, they are even told that women can choose to be men and men women. This denial of objective reality—including a denial of an objective good—is destructive of proper education, of religious faith, and of free government. Largely as an antidote to this destructive force, Hillsdale College is releasing its latest free online course, “C.S. Lewis on Christianity.” Taught by Michael Ward, a visiting distinguished fellow at Hillsdale and a professor of theology at Oxford University, this seven-lecture course covers Lewis’s philosophical defense of an objective good and his demonstration of its fulfillment in Christianity. I am writing today to ask if you would consider helping us meet our goal of raising $500,000 by midnight on May 16, so we can promote this new online course effectively, especially to young people. ** Hillsdale produces its free online courses, as it does all its work, while refusing to accept government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. We are entirely dependent on private donations. With your tax-deductible gift today, we can enroll tens of thousands of young people in this new free online course and expand Hillsdale’s other outreach efforts. Please help us reach our $500,000 goal. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: ** Thank you for your friendship and support. Warm regards, Larry P. | | Cheri Beasley and I have a few critical things in common. We love justice, and we fight for equity in our communities. But something we don't have in common yet is the title, Senator. **[Next year, I want to see Cheri by my side as the next U.S. Senator from North Carolina. Would you chip in $14 right now and help us make it happen?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45103320/344481225/-1429660753?refcode=2022-05-09-beasley&recurring=0&amount=14&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=38d3c52a-b3cf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGQzYzUyYS1iM2NmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q5YPTRyManEnf77Se5rlQCrcWHdhezS4DgT6Os59QrE=) ** I'd heard Cheri's name before her run for the U.S. Senate. name: Andy Ngo
subject: I was nearly killed for exposing Antifa
body:
Peter, I was one of the first civilians savagely beaten by lawless Antifa thugs. And unless we do something to stop them today, I'll be far from the last. **_[That's why I'm asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me fund my landmark lawsuit that will bring Antifa and their members to justice.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60347851:6F1cl7oN3:m:1:3317145305:2A29D244935A681E5EDCB5A08EFE197A:r)_** **You see, I was at Antifa 's "ground zero" in the summer of 2019.** This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they'd caused havoc before. I went to an Antifa "protest" as a journalist, to document and report on the event. As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety. The mob was angry and looking for a fight. Most of them wore masks -- and not the kind we're forced today because of coronavirus. They wanted to act like criminals without getting caught. Many had on helmets and makeshift armor. Some carried weapons like metal pipes, chains, crowbars, and even bricks. I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on. **People like you needed to know what was happening. ** But I didn't go unnoticed for long. Somebody recognized me and jeers quickly rose through the crowd. "F*** you, Andy Ngo!" and "Go home, fascist!" I tried to escape, but it was too late. **Projectiles started flying. Then came the fists. ** Before I knew it, I was being punched, kicked, and hit with flying objects. I tried to protect my head, but I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger. Not to mention they stole my camera. What they did to me is unacceptable. But this last summer, it became much worse than I could've ever imagined as Antifa set fire to entire cities for weeks on end. **And now, we 're watching Antifa and similar groups threaten mass riots and violence across the country.** **[Will you donate $35 or more to help me cover the costs of my lawsuit against Antifa?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60347851:6F1cl7oN3:m:1:3317145305:2A29D244935A681E5EDCB5A08EFE197A:r)** This is bigger than me alone. You see, after I got away from the mob, police finally showed up to question me, but my attackers stole all my evidence. Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured the attack, clear as day. I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved. Wrong. To this day, over a year later, my attackers are walking free. Portland police did nothing. No charges. No convictions. No justice. It's not much of a surprise, though. You see, radical politicians have long-since bowed to the dangerous mob that terrorizes their streets. And now, as you and I are watching Antifa's nationwide takeover, more and more politicians across the country are following suit. It's so bad that the justice system is buckling under the pressure of threats of violence from these disgusting thugs. We have to stop them and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family. **[That 's why I hope you'll join the fight by donating $35 or more to fund my landmark lawsuit against Antifa and their members.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60347851:6F1cl7oN3:m:1:3317145305:2A29D244935A681E5EDCB5A08EFE197A:r)** Because Antifa wants the end of America as we know it -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse - open anarchists who want to tear down our society and remake it in their own twisted vision. By any means necessary, **_Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem. _** And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. It's a sick strategy, but very smart - because so far, they've been right! **For the most part, they 've gotten off scot-free.**** ** Our politicians and media are treating this deranged terrorist group like peaceful protestors! As we've seen, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continues to escape consequences. **So now I 'm taking justice into my own hands - with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty. ** And, as I mentioned, we're suing Portland's Antifa Chapter. We've made a lot of progress in this case, but we're far from victory. **[You can be a part of bringing Antifa to justice with a donation of $35 or more today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60347851:6F1cl7oN3:m:1:3317145305:2A29D244935A681E5EDCB5A08EFE197A:r)** Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger. This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't. This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe. And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver. By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. **[Can I count on you to donate $35 or more to fund this critical lawsuit?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60347851:6F1cl7oN3:m:1:3317145305:2A29D244935A681E5EDCB5A08EFE197A:r)** Please don't wait - if we don't fight back and win now, these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America, destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Andy Ngo Investigative Journalist P.S. I know firsthand that America's troubles with Antifa aren't over-- _**they 're just beginning**_. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out.[**Please donate as generously as you can right away.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60347851:6F1cl7oN3:m:1:3317145305:2A29D244935A681E5EDCB5A08EFE197A:r) [**DONATE NOW**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60347851:6F1cl7oN3:m:1:3317145305:2A29D244935A681E5EDCB5A08EFE197A:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60347851:6F1cl7oN3:m:1:3317145305:2A29D244935A681E5EDCB5A08EFE197A:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60347851:6F1cl7oN3:m:1:3317145305:2A29D244935A681E5EDCB5A08EFE197A:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60347852:6F1cl7oN3:m:1:3317145305:2A29D244935A681E5EDCB5A08EFE197A:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

Projectiles started flying. Then came the fists. Before I knew it, I was being punched, kicked, and hit with flying objects. I tried to protect my head, but I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger. Not to mention they stole my camera. What they did to me is unacceptable. But this last summer, it became much worse than I could've ever imagined as Antifa set fire to entire cities for weeks on end. And now, we 're watching Antifa and similar groups threaten mass riots and violence across the country. This is bigger than me alone. You see, after I got away from the mob, police finally showed up to question me, but my attackers stole all my evidence. Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured the attack, clear as day. I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved. Wrong. To this day, over a year later, my attackers are walking free. Portland police did nothing. No charges. No convictions. No justice. It's not much of a surprise, though. You see, radical politicians have long-since bowed to the dangerous mob that terrorizes their streets. And now, as you and I are watching Antifa's nationwide takeover, more and more politicians across the country are following suit. It's so bad that the justice system is buckling under the pressure of threats of violence from these disgusting thugs. We have to stop them and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family. Because Antifa wants the end of America as we know it -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse - open anarchists who want to tear down our society and remake it in their own twisted vision. By any means necessary, Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem. And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. It's a sick strategy, but very smart - because so far, they've been right! For the most part, they 've gotten off scot-free.** Our politicians and media are treating this deranged terrorist group like peaceful protestors! As we've seen, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continues to escape consequences. So now I 'm taking justice into my own hands - with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty. And, as I mentioned, we're suing Portland's Antifa Chapter. We've made a lot of progress in this case, but we're far from victory. Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger. This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't. This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe. And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver. By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. Please don't wait - if we don't fight back and win now, these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America, destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Andy Ngo Investigative Journalist P.S. I know firsthand that America's troubles with Antifa aren't over-- they 're just beginning. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out. The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends. body:
we have unprecedented momentum in Iowa ...
| | | Peter – my opponent Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) rallied with Donald Trump here in Iowa, where he accepted the former president's endorsement. Now more than ever, I need your support if we're truly going to defeat Sen. Grassley and flip this seat blue. **Here's what you need to know:**
---
**First,** we have unprecedented momentum in Iowa: reporting from The Des Moines Register revealed Sen. Grassley is at his lowest APPROVAL rating in nearly two decades – and an Iowa pollster went on record saying Sen. Grassley's standing right now is _weak._
**But** defeating Sen. Grassley, even when he's vulnerable, will take unprecedented resources: he's backed by Mitch McConnell and his allies who have more than $44 million _in the bank_ to protect Sen. Grassley and attack competitive challengers like me.
**So right now** my team and I need to raise another $8,000 before midnight tonight. This is a grassroots campaign, and hitting these goals and building up resources is the only way we can defeat Sen. Grassley and defend our Democratic Senate majority in the process.
**[Please, donate $5 or more now – whatever you can spare to fuel our fight against Sen. Grassley when he's vulnerable – so we can win in Iowa and protect our Democratic Senate majority. name: ICYMI News
subject: C.S. Lewis on Christianity
body:
Young people today grow up being told that their perception of reality is a matter of perspective. Recently, they are even told
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgtsqi45smqsid6c7vcn0fnmk9ouhnsmd9bq39q8_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chi6co74cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sljmhpb9dbielr76slgcgrm6tr2cgom0slhmirbadthepomap9n6hjjcd73mlrrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33c5jc3g7cor66pib6p9nm2qmash5u)
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztb4uvtj102k7pc2staptr4fs4kt9j1js5qpo0pg_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chi6co74cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Young people today grow up being told that their perception of reality is a matter of perspective. Recently, they are even told that women can choose to be men and men women. This denial of objective reality—including a denial of an objective good—is destructive of proper education, of religious faith, and of free government. Largely as an antidote to this destructive force, Hillsdale College is releasing its latest free online course, “C.S. Lewis on Christianity.” Taught by Michael Ward, a visiting distinguished fellow at Hillsdale and a professor of theology at Oxford University, this seven-lecture course covers Lewis’s philosophical defense of an objective good and his demonstration of its fulfillment in Christianity. **I am writing today to ask if you would consider helping us meet our goal of raising $500,000 by midnight on May 16, so we can promote this new online course effectively, especially to young people.** **** Hillsdale produces its free online courses, as it does all its work, while refusing to accept government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. We are entirely dependent on private donations. With your tax-deductible gift today, we can enroll tens of thousands of young people in this new free online course and expand Hillsdale’s other outreach efforts. Please help us reach our $500,000 goal. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cs-lewis-christianity](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs5bf4dflcduqkvqpqbpibjd8brgdhr3n34smn60_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chi6co74cth2bs)** Thank you for your friendship and support. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---

Please help us reach our $500,000 goal. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: ** Thank you for your friendship and support. Warm regards, Larry P. name: Chairman Jim Banks
subject: Help STOP CRT in the military
body:
͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌

͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌

Fellow Conservative,

Critical Race Theory has no place in the United States Military!

Our troops don’t need brainwashing about how to become an “antiracist.”

And they DEFINITELY shouldn’t be forced to read anti-American radical Ibrahim X Kendi’s manifesto to serve our country.

I’ve been leading the fight against CRT in the U.S. Military since my February 2021 letter to Admiral Michael M. Gilday regarding his inclusion of anti-American radical Ibrahim X Kendi’s book “How to Be an Antiracist” in the Chief of Naval Operations reading list.

Naval Service Members should be able to reference and refer others to this list of books that represent what it means to be an American and our core, shared values as a country. The inclusion of Kendi’s book is simply wrong and unaligned with America’s core values.

House Conservatives Trust is fighting back against the far left and their constant attempts to create division and hatred in America. We KNOW the truth. Radicals like Kendi just want to divide Americans using hateful, emotional rhetoric.
http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=313298d34eb4714e4392445a80e513328beeb0d65952611ca9b0b2099fd8bcc0d911d58e4360a3632ea425921377250fa0af50e539859f20
Please support our fight against CRT in the military:

http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=313298d34eb4714e4392445a80e513328beeb0d65952611ca9b0b2099fd8bcc0d911d58e4360a3632ea425921377250fa0af50e539859f20
Reject Critical Race Theory in the U.S. Military

Critical Race Theory has no place in classrooms, and it certainly does not belong on reading lists for our military. Our military should focus on securing and defending these great United States.
http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=313298d34eb4714e4392445a80e513328beeb0d65952611ca9b0b2099fd8bcc0d911d58e4360a3632ea425921377250fa0af50e539859f20
>>">STEP UP NOW AND FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT’S INDOCTRINATION. >>>

Thank you,

Chairman Jim Banks

House Conservatives Trust

We’ve had a wild journey, and we’ve joined up with some INCREDIBLE organizations since the start of this campaign. | | | Peter, There are just two weeks left in our primary election , and we thought it would be fun to recap the endorsements Wiley has earned up until this point! We’ve joined up with some INCREDIBLE organizations since the start of this campaign. Like we mentioned, we’ve got just two weeks until primary day, and each and every one of these endorsements have helped our campaign to get to this point. But Wiley has yet to gain the most important endorsement of the campaign: yours. It would be an honor for Wiley to have your official support as we enter the final days of this primary election. Thank you! name: Herschel Walker
subject: Humbly asking for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
It’s Herschel Walker, and I’m reaching out to you with an urgent message. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6988%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=%2fTCZqWp%2bZuUb3CLXNNrK5g&sysid=1)

| | Friend,

It’s Herschel Walker, and I’m reaching out to you with an urgent message. Our Senate race in Georgia is one of the toughest races in the country, so I’m asking if you can help.

Early voting began May 2 for the Republican Primary, so we are ramping up our efforts to contact voters. _**[Senator Raphael Warnock (D) has outraised every candidate in the country- including our campaign, so we’re doing everything we can to close the fundraising gap.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61801%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CifTIo2vxRti9zyXjik5hw&sysid=1 "Senator Raphael Warnock \(D\) has outraised
every candidate in the country – including our campaign, so we’re doing
everything we can to close the fundraising gap. ")**_

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61802%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=X6tgy%2bYLcBj9HusH94WOCw&sysid=1)
---

In the first three months of this year, my Democrat opponent raised a record-breaking $13.6 MILLION! That’s $151,000 PER DAY or $105 PER MINUTE - both day and night!

_**[I know it may seem like a lot, but we can close the gap if enough PATRIOTS will stand with us. I’m humbly asking you to give a donation of $3 or more today.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61803%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iyCGITgTd6enSOFk62bquw&sysid=1 "I
know it may seem like a lot, but we can close the gap if enough PATRIOTS will
stand with us. I’m humbly asking you to give a donation of $3 or more today.")**_

Democrats know we have the chance to flip this Senate seat in Georgia from BLUE to RED. They see that we’re virtually TIED in the polls, so they are FREAKING OUT. They know that Republicans will fight tooth and nail to keep Georgia from going BLUE AGAIN, so they are pouring resources into the state like crazy.

**In fact, Chuck Schumer’s Super PAC just announced they are going to spend $23 million in attack ads against me! That proves how scared they are!**

If we’re going to win the critical Senate race in Georgia, we need your help.

In the 60 seconds it has taken you to read this short email, my Democrat opponent has raised another $105! Can you believe that? _**[Would you be one of 5 people to give $21 this very minute (for a combined $105) and help us close the fundraising gap?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61804%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GxX8d0ckuL8VbilJWjffkw&sysid=1 "Would you be one of 5 people to give $21 this very minute \(for a combined
$105\) and help us close the fundraising gap?")**_

When you donate, you’ll be helping us win in Georgia, take back the Republican majority in the U.S. Senate, stop the Biden-Harris agenda, and get America back on track!

To victory,

Herschel Walker

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61802%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=X6tgy%2bYLcBj9HusH94WOCw&sysid=1)

name: Team Vanuch
subject: Elise Stefanik’s E-PAC names Crystal Vanuch to latest “Women to Watch” List For 2022 Cycle
body:
“Make no mistake: This will be the biggest, most historic, and most diverse class of GOP women ever in our nation’s history, and E-PAC is leading that charge. I look forward to standing with these candidates every step of the way as GOP women usher in the historic 2022 Red Wave and fire Nancy Pelosi once and for all,” said House Conference Chair Elise Stefanik in her latest announcement.
| | | [](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/e11a3563e9b55774/f8f93d698e05ed67c3d6b838967d376c/40203)
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: May 9, 2022Contact: Info@CrystalVanuch.com
---
| | **Elise Stefanik’s E-PAC Names Crystal Vanuch to Latest “Women To Watch” List For 2022 Cycle** **WASHINGTON, D.C.** – Today, building on recent momentum with E-PAC endorsed candidate victories in Ohio and Indiana, GOP House Conference Chair and E-PAC founder Elise Stefanik added Crystal Vanuch, a leading candidate in the Republican Primary in Virginia’s 7th Congressional District, to her “Women to Watch” List for the 2022 cycle. “Make no mistake: This will be the biggest, most historic, and most diverse class of GOP women ever in our nation’s history, and E-PAC is leading that charge. I look forward to standing with these candidates every step of the way as GOP women usher in the historic 2022 Red Wave and fire Nancy Pelosi once and for all,” said House Conference Chair Elise Stefanik in [her latest announcement](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/e11a3563e9b55774/b817ca3d97881e64c3d6b838967d376c/40203). “I am once again honored and excited to be named to E-PAC’s “Women to Watch” list on the heels of our recent “On The Radar” inclusion in the NRCC’s Young Guns Program,” said Crystal Vanuch. “Our campaign is gaining momentum in the home stretch as voters rally behind our shared conservative message and reject the Biden-Pelosi-Spanberger liberal agenda that is failing America and leading to record inflation and instability.” Born in Prince William County and raised in Stafford County, Crystal has ties to over 56% of the district. A fighter with a proven conservative voting record as Chairman of the Board of County Supervisors in Stafford County, she epitomizes the principles of E-PAC’s program. Crystal’s constituents have praised her ability to deliver results like securing funding and pay raises for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment rights, and standing with parents to stop CRT from being taught in Stafford schools. Through E-PAC, Congresswoman Elise Stefanik (R-NY) has led the national effort to increase the number of Republican women elected to Congress ushering in the historic “Year of the Republican Woman.” The growing number of Republican women in Congress will be the majority makers in 2022. This past cycle, 228 Republican female candidates ran for the House of Representatives, and 94 of them won their primaries — nearly doubling the previous record. In just two years we have increased the number of Republican women in Congress to 35. Now, there are over 170 Republican women filed to run for Congress in 2022. E-PAC continues to recruit, develop, support, and mentor slates of top tier women Republican candidates who have demonstrated electability and potential for candidate development and growth. Proudly receiving this announcement, Crystal plans to secure the Republican nomination for Virginia’s 7th Congressional District on June 21st and will go on to victory against Abigail Spanberger on November 8th and fire Pelosi once and for all. ###
---

name: Val Demings
subject: Turning the clock back by 50 years
body:
Rachel Maddow is right, Derek. The Supreme Court will likely overturn Roe v. Wade in the next few months – and when they do, at least 36 million women in more than 28 states will lose access to the fundamental right to make personal decisions about their own body.
This is an appalling decision that turns the clock back on women's rights by nearly 50 years, taking our country back to a time when women had no choice but to undergo dangerous back-alley procedures.
Make no mistake, Derek; this is a coordinated attack on a fundamental right that the GOP has planned for decades. I'll never stop fighting for the right to reproductive choice – and if I win this Senate race, Democrats can use our expanded pro-choice majority to federally codify abortion rights.
If you're ready to join the fight for reproductive freedom, will you split $25 or more between my campaign and CommonGood today? Every contribution will help me flip Florida blue and take action to protect abortion access for all. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_vd?refcode=20220509_CGVA_Demings]

name: Team Greitens
subject: NEW POLL: Eric Greitens Up Big in U.S. Senate Race
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| NEW POLL: Eric Greitens Up Big in U.S. Senate Race
---
| St. Louis, MO - Former Missouri governor and candidate for U.S. Senate Eric Greitens released new poll numbers today indicating he firmly remains the frontrunner in the U.S. Senate Republican primary. The survey was conducted from May 2 through May 4, 2022. | For voters who have a favorable view of President Trump, Governor Greitens leads his nearest challenger by a 2 to 1 margin, 34% to 17%. Among female voters, Governor Greitens has a nine point lead over his nearest challenger, 29% to 20%. Interestingly, Vicky Hartzler is the candidate of choice of anti-Trump Republicans. She leads this group with 17% of their vote, while all other candidates are in single digits. For undecided voters, most signs point to them siding with the Greitens campaign. 53% of undecided voters are conservative leaning, a group Governor Greitens is already leading with. And a plurality, 41%, say they would be more likely to vote for a candidate who was endorsed by President Trump, another subgroup that Governor Greitens performs exceptionally better than his main challengers. Respondents also were 49% more likely to vote for a candidate who pledged to vote against Mitch McConnell as Senate Leader. Governor Greitens is the only candidate who has sided with President Trump and [vowed to vote against McConnell](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rY4CWK5cXfASRQ8KJyfFVAJlvjLZpR25QV7J1QUOXDYe81xIP7FLpMKRjvP1Y2egmYnDXJYyQ3DBkRW-vxa4uB071XKR8ui7mBIQRK5EmmI87opbdaH1XzabA8gl4ZJAv9d31CWqLsBB8QiSX15y-Z91J5sjeF6Qz_-hpRrKG1bGsS1vzKNJ1CAFZABRt8Db1OtXoG8lqHw9_qYqRVBHG_qxM0AJDTWApQ9NM8hQ7gaSBTDl75v_PWJn6pM_VObuE9FoSXXy71PUPr_kO7Zf_ZDLdYTbnFxuxgSFao_dGv8=&c=HnVj3C6dEZAS1IxlRuQKwebE7HuqF6o1b5JApQEU20nfBJSdFZhF6g==&ch=OgAraG4_zDGBaEncV6a0V-bWjijio9TyAx2K0La0Rlh2B4IL91mrUw==) as Senate Leader once elected.
"Governor Eric Greitens is the only America First candidate running for the US Senate in Missouri. name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Defund Censorship
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Joe Biden has finally decided to go full Orwell. His latest move is to create a new Disinformation Governance Board at the Department of Homeland Security to _**monitor the American people's speech**_.
There is no explanation for this other than another step in the long-term plan to destroy free speech in America.
[**Help stop Biden's Ministry of Truth!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61818%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EDVN2kupn8I3txx4d4gOpQ&sysid=1)
And who did Biden tap to run his new "Ministry of Truth"? A left-wing pro-censorship activist with ties to the Russia Hoax, Steele Dossier, and the cover-up of Hunter Biden's laptop.
It may be dystopian. It may be corrupt. But right now, it's happening in our country _**and with our money**_.
That's where we will draw our battle lines in this fight.
The federal government can't do anything without congressional authorization and funding. If Joe Biden wants to use taxpayer dollars to suppress criticism of his disastrous policies, then we have no choice but to cut all funding for this monstrous abuse of power.
**Our freedom is under attack, and Joe Biden's "Ministry of Truth" must be defunded.** **[Help the Freedom Caucus fight to defund Joe Biden's taxpayer-funded censorship.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61819%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J%2fpIfT6ErZoCezrTIeVIWA&sysid=1)**
The irony is, Washington Democrats are the source of all disinformation in American politics:
* "If you like your insurance, you can keep it."
* "Inflation is Vladimir Putin's fault."
* "Covid-19 was not created in a Chinese lab."
* "Critical race theory is not taught in schools."
* "The border is under control."

At this point, Democrats should change their mascot from a donkey to a gaslight. The Disinformation Governance Board isn't about fighting lies but spreading them. The Left _loves_ lies, especially when they are supported with corporate cash.
You and I both know Biden's Ministry of Truth will be a Big Brother and Big Tech marriage, weaponized to destroy our freedom.
All government funding bills must originate in the House of Representatives, so it's up to House Freedom Fund, the House Freedom Caucus, and grassroots conservatives like you to force this debate and win this fight.
**[Help Stop Biden's Ministry of Truth: Support the House Freedom Caucus today!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61810%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gdKrdUJin5F1zN2sOYwVgA&sysid=1)**
We have to fight many issues in the next budget - immigration, crime, right-to-life, education. But none is more fundamental in this election year than Americans' right to Free Speech without punishment or censorship by federal bureaucrats.
Most Republicans in Washington won't fight to defund the Left's agenda because they don't want Democrats to blame them for causing a government shutdown. Freedom Caucus conservatives are different. They know conservatives can win the argument if Republicans keep their promises and fight on principle.
And that's why they are leading the fight to defund Biden's "Ministry of Truth" and investigate the corrupt deals between Big Government and Big Tech that brought it about.
**[But these candidates need your support. Today. Right now.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61811%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TjbmbE%2bL4ClUoAAabYM4Dw&sysid=1)**
**Please send a message that this is still America. And here, the people control the government, not the other way around.**
Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to support conservative leadership in Washington. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---

name: Andy Ngo
subject: I was nearly killed for exposing Antifa
body:
Peter, I was one of the first civilians savagely beaten by lawless Antifa thugs. And unless we do something to stop them today, I'll be far from the last. **_[That's why I'm asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me fund my landmark lawsuit that will bring Antifa and their members to justice.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60347749:6DujV7oeN:m:1:3253819041:9312BD3DD6592878346669A0405DB0FF:r)_** **You see, I was at Antifa 's "ground zero" in the summer of 2019.** This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they'd caused havoc before. I went to an Antifa "protest" as a journalist, to document and report on the event. As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety. The mob was angry and looking for a fight. Most of them wore masks -- and not the kind we're forced today because of coronavirus. They wanted to act like criminals without getting caught. Many had on helmets and makeshift armor. Some carried weapons like metal pipes, chains, crowbars, and even bricks. I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on. **People like you needed to know what was happening. ** But I didn't go unnoticed for long. Somebody recognized me and jeers quickly rose through the crowd. "F*** you, Andy Ngo!" and "Go home, fascist!" I tried to escape, but it was too late. **Projectiles started flying. Then came the fists. ** Before I knew it, I was being punched, kicked, and hit with flying objects. I tried to protect my head, but I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger. Not to mention they stole my camera. What they did to me is unacceptable. But this last summer, it became much worse than I could've ever imagined as Antifa set fire to entire cities for weeks on end. **And now, we 're watching Antifa and similar groups threaten mass riots and violence across the country.** **[Will you donate $35 or more to help me cover the costs of my lawsuit against Antifa?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60347749:6DujV7oeN:m:1:3253819041:9312BD3DD6592878346669A0405DB0FF:r)** This is bigger than me alone. You see, after I got away from the mob, police finally showed up to question me, but my attackers stole all my evidence. Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured the attack, clear as day. I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved. Wrong. To this day, over a year later, my attackers are walking free. Portland police did nothing. No charges. No convictions. No justice. It's not much of a surprise, though. You see, radical politicians have long-since bowed to the dangerous mob that terrorizes their streets. And now, as you and I are watching Antifa's nationwide takeover, more and more politicians across the country are following suit. It's so bad that the justice system is buckling under the pressure of threats of violence from these disgusting thugs. We have to stop them and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family. **[That 's why I hope you'll join the fight by donating $35 or more to fund my landmark lawsuit against Antifa and their members.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60347749:6DujV7oeN:m:1:3253819041:9312BD3DD6592878346669A0405DB0FF:r)** Because Antifa wants the end of America as we know it -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse - open anarchists who want to tear down our society and remake it in their own twisted vision. By any means necessary, **_Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem. _** And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. It's a sick strategy, but very smart - because so far, they've been right! **For the most part, they 've gotten off scot-free.**** ** Our politicians and media are treating this deranged terrorist group like peaceful protestors! As we've seen, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continues to escape consequences. **So now I 'm taking justice into my own hands - with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty. ** And, as I mentioned, we're suing Portland's Antifa Chapter. We've made a lot of progress in this case, but we're far from victory. **[You can be a part of bringing Antifa to justice with a donation of $35 or more today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60347749:6DujV7oeN:m:1:3253819041:9312BD3DD6592878346669A0405DB0FF:r)** Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger. This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't. This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe. And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver. By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. **[Can I count on you to donate $35 or more to fund this critical lawsuit?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60347749:6DujV7oeN:m:1:3253819041:9312BD3DD6592878346669A0405DB0FF:r)** Please don't wait - if we don't fight back and win now, these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America, destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Andy Ngo Investigative Journalist P.S. I know firsthand that America's troubles with Antifa aren't over-- _**they 're just beginning**_. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out.[**Please donate as generously as you can right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60347749:6DujV7oeN:m:1:3253819041:9312BD3DD6592878346669A0405DB0FF:r) [**DONATE NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60347749:6DujV7oeN:m:1:3253819041:9312BD3DD6592878346669A0405DB0FF:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60347749:6DujV7oeN:m:1:3253819041:9312BD3DD6592878346669A0405DB0FF:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60347749:6DujV7oeN:m:1:3253819041:9312BD3DD6592878346669A0405DB0FF:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60347750:6DujV7oeN:m:1:3253819041:9312BD3DD6592878346669A0405DB0FF:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

body:
There’s not much time left.
#
We’ll get right to the point, Peter.
Patty’s biggest event of the year – the Golden Tennis Shoe Awards – is fast approaching.
We all know people who faced challenges, and not only overcame them but went above and beyond to make sure other people around them didn’t have to experience the same thing. These people are brave and selfless–and the Golden Tennis Shoe Award is all about celebrating them and the impact they’ve made across Washington state.
You might’ve seen Patty’s earlier emails, but in case you didn’t, **we’re hoping that you’ll nominate someone you know who overcame the odds and then went above and beyond to help those around them. **
**[Sound like someone you know? body:
It's Herschel Walker, and I'm reaching out to you with an urgent message.
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | Fellow Conservative,

It’s Herschel Walker, and I’m reaching out to you with an urgent message. Our Senate race in Georgia is one of the toughest races in the country, so I’m asking if you can help.

Early voting began May 2 for the Republican Primary, so we are ramping up our efforts to contact voters. _**[Senator Raphael Warnock (D) has outraised every candidate in the country – including our campaign, so we’re doing everything we can to close the fundraising gap.](http://trk.readactnews.-JQMBm18f9bg "Senator Raphael Warnock \(D\) has outraised every candidate in the country - including our campaign, so we're doing everything we can to close the fundraising gap. ")**_

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://trk.readactnews._pVA)
---

In the first three months of this year, my Democrat opponent raised a record-breaking $13.6 MILLION! That’s $151,000 PER DAY or $105 PER MINUTE – both day and night!

_**[I know it may seem like a lot, but we can close the gap if enough PATRIOTS will stand with us. I’m humbly asking you to give a donation of $3 or more today.](http://trk.readactnews._ivLFtTEpRUmetGCcJGPiA "I know it may seem like a lot, but we can close the gap if enough PATRIOTS will stand with us. I'm humbly asking you to give a donation of $3 or more today.")**_

Democrats know we have the chance to flip this Senate seat in Georgia from BLUE to RED. They see that we’re virtually TIED in the polls, so they are FREAKING OUT. They know that Republicans will fight tooth and nail to keep Georgia from going BLUE AGAIN, so they are pouring resources into the state like crazy.

**In fact, Chuck Schumer’s Super PAC just announced they are going to spend $23 million in attack ads against me! That proves how scared they are!**

If we’re going to win the critical Senate race in Georgia, we need your help.

In the 60 seconds it has taken you to read this short email, my Democrat opponent has raised another $105! Can you believe that? _**[Would you be one of 5 people to give $21 this very minute (for a combined $105) and help us close the fundraising gap?](http://trk.readactnews._mJFcxySppA "Would you be one of 5 people to give $21 this very minute \(for a combined $105\) and help us close the fundraising gap?")**_

When you donate, you’ll be helping us win in Georgia, take back the Republican majority in the U.S. Senate, stop the Biden-Harris agenda, and get America back on track!

To victory,

Herschel Walker

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Why your support for Jeremy Hunt makes a difference
body:
Peter, I just endorsed Jeremy Hunt, and I want you to know why your immediate support is so important.

1\. A Republican hasn’t won GA-02 in 150 years. 2\. clean_body: | Friend – here's why I'm asking you to commit to supporting the NDRC over the long term with a = today: | = That's the gist of it. Between ongoing litigation, maps that will need to be relitigated after the 2022 election, and Republican attempts to reelect gerrymandering politicians, stack state courts, and promote their extreme legal theories, nothing is over yet. As one redistricting expert says: “No one should leave at intermission thinking that they know how the story is going to come out.” And that's why I'm asking you to set up a monthly recurring donation. Can the NDRC count on you? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks, Ben = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. subject: Biden’s MAGA Lie
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [BIDEN: This MAGA crowd is really the most extreme political organization that has existed in American history.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016I19-ymGQRlj4Bod3FXnn9phHDM3lFOs7VF65ko25RYZBfNXl9Wuk2bt-0idZ1sEuj6fOymMcCxErhxfmDF7sqGAC5e163dSo9fFv7LmbEG2E_42Ut__AIN_p-GiSDJIRyeTEqVPgPhPhWLLNk5POI7x2gouq99ptFPfg8rgkKEDDOLkMaL5ONgQk3iDJEPGk1WCM05RYXBQlUKyYl6X2Q==&c=TJF03beG1v_Ac2_kX4Wb_o5qNaBcqUVleLKpdYqRy1YR0BOpzWoi1A==&ch=Cb1bSGCMuWhyM7Kp87dA-lg3R9IVnSgXeP15V5I6n9y9gruyTeqUpQ==)

| [FIGHT BIDEN'S LIES HERE >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016I19-ymGQRlj4Bod3FXnn9phHDM3lFOs7VF65ko25RYZBfNXl9Wuk2bt-0idZ1sEuj6fOymMcCxErhxfmDF7sqGAC5e163dSo9fFv7LmbEG2E_42Ut__AIN_p-GiSDJIRyeTEqVPgPhPhWLLNk5POI7x2gouq99ptFPfg8rgkKEDDOLkMaL5ONgQk3iDJEPGk1WCM05RYXBQlUKyYl6X2Q==&c=TJF03beG1v_Ac2_kX4Wb_o5qNaBcqUVleLKpdYqRy1YR0BOpzWoi1A==&ch=Cb1bSGCMuWhyM7Kp87dA-lg3R9IVnSgXeP15V5I6n9y9gruyTeqUpQ==)
Peter, this is something you might expect to hear from an under-loved undergraduate millennial, but not from the President of the United States.
The most extreme political organization in American history?
Is our addled President forgetting that it was the ANTIFA militants and BLM rioters who burned down our cities...and that his own second-in-command helped bail them out of jail?
Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the rest of the Swamp Establishment can try to demonize MAGA all they want...
They're the ones who want an MS-13 invasion of your home, CRT Wokeness in your nation's military, and a "Disinformation Governance Board" controlling your speech.
But that's not stopping them from smearing us like this, or even from calling for MAGA fighters like Marjorie Taylor Greene and I to be BARRED FROM RUNNING FOR OFFICE!
[So we need to stand our ground when attacks like this come in - act now before the Left's minions use these smears to rig another election... this time by ripping our names off the ballot!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016I19-ymGQRlj4Bod3FXnn9phHDM3lFOs7VF65ko25RYZBfNXl9Wuk2bt-0idZ1sEuj6fOymMcCxErhxfmDF7sqGAC5e163dSo9fFv7LmbEG2E_42Ut__AIN_p-GiSDJIRyeTEqVPgPhPhWLLNk5POI7x2gouq99ptFPfg8rgkKEDDOLkMaL5ONgQk3iDJEPGk1WCM05RYXBQlUKyYl6X2Q==&c=TJF03beG1v_Ac2_kX4Wb_o5qNaBcqUVleLKpdYqRy1YR0BOpzWoi1A==&ch=Cb1bSGCMuWhyM7Kp87dA-lg3R9IVnSgXeP15V5I6n9y9gruyTeqUpQ==)

| | | [SHOW JOE WHAT "THIS MAGA CROWD" CAN DO](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016I19-ymGQRlj4Bod3FXnn9phHDM3lFOs7VF65ko25RYZBfNXl9Wuk2bt-0idZ1sEuj6fOymMcCxErhxfmDF7sqGAC5e163dSo9fFv7LmbEG2E_42Ut__AIN_p-GiSDJIRyeTEqVPgPhPhWLLNk5POI7x2gouq99ptFPfg8rgkKEDDOLkMaL5ONgQk3iDJEPGk1WCM05RYXBQlUKyYl6X2Q==&c=TJF03beG1v_Ac2_kX4Wb_o5qNaBcqUVleLKpdYqRy1YR0BOpzWoi1A==&ch=Cb1bSGCMuWhyM7Kp87dA-lg3R9IVnSgXeP15V5I6n9y9gruyTeqUpQ==)

body:
Eddie just got a huge endorsement

|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45107229/344499583/380755282?refcode=gel_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmU1ZTczOS1jNGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y5ieaT7epnosWIxWIrwiMMBQMJ8wmr4zJHXW-qTXspA=)

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45107230/344499584/-191293105?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220509_FR_SEANSHAW_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmU1ZTczOS1jNGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y5ieaT7epnosWIxWIrwiMMBQMJ8wmr4zJHXW-qTXspA=) Sean Shaw, former state legislature and 2018 Democratic nominee for Attorney General here.

Our politics are broken and we already know we can’t count on career politicians to fix them. We need new leaders with bold solutions who are willing to step up and do the hard work to make people’s lives better. [ Eddie has already proven himself to be that kind of a leader.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45107231/344499585/-1262028889?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220509_FR_SEANSHAW_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmU1ZTczOS1jNGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y5ieaT7epnosWIxWIrwiMMBQMJ8wmr4zJHXW-qTXspA=)

Democrats are always losing the messaging war to Republicans, and we need some more guts and creativity to fight back against their message machine. The bottom line is we can’t keep running the same kinds of candidates and expect different results.

[Eddie is a different kind of candidate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45107232/344499586/-1262028889?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220509_FR_SEANSHAW_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmU1ZTczOS1jNGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y5ieaT7epnosWIxWIrwiMMBQMJ8wmr4zJHXW-qTXspA=) His creative background, coupled with his years of experience activating voters and expanding our Democratic coalition set him apart. body:
Liz is running in one of the most competitive districts in the country, and all eyes are on her. This race could be key to deciding the House majority, which will mean the difference between lowering prescription drug prices, protecting voting rights, and defending against cuts to Social Security, or not.

body:
With FIVE extreme GOP candidates running to defeat me it's never been more important to get my message in front of crucial swing voters.

---
I'll keep this brief -
Last week, my team released our first ad of the Election Year to reach voters across the Granite State and fight back against the $7.8 million that Republicans have spent attacking me.
With FIVE extreme GOP candidates running to defeat me it's never been more important to get my message in front of crucial swing voters. But right now, we're facing a budget shortfall. If we don't quickly turn things around, our ad could go dark, ceding valuable TV ad space to far-right super PACs.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: My decision to run for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may22?refcode=em220509-1-7&refcode2=2793.6688874.pA8E7v&t=1&akid=2793%2E6688874%2EpA8E7v)
---
Friends —
I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like a lot of time, but with a schedule like mine, I can assure you it’s a gift.
And while I know our campaign sends a lot of emails your way, I want to take a few of these minutes to tell you about my decision to run for Senate in the first place — and why your support today is so important to our success.
The truth is: When Gabby and I first started talking about running, we weren’t sure what to expect. We knew that Arizona needed new leadership in the Senate — someone who would always put the people of our state first, who was willing to work across the aisle to deliver real results, and who would prioritize building bridges between the two parties — not burning them down.
We also knew we had some friends who would help us out. But when you’re talking about such a big campaign, we realized we’d need support from a lot of people we hadn’t met yet. Especially since I was making the decision to reject corporate PAC money.
You know the rest. We won in 2020 in large part because we ran the biggest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen.
But now we have a new mission: Re-election.
And right now, we have two problems. One, the polls are really tight. And two, Republicans on the far right are spending millions against us. If we’re going to win again, it’s going to take a similar level of support from people like you.
So, please:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to my re-election campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona? The amount you give isn’t as important as the number of donations we receive. Because it all adds up when we’re all chipping in.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may22?refcode=em220509-1-7&t=2&refcode2=2793_6688874_pA8E7v&akid=2793%2E6688874%2EpA8E7v)

name: VoteVets
subject: “America’s Hitler”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
J.D. Vance once worried Donald Trump could become “America’s Hitler.”
#
Derek —
J.D. Vance once worried Donald Trump could become “America’s Hitler.”
He said he was a “Never Trump guy,” and that he “never liked him.”
Then he decided he wanted to run for Senate in Ohio, and he went from Never Trump to Full Trump. All with the help of Tucker Carlson — who directly intervened to help Vance win Trump’s endorsement.
So here we are. J.D. Vance is the Republican nominee in a state he’s favored to win. A full-on MAGA apostle who proudly accepted the endorsement of Matt Gaetz and Marjorie Taylor Greene.
We must keep J.D. Vance out of the Senate.
Will it be easy? No.
But VoteVets is the one organization that can cut through the ad clutter and make a difference in Ohio.
But we need your help to get it done:
[**Please make a $3 contribution to VoteVets today and we’ll put it right to work keeping people like J.D. Vance out of the Senate and helping Democrats hold their slim majority.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-pac-senate?refcode=em220509-1-15&t=1&refcode2=5820_3013755_b8baLN&akid=5820%2E3013755%2Eb8baLN)

clean_body: J.D. Vance once worried Donald Trump could become “America’s Hitler.” Derek — J.D. Vance once worried Donald Trump could become “America’s Hitler.” He said he was a “Never Trump guy,” and that he “never liked him.” Then he decided he wanted to run for Senate in Ohio, and he went from Never Trump to Full Trump. All with the help of Tucker Carlson — who directly intervened to help Vance win Trump’s endorsement. So here we are. J.D. Vance is the Republican nominee in a state he’s favored to win. A full-on MAGA apostle who proudly accepted the endorsement of Matt Gaetz and Marjorie Taylor Greene. We must keep J.D. Vance out of the Senate. Will it be easy? No. But VoteVets is the one organization that can cut through the ad clutter and make a difference in Ohio. subject: A SMACK IN THE FACE to our veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress
body:
Joe Biden wants to take away medical personnel from the Department of Veterans Affairs to care for illegal immigrants at our southern border. [](http://links.hungforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=1eb84567b67a4d508a3a68faf1d71488&_e=vYg2dQsaIfpiVIGQNDc6etS-S1zdNpH5SihfLtrmJA7yJZWPPRgFIJfp49_QoL0wqLW6XarUl5MGD9JwHAYVaTnIgdcrI3Vf2vKAyoLc8l-F7VApK1J-Q_nihs4OUU4uAMJCZsgYAp8BGgdJz45lKdkRV8E46alJ8RsJbNhNr5zs7dRaZzw3WyO5DljaoOpfh1dNTs_NRx5ODLN60GDEHxLoXwF8mYnIqTX-iM4mkIx29ImJBNzopLsjCW0fubLd6bFD0l73KUYLd5YBO_stBbahHyvv0OMdnbhwHX91YxvZOPVM8H2_40jP9GI8_hhOuHfTfLEMH0G1Ag6rLeCqFb9eqs3l-M2q-wYZLfzOezczVjuB1TFmleNTGjd8fTMlYWjvVvwxx5Fhq1OSGvfw4fOhCjC80lests5jN4BoGZgIBcugh8pp-Ep_GnY-z0HD) Peter, I can’t believe it.

**Joe Biden wants to take away medical personnel from the Department of Veterans Affairs to care for illegal immigrants at our southern border.**

_It’s hard enough for veterans to receive proper care and resources after they get home._

_Now, Joe Biden wants to make it even HARDER by giving away the care our veterans EARNED to illegal criminals._

This is the Biden administration’s most disgusting decision yet, Friend.

The men and women I served with for 20 years in the U.S. Navy put their lives on the line to defend our freedom, and THIS is what they get in return - being refused for illegal criminals who don’t respect our. most basic laws.

**We must take a stand to defend our veterans and give them the care they deserve.**

**I put together a petition DEMANDING that the Biden Administration doesn’t give a SINGLE DOLLAR of Veterans Affairs funds to illegal criminals, and I need every patriot to sign on.**

clean_body: Joe Biden wants to take away medical personnel from the Department of Veterans Affairs to care for illegal immigrants at our southern border. Peter, I can’t believe it. Joe Biden wants to take away medical personnel from the Department of Veterans Affairs to care for illegal immigrants at our southern border. It’s hard enough for veterans to receive proper care and resources after they get home. Now, Joe Biden wants to make it even HARDER by giving away the care our veterans EARNED to illegal criminals. This is the Biden administration’s most disgusting decision yet, Friend. The men and women I served with for 20 years in the U.S. Navy put their lives on the line to defend our freedom, and THIS is what they get in return - being refused for illegal criminals who don’t respect our. most basic laws. We must take a stand to defend our veterans and give them the care they deserve. I put together a petition DEMANDING that the Biden Administration doesn’t give a SINGLE DOLLAR of Veterans Affairs funds to illegal criminals, and I need every patriot to sign on. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. House (VA-10) | | 🇺🇸 COUNTDOWN TO PRIMARY 🇺🇸 Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. name: Max Steiner
subject: A FAIRly good way to engage with voters.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45108223/344503584/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDI0NTUxZS1jOGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1shQ9kGSt50qCJzxh2VUJ3Zxw0WmkzB7A-Hhllt-ivk=)
Hi Friend, I hope you enjoyed the mother's day weekend.

This was the second weekend in a row I spent engaging with voters in the district at the fair. I think it's a great place to meet voters: big crowds, a community-centered atmosphere, and everyone's looking for a little bit of something different._Politics fits the bill!_

Last weekend, I was at the Tehama District Fair from Thursday through Sunday. With the help of the Tehama Country Democrats, we handed out over 1,000 pamphlets and had a large number of really good conversations. People were excited to see a candidate in the flesh "shaking hands and kissing babies." I hope this enthusiasm converts into a few votes in the primary. Tehama is a deep red county, but even (most) Republicans thanked me for getting out, and everyone thanked me for my military service.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45108224/344503585/-96927706?refcode=em-5.9.22-all-a&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDI0NTUxZS1jOGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1shQ9kGSt50qCJzxh2VUJ3Zxw0WmkzB7A-Hhllt-ivk=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45108225/344503586/-96927706?refcode=em-5.9.22-all-a&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDI0NTUxZS1jOGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1shQ9kGSt50qCJzxh2VUJ3Zxw0WmkzB7A-Hhllt-ivk=)
This weekend I attended the Siskiyou County Mother's Day Fair. I also stopped by the NorCal Chainsaw Carving Championship and the Siskiyou Golden Livestock Jackpot Show. I wasn't able to compete with a chainsaw carving competition, but I connected with lots of voters, and I commend the participants who braved the snowy weather.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45108226/344503587/-96927706?refcode=em-5.9.22-all-a&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDI0NTUxZS1jOGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1shQ9kGSt50qCJzxh2VUJ3Zxw0WmkzB7A-Hhllt-ivk=)
I want to thank you for all of your support so far. Fairs are a great (and cheap) way to meet voters, but I still need to reach out through mail, billboards, radio, digital, and TV advertising. This week mail-in ballots for the June Primary officially hit voters' mail boxes in CA-01.

clean_body: | = Hi Friend, I hope you enjoyed the mother's day weekend. This was the second weekend in a row I spent engaging with voters in the district at the fair. I think it's a great place to meet voters: big crowds, a community-centered atmosphere, and everyone's looking for a little bit of something different.Politics fits the bill! Last weekend, I was at the Tehama District Fair from Thursday through Sunday. With the help of the Tehama Country Democrats, we handed out over 1,000 pamphlets and had a large number of really good conversations. People were excited to see a candidate in the flesh "shaking hands and kissing babies." I hope this enthusiasm converts into a few votes in the primary. Tehama is a deep red county, but even (most) Republicans thanked me for getting out, and everyone thanked me for my military service. = = This weekend I attended the Siskiyou County Mother's Day Fair. I also stopped by the NorCal Chainsaw Carving Championship and the Siskiyou Golden Livestock Jackpot Show. I wasn't able to compete with a chainsaw carving competition, but I connected with lots of voters, and I commend the participants who braved the snowy weather. = I want to thank you for all of your support so far. Fairs are a great (and cheap) way to meet voters, but I still need to reach out through mail, billboards, radio, digital, and TV advertising. This week mail-in ballots for the June Primary officially hit voters' mail boxes in CA-01. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for your support spreading the word. Max Steiner Combat Veteran and Democrat for Congress | = Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. body:
With only 8 days until the primary election, we wanted to give you a campaign update.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45108418/344504102/-2143054902?refcode=em_fr_2022.05.09_b1_pa17ra_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjA5NTlkNS1jOGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nP9NMXlt7ftDcm94GUuzgFAPfQwDsyyTJiTizdHOvzg=) Hi Derek,

With only 8 days until the primary election, we wanted to give you an update on what our campaign is up to. [**But first, will you chip in a few dollars to help power our campaign through May 17th and all the way to November?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45108419/344504103/-2143054902?refcode=em_fr_2022.05.09_b1_pa17ra_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjA5NTlkNS1jOGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nP9NMXlt7ftDcm94GUuzgFAPfQwDsyyTJiTizdHOvzg=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45108420/344504104/-2143054902?refcode=em_fr_2022.05.09_b1_pa17ra_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjA5NTlkNS1jOGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nP9NMXlt7ftDcm94GUuzgFAPfQwDsyyTJiTizdHOvzg=)

Chris has been busy traveling the district, attending meet and greets with supporters, and knocking on doors all across Western Pennsylvania to talk to as many voters as possible before the primary.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45108421/344504105/-2143054902?refcode=em_fr_2022.05.09_b1_pa17ra_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjA5NTlkNS1jOGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nP9NMXlt7ftDcm94GUuzgFAPfQwDsyyTJiTizdHOvzg=) _Chris speaking to a packed house of supporters at a Dormont/Lebo Meet and Greet._
We’re building our campaign the old-fashioned way, by having one-on-one conversations with voters about the issues that are important to them. Chris doesn’t pocket large checks (or any checks!) from corporations – [**our voter outreach efforts are powered by supporters like you!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45108422/344504106/-2143054902?refcode=em_fr_2022.05.09_b1_pa17ra_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjA5NTlkNS1jOGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nP9NMXlt7ftDcm94GUuzgFAPfQwDsyyTJiTizdHOvzg=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45108423/344504107/-2143054902?refcode=em_fr_2022.05.09_b1_pa17ra_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjA5NTlkNS1jOGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nP9NMXlt7ftDcm94GUuzgFAPfQwDsyyTJiTizdHOvzg=)
_Rain or shine (well, RAIN!), Chris is knocking on doors._
But while Chris is going door to door to get his message out, Washington Republicans are taking a shortcut. They’re spending millions of dollars to blanket the TV airwaves, spread misinformation, and take over the Commonwealth.

**We need to continue showing voters that Chris is the right leader for PA-17, but[we can only do that with your help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45108424/344504108/-2143054902?refcode=em_fr_2022.05.09_b1_pa17ra_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjA5NTlkNS1jOGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nP9NMXlt7ftDcm94GUuzgFAPfQwDsyyTJiTizdHOvzg=)** He’s a father, voting rights lawyer, Iraq War veteran, and union organizer who has earned endorsements from the Allegheny and Beaver County Democratic Committees as well as countless labor unions and working families. **He’s built a coalition of working people, progressives and moderates, who are ready to fight for a better tomorrow.**

[**Everything is on the line this November, but first we need to crush this primary. If you’re ready to elect a leader who will take on the radical right and fight for hardworking families across Western Pennsylvania, then will you chip in whatever you can afford today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45108425/344504109/-2143054902?refcode=em_fr_2022.05.09_b1_pa17ra_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjA5NTlkNS1jOGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nP9NMXlt7ftDcm94GUuzgFAPfQwDsyyTJiTizdHOvzg=)

clean_body: With only 8 days until the primary election, we wanted to give you a campaign update. | = Hi Derek, With only 8 days until the primary election, we wanted to give you an update on what our campaign is up to. = | = Chris has been busy traveling the district, attending meet and greets with supporters, and knocking on doors all across Western Pennsylvania to talk to as many voters as possible before the primary. = Chris speaking to a packed house of supporters at a Dormont/Lebo Meet and Greet. We’re building our campaign the old-fashioned way, by having one-on-one conversations with voters about the issues that are important to them. Chris doesn’t pocket large checks (or any checks!) from corporations – = = Rain or shine (well, RAIN!), Chris is knocking on doors. But while Chris is going door to door to get his message out, Washington Republicans are taking a shortcut. They’re spending millions of dollars to blanket the TV airwaves, spread misinformation, and take over the Commonwealth. We need to continue showing voters that Chris is the right leader for PA-17, but= He’s a father, voting rights lawyer, Iraq War veteran, and union organizer who has earned endorsements from the Allegheny and Beaver County Democratic Committees as well as countless labor unions and working families. He’s built a coalition of working people, progressives and moderates, who are ready to fight for a better tomorrow. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Team Deluzio | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. name: Team ODP
subject: DeWine and Vance are the biggest threat to reproductive rights in Ohio.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| Team, Last week, Politico reported the Supreme Court is poised to strike down _Roe v. Wade_ , taking away the right to reproductive healthcare and bodily autonomy for millions of women.

**Most Ohioans and Americans believe abortion should remain legal, but that hasn't stopped J.D. Vance, Mike DeWine, and other Ohio Republicans from attacking reproductive rights.**

In 2019, DeWine signed an abortion bill so extreme that a federal judge blocked it from taking effect. If the Supreme Court votes to overturn _Roe_ , DeWine has already said he's ready to revive the bill and do everything he can to restrict reproductive rights.

J.D. Vance has supported abortion bans too. When asked if he would support prohibiting abortion even in cases of rape and incest — he called rape “inconvenient.”

This year’s election could not be more important and come November, we need to reject these attacks on reproductive rights.
