name: Alexis Nielson
subject: Here’s what we’re up against:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Whaley/Stephens
body:
We deserve better than to watch our elected leaders prioritize their wealthy friends’ pocketbooks before our kids’ futures.

Team – it’s Alexis Nielson from Nan Whaley’s campaign for Ohio governor.
As Finance Director, one challenge in particular keeps me up at night: How we counter the heavy spending that Mike DeWine and his special interest allies will be pouring into this race.
We know that Mike DeWine can’t compete on his record. His tenure in office has been plagued by corruption and a refusal to put Ohioans first.
But we also know that he’s willing to do anything to win – including spending millions of dollars of his own money, as he did in 2018.
**We have to be ready to counter DeWine’s personal wealth and his special interest allies – and we need your help. That’s why we’ve set a goal of raising $15,000 online this week to kick off the general election.**
**[Please, chip in $5 to elect Nan Whaley as our next governor of Ohio right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45109413/344508344/-774306087?refcode=nw_em_220509_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDFjMmQ4ZC1jYWNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fkVlH5oIAJPwN6Lp9GpaWINPx3Yc-effOqsD_ZH5y0=)**
These goals aren’t just arbitrary. They’re critical to ensure we’ll have the resources we need to take on a corrupt GOP machine that has been in power for too long.
We know it’s going to take every single one of us pitching in to take on Mike DeWine and his deep-pocketed friends. They’re going to throw everything they’ve got at us – so we have to be ready.
**[I’m heading to a meeting with Nan shortly, and I’d love to report that we’re on track to hit our goals and kick off the fight against Mike DeWine. Will you give $5 right now to flip Ohio?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45109414/344508345/-774306087?refcode=nw_em_220509_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDFjMmQ4ZC1jYWNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fkVlH5oIAJPwN6Lp9GpaWINPx3Yc-effOqsD_ZH5y0=)**
Thank you,
Alexis Nielson
Finance Director
Friends of Nan Whaley

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45109415/344508346/-774306087?refcode=nw_em_220509_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDFjMmQ4ZC1jYWNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fkVlH5oIAJPwN6Lp9GpaWINPx3Yc-effOqsD_ZH5y0=)****

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress**
body:
Help us get rid of MTG!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45109441/344508489/-744162797?refcode=EM_FR_2205096MonthsOut_N_Holly4Congress_90do_9_N_TESTA_LOGO&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzQ5NTlhMS1jYWNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n9tvr4-kwl9cN_BBOcTlaw6cN7-vejgJrs9mvmq5pB4=)
Peter,
Can you believe that in less than 6 months, we can finally kick Marjorie Taylor Greene out of Congress?
**_Well, we can – but only with your help!_**
Marge has been an absolute disaster as a congresswoman. Her failures are too long to list in just one email. But with your help, we can end this embarrassment to Northwest Georgia and the entire U.S.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: June 7 California jungle primary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| June 7th is California’s jungle primary. I'll be appearing on the ballot for the first time in my new district.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=240%2E5257348%2EEcwUXn)
Derek,
County elections offices are mailing ballots today across California, and let me tell you why I’m particularly focused on that.
June 7th is California’s jungle primary. I'll be appearing on the ballot for the first time in my new district. For the next 29 days, tens of thousands of new voters who have never seen me on their ballot before will go to choose among 9 candidates — and my name will appear alongside Republicans, Independents, and other Democrats.
With Fox News, the right-wing media circus, and my leading GOP opponent’s endorsers — Trump allies Roger Stone and Mike Flynn — spreading heaps of misinformation about me, it’s critical that I reach every voter possible to share the truth about our campaign and ensure every voter knows I’ve got their back.
With the sheer number of new voters I need to reach through our grassroots campaign, my team and I have our work cut out for ourselves.
That's why I'm asking you to make a weekly recurring contribution of just $5 for the next four weeks between now and the primary election on June 7th. Just for these four weeks, knowing we can count on your $5 weekly donation will help us print flyers, knock on doors, mobilize voters, and so much more.
**[Derek, can you make a weekly recurring donation of $5 to our campaign? Your support is the fuel for our people-powered movement to defend our democracy.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_recurring?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20220509_AM1_V1_S1&email=&recurring=true&t=4&refcode2=240_5257348_EcwUXn&akid=240%2E5257348%2EEcwUXn)**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Fighting for the lives of the unborn
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6989%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=tnoGh31%2bvA%2fHiNqYfygFxw&sysid=1)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten--or ignored--some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61814%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OKwQd%2b1DJmZggOAyZwLNkw&sysid=1)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61825%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MNVjcClVTRM1j%2fQMce0pmg&sysid=1) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61826%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6CwcXAXI75oJhUnRquSBhQ&sysid=1) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---

clean_body: I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. | | | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten--or ignored--some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive. Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: TPPA Weekly Call to Action: May 9th
body:
| | | |
---
---
This week, we need to contact the White House, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer about the Supreme Court leak. On one hand, they have not denounced the leak or the harassment campaign that began over the weekend, and simultaneously, the things they are saying are dangerous and reckless. Additionally, we are working with other organizations to build a grassroots campaign against the Biden administration’s efforts to use taxpayer-funded government institutions to sway elections. The campaign opposing this is not yet up and running, but we want you to prepare for this fight by [**reading this primer.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._t9xrGwv7Lyc-SaDg) Finally, please consider completing our ongoing, previous campaigns either for the first time or again (if you already completed them), because the AlignAct system allows you to do it again and again and again. And, the more we push, the more likely we are to get what we want. So, if you’ve got a few extra minutes this week, please go back to the old action items and do them again – or for the first time, if you hadn’t done them yet. _Note: Occasionally, we receive an email from someone who has a technical issue with the AlignAct platform. Please continue to email us to let us know. We forward those issues on to the developers, so they can fix the problem._
---
|
---
| | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.--GA)
---
The unprecedented leak of the Supreme Court’s draft decision on the abortion case that would effectively overturn Roe v. Wade should have united all sides and all parties. While disagreeing on the decision, everyone should have been able to condemn the leak, and most certainly should have condemned calls for doxxing and violence against the Justices who would be voting to overturn Roe v. Wade. This is not what happened. Biden has yet to denounce the leak itself, or clearly oppose the doxxing and harassment of conservative Justices. [**Use our AlignAct campaign**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) to tell Biden, Pelosi, and Schumer that they must condemn the leak and the threats against the Justices, and stand for the integrity of our court and the safety of all Supreme Court Justices.
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | Nina Jankowicz, head of the Biden administration’s newly created “Disinformation” board, has recently come under [scrutiny](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MzAyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/MX5CBmmQGeHWLS27bEWqZw) for her history of [peddling](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MzAyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/6IzFHLW4xQKaCy45Q3Of2g) her own misinformation, such as trying to discredit the Hunter Biden laptop story. She has also signaled her contempt for "free speech absolutists” on digital platforms. Meanwhile, the [Delaware computer repairman](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) who blew the whistle on [Hunter Biden’s laptop](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MzAyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/n3jDzk3htcsjmEm28DDKZg) filed a multi-million-dollar defamation suit last week against Democratic Rep. Adam Schiff, CNN, The Daily Beast and Politico, saying they falsely accused him of peddling Russian disinformation. Instead of creating sinister government groups to police free speech, the Biden administration [should look in the mirror](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MzAyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/Hd9b_O7UJ_5EU3W3MFH-gA) when it comes to promoting disinformation.
---
| | |
---
**Other Active Campaigns** **Shut Down the Disinformation Governance Board NOW** Department of Homeland Security (DHS) Secretary Mayorkas recently divulged the creation of a new “Disinformation Governance Board,” housed within DHS. Yes, this is George Orwell’s “Ministry of Truth” come to life in America today. But this is a hill to die on. We cannot allow this Board to exist. [**Use our AlignAct campaign**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MzAyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/yUPik78mKdmiBy069mM4mA) and help us bombard DC with emails, phone calls, and tweets. We will not rest until this has been defunded, shut down, never to be created again. **The CDC Has No Mandate Authority!** Last week’s ruling on the travel mask mandate was fantastic. However, the White House is now appealing it, trying to argue that the CDC did have the power to impose it, because they don’t want the decision to set precedent. It’s obvious that the CDC never had this power, so [**use our campaign to let them know it is time to back off and drop their appeal!**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) **Secure our Border NOW!** [**Use our AlignAct campaign**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) to quickly and easily contact five Democrat Senators who have publicly opposed Biden’s plan to end Title 42, but who aren’t taking action to protect our border.
---
|
---
| | Officials in Blue states [are using money](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) from the American Rescue Plan, which was billed as emergency relief, to fund programs that teach key tenants of Critical Race Theory in schools. These funds are being sent to states through a program called the Elementary and Secondary School Emergency Relief Fund, which the American Rescue Plan created. In California, $1.5 billion is being spent on training school staffers on topics, including "implicit bias training." Similarly, New York received $9 billion and is spending some of those funds on "putting DEI at the heart of NYSED's work with LEAs." At least ten other states plan to use these funds on aspects of CRT. This abusive use of taxpayer dollars was made possible by the Biden administration's unwillingness to hold states accountable for how they spend American Rescue Plan funds.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
**Get ready for your local and state primary election** If you need to still go over our primary election preparation to-do list, you can still view it on [**our previous call to action**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-NpwZW3R-6dRCK9-A)**.**
---
|
---
| | American minority voters favor bold action on the US-Mexico border. [According to a new survey](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-H18ow), over two-thirds of likely Hispanic American voters support a temporary closure of the southern border in response to a rise in illegal immigration and drug and human trafficking. The poll conducted by the Trafalgar Group and Convention of States Action also reports that nearly 40% of black voters support a total border shutdown until the problems there are solved. Convention of States Action president Mark Meckler notes that “The fact that a majority of American voters, including nearly two-thirds of Hispanic voters, want to take the drastic step of temporarily closing our southern border shows that Americans see the impending disaster we face if the border crisis goes unchecked.”
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMjktMWViNDg1NTAxOWVkNGQ0MzhlODFkODY3NDQ3ZGYyOTciLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTYiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy9kb25hdGU_bWlkPTQ1MzAyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/bb0BqMvIF4jc8M4LC4npMA)
---
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMjktMWViNDg1NTAxOWVkNGQ0MzhlODFkODY3NDQ3ZGYyOTciLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTciLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy8_bWlkPTQ1MzAyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/Uu3kwPe40olED59OIqfYeQ)

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Here’s what we can do next to protect abortion access:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
This is a dire moment in the fight to defend abortion rights and reproductive care.
#
Peter,
Last week, a leaked Supreme Court draft opinion revealed that the Court may overturn Roe v. Wade.
This is a dire moment in the fight to defend abortion rights and reproductive care.
However, I want you to know that there are a number of ways to take action _today_.
It’s going to take collective action to defend Roe v. Wade.
Every day, dollar, and voice is going to be critical – which means it’s more important than ever that we’re supporting pro-choice candidates and supporting organizations like EMILY’s List that are leading the charge to defend Roe.
**[Please, will you rush in a $5 contribution now to EMILY’s List and my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45109727/344510279/2030580990?refcode=dd_em_220509_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzg1ODFkNi1jY2NmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4qmpgQ9C3vYwlfDfSPRh-jdf1ypHSDDafM4We2U2nVQ=)**
Unfortunately, this is the culmination of a decades-long attempt by extreme Republicans to turn back the clock on fundamental rights. But this fight is far from over. I’m not backing down – and neither should you.
**[Right now, your support matters. Rush in $5, or whatever you can spare, now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45109729/344510281/2030580990?refcode=dd_em_220509_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzg1ODFkNi1jY2NmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4qmpgQ9C3vYwlfDfSPRh-jdf1ypHSDDafM4We2U2nVQ=)**
I’ll continue to be in touch on ways we can protect settled law and established reproductive rights in the coming weeks.
My best,
Dick Durbin

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45109731/344510283/2030580990?refcode=dd_em_220509_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzg1ODFkNi1jY2NmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4qmpgQ9C3vYwlfDfSPRh-jdf1ypHSDDafM4We2U2nVQ=)****

clean_body: This is a dire moment in the fight to defend abortion rights and reproductive care. Peter, Last week, a leaked Supreme Court draft opinion revealed that the Court may overturn Roe v. Wade. This is a dire moment in the fight to defend abortion rights and reproductive care. However, I want you to know that there are a number of ways to take action today. It’s going to take collective action to defend Roe v. Wade. Every day, dollar, and voice is going to be critical – which means it’s more important than ever that we’re supporting pro-choice candidates and supporting organizations like EMILY’s List that are leading the charge to defend Roe. = Unfortunately, this is the culmination of a decades-long attempt by extreme Republicans to turn back the clock on fundamental rights. But this fight is far from over. I’m not backing down – and neither should you. = I’ll continue to be in touch on ways we can protect settled law and established reproductive rights in the coming weeks. My best, Dick Durbin **= Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

body:
It is incredible that we are now under 6 months away from the day that we are going to defeat Elise Stefanik. My team and I are working around the clock to make sure no opportunity is missed in getting out into the community, meeting with voters, and amplifying the concerns of our constituents.
| **We are 6 months out until Election Day.**
It is incredible that we are now under 6 months away from the day that we are going to defeat Elise Stefanik. My team and I are working around the clock to make sure no opportunity is missed in getting out into the community, meeting with voters, and amplifying the concerns of our constituents.

It’s a full sprint until Election Day and we cannot slow down over the next six months if we want to win in November.

**Now more than ever, with Congressional maps in the process of being redrawn, we need to remain focused on our ultimate goal: defeating Elise Stefanik. name: Team BWC
subject: the future of Roe is uncertain at best
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
| Bonnie reached out to you on Tuesday after the draft Supreme Court opinion leaked because the future of _Roe_ is uncertain at best and we need to do everything in our power to protection abortion rights.

[Read Bonnie’s message, then click here to split a donation between abortion funds across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45109890/344511078/-1348740862?refcode=BWC_EM_OT_4MO_20220509_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzZjMjZhMi1jZGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=efVsubcwBsnLhmfCr6L_f5eYxoHXDRnoyJGIhcwtRQg=)
* * *
**_Bonnie’s Original Message:_**

Last night’s news was devastating. Reading that draft opinion overturning _Roe v. Wade_ and _Planned Parenthood v. Casey_ was heart-wrenching and terrifying.

Reproductive freedom is on the line, and we cannot afford to sit back and watch our rights disappear. [Click here to split a $10 donation between dozens of abortion funds across the country:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45109891/344511079/-1348740862?refcode=BWC_EM_OT_4MO_20220509_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzZjMjZhMi1jZGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=efVsubcwBsnLhmfCr6L_f5eYxoHXDRnoyJGIhcwtRQg=) [PROTECT ABORTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45109892/344511080/-1348740862?refcode=BWC_EM_OT_4MO_20220509_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzZjMjZhMi1jZGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=efVsubcwBsnLhmfCr6L_f5eYxoHXDRnoyJGIhcwtRQg=) The Supreme Court is threatening to take us back nearly half a century and endanger the lives of millions.

I refuse to stay silent. I will not back down until abortion rights are codified into national law and _everyone_ has access to the reproductive healthcare they need.

This is a make-or-break moment in our country. We can pass landmark legislation to make Roe a part of federal law, or we can sit back and let Republican legislatures erase abortion rights state by state. Personally, I’d choose the former.

[For now, support abortion funds across the state by donating here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45109893/344511081/-1348740862?refcode=BWC_EM_OT_4MO_20220509_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzZjMjZhMi1jZGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=efVsubcwBsnLhmfCr6L_f5eYxoHXDRnoyJGIhcwtRQg=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45109894/344511082/-1348740862?refcode=BWC_EM_OT_4MO_20220509_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzZjMjZhMi1jZGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=efVsubcwBsnLhmfCr6L_f5eYxoHXDRnoyJGIhcwtRQg=) Thank you,

Bonnie

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Tell Tale Signs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
The Woker Identity [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9059%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=3kq5QS%2bOLBjHH2sDmbfIIg&sysid=1)
The Woker Identity

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c21795%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UG34bBONhCIX4s01l7QXAw&sysid=1)
---

Folks,

I have compiled a list of my three tell-tale signs to spot a Woker in the wild...
1. They will eat food only fit for rabbits
2. They always enter a swimming pool by the stairs
3. And they don’t believe in free speech.

| [**AGREED! RUSH A DONATION TO STOP THE WOKERS**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c21796%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZkHI4yfdRjs9q2avnnZ3Rg&sysid=1)
---

They like to pretend that The Woke Identity is so complex and hard to figure out...but it’s not.

They want any opinion differing from theirs censored, erased, and struck from the record. Unfortunately for them, we live in The United States of America and are promised free and protected speech as citizens of the greatest country in the world.

**We must protect freedom of speech.[Are you with me?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c21797%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9B6ykeM3mW90yGt1PeFAhA&sysid=1)**
[**RUSH $500 FOR FREE SPEECH**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c21798%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f71xHDO70BbMMfiXgvQcCw&sysid=1)

---

---
[**RUSH $50 FOR FREE SPEECH**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c21791%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bcMyIhVmPKU5KOuYwD5NKA&sysid=1)
---
[**RUSH $25 FOR FREE SPEECH**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c21792%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BltNY9AsQ%2fi6%2faas8jpYVg&sysid=1)
---

Thanks for always fighting alongside me.

God bless,

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c21795%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UG34bBONhCIX4s01l7QXAw&sysid=1)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: We're nearing the end...
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=90bb3b5ee39a0931e6ae8c94ad4da79b5606c5dd9e4a96efb76bbcec67ef16d386e22b11dd60450fd331df6c2ad49174ad728905ac5a7eb643427643f67bfc686f480e0fbe45370fe77a827e392addeb

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4929bd4c210bec3e0b688cf4d729d67f766aaa6620938c19c3a1f58b22d5ebdf2584b1d93c0c6d8ccee55436f8cbb7b0b128722fa2a12e76

Peter,

In just six months, Floridians across the state will take to the polls to have their voices heard at the ballot box. All the work we have done to ensure a free future for Florida is on the line.

Here are SIX ways we have fought for you and your family during my first term as Governor:

✅ Kept Florida free by rejecting Faucian lockdown policies and protecting liberty, jobs, businesses, and in-person education.

✅ Ensured the integrity of our elections by banning ballot harvesting, strengthening voter ID, eliminating unsecured "drop boxes," and prohibiting "Zuckerbucks."

✅ Enacted retention and recruitment bonuses for law enforcement officers and signed legislation prohibiting local governments from defunding the police.

✅ Signed legislation banning sanctuary cities and deployed state law enforcement assets to assist Texas at the southern border.

✅ Signed the largest tax relief package in Florida history and accumulated the largest budget surplus ever recorded.

✅ Enacted the largest expansion of school choice in the nation, signed the Parental Bill of Rights into law, and created new opportunities for workforce education and skilled trades.

If you want these policies — and more — to continue in Florida,
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4929bd4c210bec3e0b688cf4d729d67f766aaa6620938c19c3a1f58b22d5ebdf2584b1d93c0c6d8ccee55436f8cbb7b0b128722fa2a12e76

Ron DeSantis

name: Alek
subject: I've got 8 days. Please don't delete this.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
My primary is in just 8 days and to be completely honest, it's not looking good for us. It’s not looking good for us. We’re short $10,000 and running I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=255f5d822000405b9118f19cf3212751&_e=clY7JcLbqaZ2ul35TmPY6XMhMkbs4kBgCVQMAwYba9AaMfrJ-pYVdCTJeKLWQ0vOIvgNaG3EF1CPdVfOvwjhBAASzTDOI0m5gDf7DyzCOER58hESnMDB0eLAGJ6b72RUj8mEh908Yd_TfH1gZXkHTgEvjB90ntb-dQqDdRSe0r0YN3RBMmy7xGfNDcbZUM5b996bnH4MsoiHx8EdzwV_Cm5zqfuuiHA4seK3nWtprw3caan5Fi7VgrzB7b0tw27HgpY8OwEank39y2EmaUQ-Lm8S3AIXCCcBbLalYxBRvyCb73hZHyiIDl969wpmcPShyKfkoBoPZqGGpxk8FjheVv_MgU4lWp2TWd7N-_CWlARBUklcIHHDLv1ngURGZxRl0nfVtp_WExrhonnMFdlVeTnzry0D-L6wl_NDAQEtUlxdL1amE9GocdutMblewuan8e9eujQRElzRoNQMBa5RiQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

Hope you had a great weekend and if you celebrated Mother’s Day, I sincerely hope it was a special day for you.

**With my primary in just 8 days,** me and the team here in Oregon worked through the weekend knocking on doors, making phone calls, and going through the budget to make sure we have enough cash on hand to get through the primary next Tuesday.

The short of it is that we don’t. While we’ve been sending emails asking for support, our calls for help have rang hollow.

It’s not looking good for us. We’re short $10,000 and running out of time to raise what we need to put ourselves back in prime financial shape.**[Nancy Pelosi has more than $99 million in cash reserves she’s intending to use to hold onto control of the House – and she’s earmarked more than $ 3million to defeat me and the slate of candidates here in Oregon. ](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=255f5d822000405b9118f19cf3212751&_e=clY7JcLbqaZ2ul35TmPY6XMhMkbs4kBgCVQMAwYba9AaMfrJ-pYVdCTJeKLWQ0vOIvgNaG3EF1CPdVfOvwjhBAASzTDOI0m5gDf7DyzCOER58hESnMDB0eLAGJ6b72RUj8mEh908Yd_TfH1gZXkHTgEvjB90ntb-dQqDdRSe0r0YN3RBMmy7xGfNDcbZUM5b996bnH4MsoiHx8EdzwV_Cm5zqfuuiHA4seK3nWtprw3caan5Fi7VgrzB7b0tw27HqF9nr0eV1mhRY5naG1Bl-YPUNCRIsge8H-CLMw_ySh5H2e4fpf-I9cnuYaolfvRykDHS5dWaS00uY3WLYQXkwyWEVX-eGEm6DjDaxEnxSBXpqn2XKnjnTNv-hjVKnDHREUtwfik_8fx7JLs2XH2hbotORyqu9hXAth4Y763H3euf3HkstlFwBoLCFcclamUvzMXAP1ZBDljtFji6Lf716Q%3D%3D)**

**So, Peter, we continue to email not to annoy you, but to build support ahead of my primary that will occur in 8 days’ time. **

**[Would you kindly make a donation of just $7.00 right now?](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=255f5d822000405b9118f19cf3212751&_e=clY7JcLbqaZ2ul35TmPY6XMhMkbs4kBgCVQMAwYba9AaMfrJ-pYVdCTJeKLWQ0vOIvgNaG3EF1CPdVfOvwjhBAASzTDOI0m5gDf7DyzCOER58hESnMDB0eLAGJ6b72RUj8mEh908Yd_TfH1gZXkHTgEvjB90ntb-dQqDdRSe0r0YN3RBMmy7xGfNDcbZUM5b996bnH4MsoiHx8EdzwV_Cm5zqfuuiHA4seK3nWtprw3caan5Fi7VgrzB7b0tw27H6eGfpUrj-x9Pvc4twd9M8N430u1tHK2vyunSNMF3yI47EhVILmbCunEzFMRG7XtftLbLYctmb8HtriP5gCz-VYLhMxw0SjjkGB1xWxempvV7k6j-dPiix8kG4Gdg534po5ZywRPIc4yBzKUVxR5B7UVGxmFuwQ0A1916D8ktXSeB0gGTso_6aZnwkvl2fXS-HN1DtL4A4eaW9YaUvUPFwg%3D%3D)** We need two conservatives to step up and each make a donation of $7.00 before the top of the next hour to stay on track toward reaching our goal of raising $377 today.

clean_body: My primary is in just 8 days and to be completely honest, it's not looking good for us. It’s not looking good for us. We’re short $10,000 and running I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, Hope you had a great weekend and if you celebrated Mother’s Day, I sincerely hope it was a special day for you. With my primary in just 8 days, me and the team here in Oregon worked through the weekend knocking on doors, making phone calls, and going through the budget to make sure we have enough cash on hand to get through the primary next Tuesday. The short of it is that we don’t. While we’ve been sending emails asking for support, our calls for help have rang hollow. It’s not looking good for us. We’re short $10,000 and running out of time to raise what we need to put ourselves back in prime financial shape. So, Peter, we continue to email not to annoy you, but to build support ahead of my primary that will occur in 8 days’ time. We need two conservatives to step up and each make a donation of $7.00 before the top of the next hour to stay on track toward reaching our goal of raising $377 today. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | With sincere thanks, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: The only way to overcome this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We have to get really serious about political power.
We got some tough news last Monday night when we learned that the Supreme Court is readying to overturn _Roe v. Wade_.
Since Texas has a “trigger ban” in place, this decision will completely ban abortion in our state, without exception for rape or incest. But we have an opportunity to channel our frustration and anger into action, and ultimately into victory. We must do so because winning political power is the only way to meet this challenge — the only way to overcome this crisis.
As governor, I will do everything in my power to guarantee that women have control over their own bodies, their own health care, their own futures. But, in order to win, I need your support to defeat Greg Abbott in November.
[ Will you make a contribution to help me defeat Greg Abbott in November so I can fight to protect the right to abortion care in Texas?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220509-1?refcode=ema20220509-188549&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=188549_444211_WwBqCx&akid=188549%2E444211%2EWwBqCx)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220509-1?refcode=ema20220509-188549&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=188549_444211_WwBqCx&akid=188549%2E444211%2EWwBqCx)**
These extreme attacks on abortion have never been about life. If it were about life, then the current Texas governor wouldn’t allow so many kids to die in the foster care system in Texas — the worst run foster care program in the United States. This is about control. And this is about power.
Our side — the side of the people who believe in democracy, the constitution, and the rights of our fellow Americans — has to get serious about political power. It’s on us, the people of Texas. We must do everything in our power to organize, win, and protect reproductive health care.
I will fight for every person’s freedom to control their own health care, their own body, their own future. I need you in this fight with me to protect reproductive rights in Texas.
[ Please, make a $3 contribution to our campaign and help me defeat an extremist governor who is actively tearing away people’s reproductive freedom.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220509-1?refcode=ema20220509-188549&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=188549_444211_WwBqCx&akid=188549%2E444211%2EWwBqCx)
With your support, I know that we can win this race.
Thank you,
Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220509-188549-footer&t=22&refcode2=188549_444211_WwBqCx&akid=188549%2E444211%2EWwBqCx)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=188549%2E444211%2EWwBqCx)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Vernon Jones for Congress
subject: Vernon Jones to Host Viewing of 2000 Mules in Greensboro
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jones for Georgia JonesforGeorgia
body:
| | | | | |
---
|
---
| |
---
| Vernon Jones to Host Viewing of 2000 Mules in Greensboro
---
|
---
| Greensboro, GA (May 9, 2022) - Vernon Jones will be hosting a viewing of Dinesh D'Souza's new film 2000 Mules at the PARKSIDE MAIN 8 THEATRE in Greensboro next Thursday, May 19th at 6:30PM for $5.
"I cannot wait to share this movie with the citizens of Georgia's 10th Congressional District. When I saw it at Mar-a-Lago last week, I was shocked at how blatant the fraud was in the 2020 election, and in Georgia in particular. Georgians need to see how weak leadership knuckled under and stood idly by while our election was stolen in broad daylight."
[CLICK HERE TO RSVP](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z-ainNhKw1ZGtlnQUevjQeWLHN0eqa-_D9uAaVnEnfuccEjCO5czDeYi9nm6ixf0ov1Tc066ghtqM_Kivn92PO5rgQ6OtToL_Mo5fe6JzFBQU95AEIG8pgX1T1lelxQXmcIdqARM2skb4mnpJMFbAZnmR8NkXX4c_Y7dWjXkmnnZkkd0w0NCrB8iAUOIIZdhpPvMg31HbtI=&c=T-cPNTiAc8FDBqNa0aDZT5nVdvGnqOH6WZY2D_c-6QrogIIc_eDIww==&ch=v4uFq33yUTyGmACQWrKICfM_OxK9-zG8DTJs2kBn_kchKJHmBRb5Pw==)
---
| About Vernon Jones
---
| Vernon Jones is running for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Democrat, Jones officially switched parties in January 2021 after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and speaking at the 2020 Republican National Convention. The proud Republican is now running in GA10, as a Pro-Trump candidate who will fight for free and fair elections, and always put Georgia and America First.
---
---
|
---
|

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Vernon Jones to Host Viewing of 2000 Mules in Greensboro | | Greensboro, GA (May 9, 2022) - Vernon Jones will be hosting a viewing of Dinesh D'Souza's new film 2000 Mules at the PARKSIDE MAIN 8 THEATRE in Greensboro next Thursday, May 19th at 6:30PM for $5. "I cannot wait to share this movie with the citizens of Georgia's 10th Congressional District. When I saw it at Mar-a-Lago last week, I was shocked at how blatant the fraud was in the 2020 election, and in Georgia in particular. Georgians need to see how weak leadership knuckled under and stood idly by while our election was stolen in broad daylight." == | About Vernon Jones | Vernon Jones is running for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Democrat, Jones officially switched parties in January 2021 after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and speaking at the 2020 Republican National Convention. The proud Republican is now running in GA10, as a Pro-Trump candidate who will fight for free and fair elections, and always put Georgia and America First. | | | | | | | == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- | Paid for by Jones for Georgia JonesforGeorgia.com | | | | | | | Vernon Jones for Congress | PO Box 581, Watkinsville, GA 30677 | | == Sent by mailto:vernonjonespress@jonesforgeorgia.com powered by == ==

name: Team Crispi
subject: Crispi Accepts 2nd Debate with Smith

body:
| |
---
[](https://103086.io.directiq12.com/hit?sid=2lowz0tn6ezzkfdyr1&linkid=0&link=c3b170428470480f942f4c81e09e8fbb)
---
| **Crispi Accepts Second Debate with Smith**
**Will Smith Take a Stand on Tough Issues** **Seaside Park, NJ -** America First Republican Mike Crispi today accepted a second debate invitation -- this time from NJ101.5 host Bill Spadea who has offered to host the debate between Crispi and 42-year incumbent Chris Smith prior to the June 7 Republican Primary election. "It's critical that the people of the Fourth Congressional District hear from us on the issues we feel very differently about," Crispi said. "He's been there for 42 years, so it should be really easy for him to answer questions from the moderators and debate an opponent like me who has never held elective office." Crispi previously accepted an invitation from the League of Women Voters to debate Smith and work around his congressional obligations in scheduling the event. But Smith has failed to even acknowledge their invitation. Among the questions Smith hasn't answered for yet: \- Does he agree with his leading supporter Kevin McCarthy that the impeachment of Joe Biden should be off the table? \- Will he reject the next omnibus spending bill if it includes expanded funding for abortion through Title X Family Planning and the United Nations Population Fund? \- Will he return the money he's taken from pharmaceutical companies that perform grotesque research on fetal tissue taken from aborted infants? \- Why is he co-sponsoring anti-Second Amendment legislation with Adam Schiff and AOC? \- Why hasn't Smith signed on to the Religious Freedom Over Mandates Act, (HR 6502), which would prohibit the use of federal dollars to collect information about someone's religious beliefs. "My team of America First Republicans is the only team to stand united in complete support for the right to life, the Second Amendment, and medical freedom," Crispi said. "Why is Congressman Smith unwilling to account for his record?" \- 30 - [www.MikeCrispi.com](https://103086.io.directiq12.com/hit?sid=2lowz0tn6ezzkfdyr1&linkid=1&link=805b5764ed6a461fa44116b990e331f7)
---

name: Giffords.org
subject: Las Vegas, Orlando, Newtown…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
You probably recognize the list above. They are some of the deadliest mass shootings in American history.
#

Friends -
Las Vegas, 2017
Orlando, 2016
Newtown, 2012
Sutherland Springs, 2017
El Paso, 2019
Parkland, 2018
San Bernardino, 2015
You probably recognize the list above. They are some of the deadliest mass shootings in American history.
These incidents receive the lion’s share of media attention. And it probably won’t surprise you to learn there is a huge uptick in donations to Giffords after they happen.
But our work to make our communities safer from gun violence continues day in, and day out—even when gun violence doesn’t make the headlines.
And it’s in those times—when the issue is NOT in the news— that we need your support the most. We won’t stop until we end our national gun violence crisis. So we’re hoping today is a day you can step up to support our work:

We’ll put your donation right to work helping to confirm a new ATF Director, and helping pass a number of state laws that will not only save lives, but may prevent the next tragedy.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may22?refcode=em220509-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1978_3935704_oJxYMm&akid=1978%2E3935704%2EoJxYMm)

body:
Republican Attorneys General are standing tall for free speech. | | | [ ](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=097016da2e&e=edf8a4d16d)
---
| Friend,

In Biden's America, none of our constitutional freedoms are safe -
and our First Amendment right to free speech is _under attack_ by his out-of-control administration.

We've seen how Big Tech corporations have carried water for the Democratic Party - censoring conservative voices and suppressing Hunter Biden's laptop charade.

Now, Democrats are vying for even greater control over the public square - and Biden's new dystopian "Disinformation Governance Board" is an authoritarian assault on the principles of free speech and fair elections.

_**Republican Attorneys General are fighting back.**_
---
| [ ](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=dcbd4d0e0b&e=edf8a4d16d)

---
| Attorneys General Jeff Landry of Louisiana and Eric Schmitt of Missouri have filed suit against the Biden Administation for ["pressuring and colluding" with social media giants](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=d8cf9894b5&e=edf8a4d16d) to rig the game against Republicans.
---
| | "Big Tech has become an extension of Biden’s Big Government, and neither are protecting the freedoms of Americans; rather, they are suppressing truth and demonizing those who think differently."

**_Attorney General Jeff Landry_**
---
| With his poll numbers continuing to plummet and conservative Americans more engaged than ever, **Biden is abusing his power** to undermine dissenting views and turn social media platforms into state-run propaganda for a failed liberal agenda.

**On the frontlines in the fight for free speech, Republican Attorneys General need your help to hold Biden accountable **\- [**click here to rush a contribution of $10, $25, $50 or more**](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=d75dbfcfdb&e=edf8a4d16d) \-->

Hello,
When Donald Trump was elected, I submitted my request to retire from the U.S. Navy after nearly 4 decades of military service. I never expected I’d one day run for office, but I felt called to continue to serve in whatever way was most meaningful.
People told me to prepare myself – to prepare my family – for what lay ahead. They warned me of the nasty attacks, that politics is a ‘blood sport.’ **I never thought a Super PAC would run over a million dollars in TV ads attacking me for serving in the U.S. Navy, but that’s exactly what happened.**
They tried to say that because my military service took me and my family from state-to-state, from country-to-country, that I somehow wasn’t an Iowan anymore. They pretended my upbringing in rural, northwest Iowa never happened. They ignored the sacrifices that my wife, my kids, and my family made in my service.
**And worst of all, they attacked and denigrated every servicemember and every military family that has to pack up, change schools, say goodbye to friends, and sometimes spend holidays thousands of miles away from each other.**
This time, I’m taking on an even greater challenge. And in my campaign to defeat Republican Senator Chuck Grassley, things are going to get even nastier. I am sure of it, because control of the Senate hinges on our race and whether or not we can turn Iowa blue.
**In order to be ready to fight back, we need to raise another $65,000 before midnight tonight, but right now, we’re still falling pretty short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if we’re going to have the resources we need to win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**
[**I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important: Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to my campaign – every dollar you can afford before our critical fundraising deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45110599/344514893/-42398318?refcode=em20220509mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDMzNjkwNi1kMmNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XWTjSx0WK0RwpZAnBs6C0tDmPCy2MkKMJJDAumzl260=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Richard=20Painter?=
subject: Let’s expand the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RICHARD PAINTER FOR CONGRESS**
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend, Reform of the Supreme Court is needed, and in Congress I will get it done. The U.S. House has the power, under the Constitution, to pass a law that establishes an ethics code for the Supreme Court and determines the number of sitting justices. I will introduce a bill, the Judicial Procedures Reform Bill of 2022, that will prohibit conflicts of interest for justices, prohibit justices from trading in individual stocks and increase the number of justices to thirteen or fifteen to help the Court better reflect the diverse citizenry of our great Country. As set forth in the Constitution, each new Justice will have to be nominated by the president and confirmed by the Senate. The Founders intended for Congress to have the power to set these and other basic benchmarks for the federal judiciary. The size of the Court has not always been nine and the Founders intended for Congress to set the number by statute. A country of 330 million citizens deserves a court that reflects our demographic diversity. The present Court does not do that. With recent ethics scandals in the Court, including the unauthorized leak of a draft opinion that would overrule 49 years of precedent and take away women's right to choose, the time has come to fix these problems and restore to the Court the integrity and credibility that it once had. [To reform the Supreme Court, I need your help. If you can, please chip in today $5, $25, $50, $100 or $250. Your contribution will help us get our message out on judicial reform and take us one step closer to victory.](https://gmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b5e28d948d577e19f5422e846&id=20ca3bd571&e=8914b14955) Your support is greatly appreciated! Thank you, Richard.

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friend, Reform of the Supreme Court is needed, and in Congress I will get it done. The U.S. House has the power, under the Constitution, to pass a law that establishes an ethics code for the Supreme Court and determines the number of sitting justices. I will introduce a bill, the Judicial Procedures Reform Bill of 2022, that will prohibit conflicts of interest for justices, prohibit justices from trading in individual stocks and increase the number of justices to thirteen or fifteen to help the Court better reflect the diverse citizenry of our great Country. As set forth in the Constitution, each new Justice will have to be nominated by the president and confirmed by the Senate. The Founders intended for Congress to have the power to set these and other basic benchmarks for the federal judiciary. The size of the Court has not always been nine and the Founders intended for Congress to set the number by statute. A country of 330 million citizens deserves a court that reflects our demographic diversity. The present Court does not do that. With recent ethics scandals in the Court, including the unauthorized leak of a draft opinion that would overrule 49 years of precedent and take away women's right to choose, the time has come to fix these problems and restore to the Court the integrity and credibility that it once had. Your support is greatly appreciated! Thank you, Richard. | | | "Contribute" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Richard Painter for US Congress, All rights reserved.

body:
I am the ONLY adult in this race |

| | Friend,

My opponents in this race are focused on who is the most “Pro-Trump”.

**While we all miss President Trump’s policies** and wish he was still in the White House, I am focused on today's issues that are hurting the people of Georgia.

_Record high gas, skyrocketing inflation, a crisis on the border, and humiliation on the world stage_ ; that is **Joe Biden and the Radical Left Democrats' legacy.** I am focused on stopping them and holding them accountable. [](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=80d3316e9c&e=598f6aa24c) I will never stop fighting for the people of Georgia. I will focus on bringing back Trump’s policies to benefit our state. I am not focused on the petty politics and shameless self-promotion of my opponents. **[Join My Team Today to keep my ad on the air and bring real change to Georgia!](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=ed6a234bcf&e=598f6aa24c)** With your help, we can restore the American Dream and put this country back on the right track. I cannot do this without you. **When I am elected, I will never let you down!**
[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=f4f1ad237a&e=598f6aa24c) [](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=39267b2871&e=598f6aa24c) [](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=9c3b97a7f9&e=598f6aa24c) [](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=beea6614c8&e=598f6aa24c) Thank you,

David Curry

name: Team Collier
subject: Mike Collier vs. Dan Patrick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
| | Dan Patrick’s self-proclaimed top priority during the last legislative session was making sure that if _Roe_ is overturned, abortion will be banned in Texas. When he's elected, Mike will protect reproductive care access for _all_ Texans. **If you're with him, will you chip in even just $10 to help elect the first pro-choice Lt. Governor in Texas history?** | [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45110825/344516719/-1814811138?refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_GEN_IN_20220509_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzRkYjY5Yi1kMmNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=anYz-yuh4f47T66hNkE3uw9wI2YIyCZfhfAKbt4Lz1k=)
---
As the most powerful statewide office, the Lt. Governor of Texas plays a paramount role in defending – or attacking – reproductive freedom. And with the Supreme Court expected to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ in a matter of weeks, it has never been more important to defeat Dan Patrick and elect Mike Collier.
**Dan Patrick wrote some of the worst, most cruel anti-abortion legislation in the nation.** He’s the architect of the recently passed Senate Bill 8, which bans abortions after six weeks in the state of Texas — with no exceptions for victims of rape or incest — and allows private citizens the unprecedented authority to sue any individual involved in the procurement of the procedure.
And this week, Patrick celebrated the draft SCOTUS opinion stating that “abortion will be banned in Texas” should the Court overturn _Roe v. Wade_. Texas is one of 13 states with a "trigger law" in place to effectively ban abortion completely if the federal protections are removed.
Dan Patrick’s focus is dangerous, reckless, and out of step with the majority of Texans.
**Mike Collier, who’s endorsed by Planned Parenthood, is an unapologetic champion for reproductive rights. When he’s elected, he’ll be the first pro-choice Lt. Governor in Texas history. **
The choice is clear.
[**Together, we can take back our state and protect our fundamental rights. But first, we need your help to win the nomination on May 24 and go head-to-head with Dan Patrick. Can you chip in any amount that’s meaningful to you to join the fight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45110826/344516721/339760690?refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_GEN_IN_20220509_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzRkYjY5Yi1kMmNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=anYz-yuh4f47T66hNkE3uw9wI2YIyCZfhfAKbt4Lz1k=)
[CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45110827/344516723/-1814811138?refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_GEN_IN_20220509_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzRkYjY5Yi1kMmNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=anYz-yuh4f47T66hNkE3uw9wI2YIyCZfhfAKbt4Lz1k=)

— Team Collier

Dear Fellow American, Young people today grow up being told that their perception of reality is a matter of perspective. Recently, they are even told that women can choose to be men and men women. This denial of objective reality—including a denial of an objective good—is destructive of proper education, of religious faith, and of free government. Largely as an antidote to this destructive force, Hillsdale College is releasing its latest free online course,**“C.S. Lewis on Christianity.”** Taught by Michael Ward, a visiting distinguished fellow at Hillsdale and a professor of theology at Oxford University, this seven-lecture course covers Lewis’s philosophical defense of an objective good and his demonstration of its fulfillment in Christianity. **I am writing today to ask if you would consider****pre-registering for this free online course. You can do so at this secure link:** **** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-preregister/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zajk9hlqs32tohe50r9m6s8o64pr6vkqpqgip0vg_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chh66ob4c3h2bs)** **** **After pre-registering for****“C.S. Lewis on Christianity,” please help us****meet our goal of raising $500,000 by midnight on May 16 to promote this new online course effectively, especially to young people.** **** Hillsdale produces its free online courses, as it does all its work, while refusing to accept government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. We are entirely dependent on private donations. With your tax-deductible gift today, we can enroll tens of thousands of young people in this new free online course and expand Hillsdale’s other outreach efforts. Thank you for your friendship and support. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Team Crispi
subject: Crispi Accepts 2nd Debate with Smith
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Crispi for Congress
body:
| |
---
[](https://103086.io.directiq12.com/hit?sid=zl9563fel8330c1zpw&linkid=0&link=bcc57f0327ac4a3ba50601c7ea12eeb4)
---
| **Crispi Accepts Second Debate with Smith**
**Will Smith Take a Stand on Tough Issues** **Seaside Park, NJ -** America First Republican Mike Crispi today accepted a second debate invitation -- this time from NJ101.5 host Bill Spadea who has offered to host the debate between Crispi and 42-year incumbent Chris Smith prior to the June 7 Republican Primary election. "It's critical that the people of the Fourth Congressional District hear from us on the issues we feel very differently about," Crispi said. "He's been there for 42 years, so it should be really easy for him to answer questions from the moderators and debate an opponent like me who has never held elective office." Crispi previously accepted an invitation from the League of Women Voters to debate Smith and work around his congressional obligations in scheduling the event. But Smith has failed to even acknowledge their invitation. Among the questions Smith hasn't answered for yet: \- Does he agree with his leading supporter Kevin McCarthy that the impeachment of Joe Biden should be off the table? \- Will he reject the next omnibus spending bill if it includes expanded funding for abortion through Title X Family Planning and the United Nations Population Fund? \- Will he return the money he's taken from pharmaceutical companies that perform grotesque research on fetal tissue taken from aborted infants? \- Why is he co-sponsoring anti-Second Amendment legislation with Adam Schiff and AOC? \- Why hasn't Smith signed on to the Religious Freedom Over Mandates Act, (HR 6502), which would prohibit the use of federal dollars to collect information about someone's religious beliefs. "My team of America First Republicans is the only team to stand united in complete support for the right to life, the Second Amendment, and medical freedom," Crispi said. "Why is Congressman Smith unwilling to account for his record?" \- 30 - [www.MikeCrispi.com](https://103086.io.directiq12.com/hit?sid=zl9563fel8330c1zpw&linkid=1&link=01b363f007384f1dac42c4df68c37250)
---

subject: The latest news
body:
We’re neck and neck with many voters still undecided.
---
| | Dear Peter, The AP dropped a big story over the weekend. People across the country are watching this primary. They’re watching to see whether Oregon will change direction or whether we’ll spend the next four years doing more of the same. **So it’s no surprise the AP sees the choice facing Oregonians the same way we do... and they are calling this race “close”.** **[“Many Oregonians are critical of the handling of the pandemic, the homeless crisis, school closures, lack of affordable housing, increasing gun violence and a growing political divide.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45111293/344520170/-709707203?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmZiYmM5OC1kNGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zr0Abj7evUvNEYfIORUYPx4Af1ZRVBpjNeuWEMRJHUg=&emci=a2aad891-d4cf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=4ffbbc98-d4cf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=30662126)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45111294/344520172/-709707203?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmZiYmM5OC1kNGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zr0Abj7evUvNEYfIORUYPx4Af1ZRVBpjNeuWEMRJHUg=&emci=a2aad891-d4cf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=4ffbbc98-d4cf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=30662126) This primary is going to be close either way, and Oregon desperately needs an outsider to shake things up. **We’re neck and neck with many voters _still undecided_.** We’re pulling out all the stops to reach them, address their concerns, and get them mobilized to turn this state around. All of our resources are going immediately into our outreach to voters in every corner of Oregon. **[There’s no time to waste. Will you chip in $50 TONIGHT to mobilize last minute undecided voters?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45111295/344520173/1587611774?refcode=em050922&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmZiYmM5OC1kNGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zr0Abj7evUvNEYfIORUYPx4Af1ZRVBpjNeuWEMRJHUg=)** Thanks,
Tobias Read News Team

clean_body: Fellow activist, all that’s left now is to get out the vote = | Fellow activist, We want to thank you for your support. Expanding the electorate to truly reflect the Commonwealth’s population is a monumental task. Without people like you, it would be simply impossible. = = Thanks to you, we have registered more than 4,000 new voters in Pennsylvania since January. That’s seriously encouraging progress towards our goal of 50,000 for the year. Now it’s time to turn that effort to mobilizing every registered Black, brown, and young voter to cast their ballots in the May 17th primary election. = = In solidarity and gratitude, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented communities of color and immigrant communities. We will register them to vote, provide education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize people to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : PRIMARY: May 17, 2022 GENERAL: November 8, 2022 || || || New Pennsylvania Project 717 Market Street #295 Lemoyne, PA 17043 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. _**But we are standing in their way.**_

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45111582/344521405/409076140?refcode=20220509_Beto_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODA4YWEzYy1kNmNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iQyC5ZS2T-1DKVSw_3fQr7ae1Gwx548hEBmYoKnQlH4=)
Friends, We got some tough news a week ago when we learned that the Supreme Court is readying to overturn Roe v. Wade. Since Texas has a “trigger ban” in place, this decision will completely ban abortion in our state, without exception for rape or incest. But we have an opportunity to channel our frustration and anger into action, and ultimately into victory. We must do so because winning political power is the only way to meet this challenge — the only way to overcome this crisis. As governor, I will do everything in my power to guarantee that women have control over their own bodies, their own health care, their own futures. But, in order to win, I need your support to defeat Greg Abbott in November. [**Will you split a contribution between Seth Moulton and this campaign to help me defeat Greg Abbott in November so I can fight to protect the right to abortion care in Texas?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45111583/344521406/409076140?refcode=20220509_Beto_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODA4YWEzYy1kNmNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iQyC5ZS2T-1DKVSw_3fQr7ae1Gwx548hEBmYoKnQlH4=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45111584/344521407/-1424250066?refcode=20220509_Beto_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODA4YWEzYy1kNmNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iQyC5ZS2T-1DKVSw_3fQr7ae1Gwx548hEBmYoKnQlH4=)
These extreme attacks on abortion have never been about life. If it were about life, then the current Texas governor wouldn’t allow so many kids to die in the foster care system in Texas — the worst run foster care program in the United States. This is about control. And this is about power. Our side — the side of the people who believe in democracy, the constitution, and the rights of our fellow Americans — has to get serious about political power. It’s on us, the people of Texas. We must do everything in our power to organize, win, and protect reproductive health care. I will fight for every person’s freedom to control their own health care, their own body, their own future. Friend, I need you in this fight with me to protect reproductive rights in Texas. [**Please, split a $25 contribution between our campaign and Seth Moulton and help me defeat an extremist governor who is actively tearing away people’s reproductive freedom.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45111585/344521408/409076140?refcode=20220509_Beto_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODA4YWEzYy1kNmNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iQyC5ZS2T-1DKVSw_3fQr7ae1Gwx548hEBmYoKnQlH4=) With your support, I know that we can win this race. Thank you,
Beto

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: SCOTUS Leak & Roe v. Wade Decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
We must defeat radical pro-abortion left. Read more >>>
| | | Peter,

The leak of the U.S. Supreme Court’s draft opinion on Roe v. Wade is unprecedented, wholly inappropriate, and clearly politically-motivated.

Whoever is responsible for this ploy to fire up the far-left mob must be punished.

**Radical pro-abortion groups are now calling for protests at the homes of conservative Supreme Court justices. Some have been forced to cancel events over fears of violence.**

[**We cannot allow this campaign of harassment and intimidation to prevail!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/f9a36d6cfa9ec901/f57964fa0e6c259ec3d6b838967d376c/33013)

If this monumental decision is indeed final, it represents a historic victory for life.

Overturning Roe v. Wade – one of the most egregious examples of liberal judicial activism in U.S. history – is long overdue.

As a Christian, I believe that life begins at conception and the sanctity of human life must be protected. And I know this fight is FAR from over. The Democrats are going to make this the #1 political issue of the 2022 elections, as they scheme to pass legislation in Congress to legalize abortion nationwide and renew calls to expand and pack the U.S. Supreme Court.

Now more than ever, we need a Republican Senate majority to **STOP THIS ASSAULT** and **PROTECT THE UNBORN**!

Please support our critical efforts. [**We must stand strong in the fight for life and liberty.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/f9a36d6cfa9ec901/b501366327c80c88c3d6b838967d376c/33013)

\- Coach

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc?=
subject: We Are So Close! Just 15 days left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marc McMain for Congress, Inc
body:
Help me get across the finish line. May 24th is right around the corner | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ca82a2820230/campaign-update-9018097?e=2429acb6f7)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

I need your help. Our country is under attack from the radical leftists and career politicians in D.C. We don't need to send just another Republican to Washington. We need to send a fighter. A Conservative fighter who will work tirelessly to not only combat the radical leftists destroying our country, but to fight for the needs of the people of the 10th congressional district.

It is vitally important that we send an outsider. We don't need to send just another career politician to Washington. We need to send someone who will get the job done in three to four terms, then come home. Someone who will get term limits implemented so we can fix the real issue in D.C, the swamp. If we drain the swamp, we finish what President Trump started. [Georgia Public Broadcasting has credited me with driving the conversation on term limits in this election.](https://marcforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=41459556cfecfd1402c31ae88&id=65afda38e5&e=2429acb6f7)

I'm asking you to help me get across the finish line. If you know me, you know that I am a tenacious worker. You know that I will do what I promise with no excuses. That's why I have the endorsements of eleven local officials, including sheriff's, mayors, chief of polices, and county commissioners.

My campaign has been a success so far. Up to this point, I've raised over $650,000. Recent polling has the top five candidates so close that it is anyone's ball game. We are towards the top of that polling. Your contribution could help us get across the finish line. A max contribution would be much appreciated, but I would be just as blessed for a $25 one.

Donate now and help me finish what we started a year ago together. To put a Christian, conservative, outsider in Washington to help drain the swamp and fight the radical leftists. With your help we can stop disastrous Joe Biden and crazy Nancy Pelosi from destroying our country. The May 24th Republican Primary is just 15 days away!
---
|
# Donate To Support My Campaign

Click the link below and my campaign staff will make sure you have one in your yard by the end of the week!

You know that I will do what I promise with no excuses. That's why I have the endorsements of eleven local officials, including sheriff's, mayors, chief of polices, and county commissioners. My campaign has been a success so far. Up to this point, I've raised over $650,000. Recent polling has the top five candidates so close that it is anyone's ball game. We are towards the top of that polling. Your contribution could help us get across the finish line. A max contribution would be much appreciated, but I would be just as blessed for a $25 one. Donate now and help me finish what we started a year ago together. To put a Christian, conservative, outsider in Washington to help drain the swamp and fight the radical leftists. With your help we can stop disastrous Joe Biden and crazy Nancy Pelosi from destroying our country. The May 24th Republican Primary is just 15 days away! | Donate To Support My Campaign | Early Voting Has Started! Click below to find your early voting location. | Get Your Yard Sign Here Click the link below and my campaign staff will make sure you have one in your yard by the end of the week! | | | | | | | | | | | | | [Paid for by Marc McMain for Congress, Inc.]() Our mailing address: Marc McMain for Congress, Inc. P.O. Box 191 Loganville, GA 30052 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

subject: We're entering the home stretch!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Dellicker for Congress](https://dellickerforcongress
body:
Dellicker has the momentum as we reach the finish line. | | | | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=f8c23d7e30&e=1090c5c412)
---
| | |
# **We're Heading into the Home Stretch!**
Dear Friends and Neighbors,

The primary election is one week from tomorrow, and our campaign is peaking at just the right time. Like _Rich Strike_ in the Kentucky Derby, we’ve surprised a lot of pundits to be where we are today. But I’ve never doubted the strength of our volunteer network or the truth of our message. We’re in a sprint to the finish and are looking forward to a winning outcome on Tuesday, May 17th!

This week, we have a packed schedule with plenty of opportunities to meet the candidate if you haven’t met me already. On Monday, I’ll be in Lansford during the day and Guthsville in the evening. On Tuesday, I’ll be in Easton for a sportsman’s association meeting and on Wednesday I’m on a Pro-Life panel in Nazareth. Thursday is an open house at Ringer’s Roost in Allentown, and on Friday I’ll be at Archery Addictions in Lehighton. Please check my website and Facebook page for updates, as things are happening fast.

Meanwhile, the Morning Call had a different observation about my opponent’s campaign. Under the header, “Keeping a low profile,” the article commented that Scheller was invited to eight debates but only accepted one. It reports, “Scheller said she turned down most debate invites because she is spending ‘all my time in the district listening to what people have to say and understand what their needs are.” I’ll let you decide if you believe that.

Since I began my campaign, I’ve focused on policy and the issues important to voters in the greater Lehigh Valley. This week, I’ll complete a series of proposals that outline my agenda when I get to Congress. My campaign [blog](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=7c3d891e18&e=1090c5c412) has plenty of information about the state of the race and my policy positions, along with the [issues page](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=7e7eaa7a6a&e=1090c5c412) on my website. Please take a look. And if you have any questions things not addressed, please feel free to send me an email at [kevin@dellickerforcongress.com](mailto:kevin@dellickerforcongress.com).

My current schedule for the upcoming week is posted below. Thanks for your ongoing support to Keep America Free!

Sincerely,

---
|
---
| [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=15509aa5c4&e=1090c5c412)

---
|
---
| **Strong Families**
---
|
---
| Last week, I held a press conference about my policies to encourage “Strong Families.” I want to help young families who are just getting started, growing families with or without children in the home, and military families who face unique burdens associated with frequent deployments. The complete release is on my campaign blog [here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=525b909524&e=1090c5c412).
---
| [Learn More](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=ace6f5d34f&e=1090c5c412 "Learn More")
---
|
---
| **Good Jobs**
---
|
---
| Today I released my “Good Jobs” agenda at a news conference in Lansford, Carbon County. It focuses on controlling inflation, empowering small businesses to thrive, and creating local jobs for local workers. If you’d like to learn more, the press release is on my campaign blog [here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=61eeaed6df&e=1090c5c412).

|

---
