---
| On Wednesday, I’ll complete my three-part policy series with a press conference on Safe Communities in Northampton County. As a 26-year military veteran with experience in the Army infantry and Air Force intelligence, I bring relevant skills to a dangerous world. I’m also pleased to have the endorsement of Fraternal Order of Policy Lodge #40 in Bethlehem, and I’m a “recommended” candidate by the Firearms Owners against Crime.

On Wednesday, you can read the details of my proposals for Safe Communities when I post them on my campaign blog ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=f938d18b28&e=1090c5c412)).

name: Jazz Lews
subject: Volunteer With Team Jazz!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JAZZ LEWIS
body:
Hello Folks!
With election season in full swing, we are building an army of volunteers and supporters to spread our message of opportunity for all Maryalnders! We must continue to use my leadership platform as House Democratic Caucus Chair to bring attention to the needs of our community. Volunteering with Team Jazz is a simple and meaningful way to make a difference.
I need your help, so I can continue to make progress representing Maryland's 24th Legislative District in Annapolis.
Click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/NfiieemwAkC0x8pPjHlTPA2?emci=00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=] to join Team Jazz
Below is just some of the legislation I have already passed:
The Maryland New Start Act
This session of the General Assembly, we passed the Maryland New Start Act which will make small business loans & trainings available to the formerly incarcerated.
Step Down Program
I was proud to sponsor & pass legislation that ensures people released from solitary confinement & restrictive housing can access a re-entry specialist, to ensure they have the resources to return to society and lead productive lives.
Maryland Health Equity Resource Act
Too many Marylanders are unable to access healthcare. We passed legislation that subsidizes healthcare providers moving to communities most in need of their services.
Racial Impact Statements
I championed the use of Racial Impact Analysis to help Maryland study how legislation might impact different groups and equity-related issues across our state.
Juvenile Restoration Act
I sponsored & passed the Juvenile Restoration Act, which gives juveniles sentenced to life without the possibility of parole the chance of a re-sentencing hearing after 20 years, & it bans sentencing juveniles to life without parole.
Law Enforcement Body Camera Task Force
This legislation created a Task Force, which I chaired, to study the implementation of a statewide police body camera program. These cameras promote transparency & trust with our police.
Minority Business Reciprocity
This bill enables contractors, who are already federally certified disadvantaged business enterprises �meet our state’s qualifications, to be certified in Maryland as Minority Business Enterprises (MBE), without a lengthy-repetitive process.
Thank you,
Jazz
As a proven progressive leader and champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity. Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. Jazz is a lifelong Prince Georgian and lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/volunteeremail]
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JAZZ LEWIS
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854
Bethesda, MD 20827
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/hz01xPWa8U6TZN4BL8L0dg2?unsubscribedata=51zsY2N3tHbqdrw9v4WOiknCfImWQnavOLjkGQULVedsPCe3CmgwRifnu74cuGzPd1PNuxLznogpfz9ges0F9sQkxIjaOQbcK4jzpq4tOOcIA7pG%2BJcDGkLSV1P9Z7tAoy46GE2K%2FZ%2FaiRbs%2BEsb1zTtb%2BWgkM9PSO9ITa2cJkEfmxtjdbsnheXvoPpJt0IHwkwJ%2F1doY84QKUI5n2b%2FJ90UDh5D04N5Gswwz5hKNofGHG%2F%2Ba4UOSuPtn1aaIelBEHk0UQI6cv7aQyTknVsZ6J5ly9QQQCO87N5%2Fcgi%2BBZMICmw2RUZLr1zOkvtvsRCZJoPi0bgP%2BxknyPnteNViFLEmTzo39M0Kb%2BW91FMxaqJJnWZXzsuISvlxc2hER1SAkeeTXzU4xSkoj6wKOwLnrTWqJ%2F6hyye5hq8IyoFWZEGRtWueKRDxtg11ixMIKmyO .

Friend,

I hate to email you again, but this could not be more important.

**We are just 8 days away from the primary election and new polling released THIS MORNING has this race nearly TIED.

We are falling behind, time is running out, and we need your help in this final stretch. To make up ground and ensure our VICTORY next week, our team is making one FINAL TV buy at 6 pm. But right now, we're still $8,205 short of what we need to push our LAST TV ads.** | [**RUSH IN A CONTRIBUTION** ](http://links.doctoroz.com/u/click?_t=2b05aaee21f04e6792020c0ad1924b95&_m=0735cbce3adb4752bb9ada17e9e05229&_e=7790ogOaHIyqwY2zPVaf190FAE31yWm61AnMsGmvFEF688y9Yp-hYlL2qzG7Bbw2Ac3Ol2SnHwiAKU6-aAYDnPbqCWoJQvGv4X1LlqDeR7L-Cq0sDvV9A90x8kA5c5h2oyDCunW2A0-M4-KFveZq6094sNxkxYAJrnlH_tIXkTU93jUIN-DweOKv2LABXTP1PHvRfocN9rgg0k2O4OpnlRImN9P6_p0zLO00Pj0hUcLKf9_UY9KAeT4L1tRLmJ-X2DCWr4CWnZmp-zjEI2mEq1N0mNSlYfnxGxDzXbMQtbJwzv73FhUYOUHdJ3ZOpiqnLhck--EJJL0gDxACGRoUZKQHhWpSemJKKdGMXHR6YSZKIme1nT_MRHhRtRIsxuxmj0VVRe3s9Hn800MqK_c87msNQxDXIzvH3jeQ6B3b5J202jMCI3YXrp_rdfMXwd6ECwX8EfYa5F7IWkTf6bHMwCXJdQ16MOOhnH4kBNhJ6V8_iW8QwDdcS2OJYXD8BphU)
---

**_Scaling back our efforts in this final stretch could cost us this election. We NEED to catch up in the polls and get our ads on air!_**

I'm counting on top patriots like you. Now, more than ever, I need you to give $10 (or whatever you can) to help us raise enough money to push our last TV ad. I need you to help me spread the word that I am the America First, Trump-endorsed candidate in this race. All other candidates who claim to be “America First” won’t fool the voters.

**_We can't win without this last TV buy._**

If you would like to donate - please **_use this LINK →_ [CLICK HERE](http://links.doctoroz.com/u/click?_t=2b05aaee21f04e6792020c0ad1924b95&_m=0735cbce3adb4752bb9ada17e9e05229&_e=7790ogOaHIyqwY2zPVaf190FAE31yWm61AnMsGmvFEF688y9Yp-hYlL2qzG7Bbw2Ac3Ol2SnHwiAKU6-aAYDnPbqCWoJQvGv4X1LlqDeR7L-Cq0sDvV9A90x8kA5c5h2oyDCunW2A0-M4-KFveZq6094sNxkxYAJrnlH_tIXkTU93jUIN-DweOKv2LABXTP1PHvRfocN9rgg0k2O4OpnlRImN9P6_p0zLO00Pj0hUcLKf9_UY9KAeT4L1tRLmJ-X2DCWr4CWnZmp-zjEI2mEq1N0mNSlYfnxGxDzXbMQtbLsKfSZ1uCRG5BGHJkp9tjYtDkVg-zgMwbuqgUnfxQz5YfHMAAr5Qgm4IEtyqcdulWHUPUeLyteFQpx9nIEeAfMHLpJpNnEbM4yN0b1SV5aNDGo_I8hEio1IOadGmxV1SGMK83oQN7RII8pLZ9WHj_--C0yjDcGbLFsIjWsbpeFoi_-GWRtjFYWqpk1i9rdIhujByQFkKEfZJAsJnPQGqzQ)**

[**Believe me when I say: we can’t win without these TV ads.**](http://links.doctoroz.com/u/click?_t=2b05aaee21f04e6792020c0ad1924b95&_m=0735cbce3adb4752bb9ada17e9e05229&_e=7790ogOaHIyqwY2zPVaf190FAE31yWm61AnMsGmvFEF688y9Yp-hYlL2qzG7Bbw2Ac3Ol2SnHwiAKU6-aAYDnPbqCWoJQvGv4X1LlqDeR7L-Cq0sDvV9A90x8kA5c5h2oyDCunW2A0-M4-KFveZq6094sNxkxYAJrnlH_tIXkTU93jUIN-DweOKv2LABXTP1PHvRfocN9rgg0k2O4OpnlRImN9P6_p0zLO00Pj0hUcLKf9_UY9KAeT4L1tRLmJ-X2DCWr4CWnZmp-zjEI2mEq1N0mNSlYfnxGxDzXbMQtbKKEscbgzwaJdkBLe1UfmNNz7MWw0akvQ1siNedkniL66u1J5hCeAGoOXxCcKehCXyASkFGMsscX6HqGxmVgf__mx7U3MjW1D79epm9fT8jczc3QlhPqvg0d2jizQPdn6kR4rrTIpqPdruaV-vPfoCZ3rVS2fkOBlPYo0XWWLoewpT45Vz7_YqBKLV8_lG_YTTAnReFSKLxuPMInDdIkAzb) [**RUSH YOUR SUPPORT** ](http://links.doctoroz.com/u/click?_t=2b05aaee21f04e6792020c0ad1924b95&_m=0735cbce3adb4752bb9ada17e9e05229&_e=7790ogOaHIyqwY2zPVaf190FAE31yWm61AnMsGmvFEF688y9Yp-hYlL2qzG7Bbw2Ac3Ol2SnHwiAKU6-aAYDnPbqCWoJQvGv4X1LlqDeR7L-Cq0sDvV9A90x8kA5c5h2oyDCunW2A0-M4-KFveZq6094sNxkxYAJrnlH_tIXkTU93jUIN-DweOKv2LABXTP1PHvRfocN9rgg0k2O4OpnlRImN9P6_p0zLO00Pj0hUcLKf9_UY9KAeT4L1tRLmJ-X2DCWr4CWnZmp-zjEI2mEq1N0mNSlYfnxGxDzXbMQtbK8exj0w14Vc7DBXISrocq81MEW0ECqysTHrEE7sjJjZPrupdNKe9EoDbQX2fHOrq0032aQ1E2r7d1lx0sn17i6cy3TdTdWEI_0YDMz8eE-QyAc6CSlOUwbEpna02L4Oq2vTf7JPpR0Akta-Mnambw5ELkjVxSGYRnPIOCdp7t2OOK-_QComB-kwUGzajpJXcht-L-8I2LAtjPzly3kMtJv)

body:

---
Team,

It was just reported that Brad’s opponent was fined and _placed on probation_ for having a loaded gun in a carry-on bag at an Iowa airport last August. His statement explaining the incident said it was “purely accidental.” Do you want someone who brings a loaded gun by accident (or otherwise) representing you in Congress? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45112630/344525781/-774467154?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.05.09_b1_dvo-team_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.05.09_b1_dvo-team_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTI2ODAyMi1kYmNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mJa1ScvX6aIGH8LaYI-aX347L5m4t6H_krOHic8dEI4=)
**_Bottomline: once again, Derrick Van Orden proves he is not fit for office._**

name: KyrstenSinema.com
subject: Securing Our Land Ports of Entry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
|
#
---
We’re continuing our work to address the crisis at our southern border, help ensure migrants are treated fairly and humanely, and protect our border communities. Currently, U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) faces a shortage of 900 officers, leaving them understaffed to keep our border safe and secure. **That’s why Kyrsten recently cosponsored the _Securing America’s Ports of Entry Act_ , bipartisan legislation authorizing CBP to add at least 600 officers for five years. The bill also requires CBP to report staffing, infrastructure, and equipment needed to enhance security at ports of entry.** Five Arizona organizations — including the Greater Nogales Santa Cruz County Port Authority, Greater Yuma Port Authority, Douglas International Port Authority, Douglas Regional Economic Development Cooperation, and the City of San Luis — and 23 national organizations support our _Securing America’s Ports of Entry Act_. [**Will you add your name to the growing list of supporters for our _Securing America’s Ports of Entry Act_ to help us get this legislation over the finish line?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45112675/344525944/-1296692738?refcode=AU_KLS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220509_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjc0ODMyOS1kYmNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QS9nFYGhPal2gJJyWvBj3q6pXQTG3Z8uk0TEHA5IOaw=&emci=a5268022-dbcf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=2f748329-dbcf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2415496) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45112677/344525946/-1296692738?refcode=AU_KLS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220509_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjc0ODMyOS1kYmNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QS9nFYGhPal2gJJyWvBj3q6pXQTG3Z8uk0TEHA5IOaw=&emci=a5268022-dbcf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=2f748329-dbcf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2415496)

We must get Critical Race Theory and far-Left gender ideology OUT of our schools , OUT of our military, OUT of our places of business, OUT of our Court System, OUT of our Criminal Justice System, and OUT of every part of our federal, state, and local governments. Do you agree we must protect Parent 's Rights? Now more than ever, I need to know that you will stand with me. Every mom and dad in America must be given the right to send their child to the public, private, charter, or religious school of their CHOICE. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: It's time to boycott Disney
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | Fellow American, Across the nation, Real Americans are fed up with Disney aiming their radical, "not-so-secret gay agenda" squarely at our kids. **Producers within the company have publicly admitted their desire to expose children to radical gender theory concepts as early as possible. The company itself has advocated for the _grooming of children_ in public elementary school classrooms!**
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._VYsA_RtJKMXTaoQ)
---
| | How much longer will we continue giving our business to this massive "woke" corporation while it actively works to rob children of their innocence, indoctrinate them in radical gender ideology, alienate them from biblical truth, and undermine the American family? **Disney has run out of time. I'm boycotting Disney -- and I want _YOU_ to join me and THOUSANDS of grassroots patriots.**
---
[**Please take a moment to sign the National Boycott Disney Petition right now, and urge all of your concerned friends and family members to do the same.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
[**Boycott Disney**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._KA6KhSOE9JIOA7Dt-w)
---
It's no secret that the radical Left has its sights set on America's children. **Radical Leftist activists are hard at work in America's largest corporations, in classrooms across the country, and in the media our children consume -- trying to groom a generation of American children and indoctrinate them into their Woke beliefs.** And grooming isn't just a pastime for them; it's central to their strategy, and they're ready to fight for it. As a matter of fact, as TPUSA contributor Drew Hernandez recently documented at the gates of Disneyland, the Leftists will _VICIOUSLY_ attack parents and concerned Americans who dare defend their right to protect children from harmful Left-wing ideology. That's why it is CRITICAL that Real Americans like you and me fight back by boycotting the companies who are trying to sexualize and indoctrinate our children! TPUSA Faith is on the front lines in the fight against these destructive forces -- chief among them Disney -- and we need you in the fight as well! [**Please join the growing movement of faithful patriots who refuse to bow to radical ideology and Boycott Disney.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._ZHWhQZGw)
---
[**Boycott Disney**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._p41S8kVug)
---
Make no mistake, Fellow American -- Disney is actively working to break the generational cycle of liberty that has kept America free. _They're undermining not only the innocence of precious children, but the very fabric of American society._ We **_CANNOT_** let them continue unopposed! [** _Together, we can show Disney and their far-Left corporate allies that we refuse to relinquish our children to their Woke Agenda!_**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) No other group in America has impacted as many young people as Turning Point USA. Our 3,000+ student chapters and 500,000+ student activists are a testament to our influence among America's youth. But Disney has spent nearly a century infiltrating the minds of children, and it's going to take every single one of us to unwind that insidious work -- and it all starts with this nationwide boycott of their Woke products. **Your support in this fight will provide the pressure needed to show that Real Americans are willing to take a stand for our children, for our values, and for the future of our nation!** [**Join thousands of parents who have decided that they will no longer submit to efforts to groom their children under their very noses.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
[**Boycott Disney**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._2B0GpNg)
---
Disney has gone too far, and has become Too woke. It's time they realized that if they go woke, then they go broke! Thank you for your support -- **[and please, add your name to this petition now.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._UoMTQ)**
---
For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEOTurning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMTI5LTgyNWY4NTMwNzM3YjRmYjU5MWMwODBhNjQ3MmZkMTQ5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/rUJVgmhnQLU29wEJxIF3qQ) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb8cr6s5v5bgk8ifil4898jkpl7u05f4c0tpd9fg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpjasjkmer7ec3hcdp6bc36m5qj6tr5ckqn6s3h68oe1p5le1pn3d76c1pjct5gcv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666ob6o70eao6cclkmdhmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933clh68pj0cji66oh5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhrksogr153vmkda7oo17q6b1blq422483oakk2g_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj60p74cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zipvqmhh6kpva629rim6gseq5ir70bl0lj43kdd0_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj60p74cdh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj7csbhlsdq2q6t0tmcd3euqhfmvh391srtrbaho_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj60p74cdh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2zph6bap0j3r618vp3rp6uetmjfdj2teha546f0io).

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: My friend Peter Welch
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Why this campaign is so important:

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=374%2E61531%2EyxXF3S)
Hi, it’s Gabby Giffords—former Congresswoman from Arizona. 11 years ago, I survived a mass shooting in my hometown, and became a national gun safety advocate so no one else has to go through what I went through.
That’s why I’m thrilled today to share that Giffords PAC is endorsing Peter Welch to represent Vermont in the United States Senate.
As Vermont’s congressman, Peter has proven to be a real champion in the fight to end gun violence. He has been a leading advocate for common-sense gun safety reform and continues to reach across the aisle to deliver much-needed results for Vermont.
**But with the Senate hanging in the balance, this race in Vermont is shaping up to be one of the most consequential in the country.** And we know that national Republicans are willing to do whatever it takes to try and retake the Senate majority. That’s why I’m personally asking: [**Can you chip in a $5 contribution to help Peter win in Vermont, and defend our Democratic majority?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2465?t=3&akid=374%2E61531%2EyxXF3S)
Peter’s up against a lot—and Republicans need to flip just one seat to take back the Senate, which means they’ll try to spend big to win. With so much on the line, from affordable health care to gun safety, this campaign can’t afford to lose momentum now. Let’s send a message that Vermont isn’t for sale by sending Peter to the Senate.
[**Please chip in a $5 contribution to Peter’s campaign for Senate. There’s never been a more important time to show your strong support for this team.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2465?t=4&akid=374%2E61531%2EyxXF3S)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Fighting for the lives of the unborn
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbqg17ufg8oglss0i8sr4ia59nqn4l0t6dko65j8_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj68pj1c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sj3m6r7fd37miq66tbh6lj31cjl6ji7eojm6lp62d3j6go6ephgc4q67c9ic8rrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p34phgmapm1o3imhj3co5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znvaum83bnhj1rkun7m6d2seko2uar44a8fik08g_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj68pj1c3h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlfn9sds1409d3lsnk92nni1qmfj4sf21k51da68_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj68pj1c3h2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9b1q1ua0444p56de2f4vfb7d3uq7f0k6d544jo8_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj68pj1c3h2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

The only pro-choice candidate in the Democratic Primary needs your support! | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDIxeDWqAtfj4Fn87VuYfG4Xt4DQgNWFgDCOefFWaI9Dp_O6IxexNATE7cITP5W1rXb8BlbLHOFxWdi6Nh2hNxFp1kZwC200z8OdsT3_3o5NCQrMZhOuWAjDXUZzxf9MulVXJM0YccAybW_18cWu5ymy1FzM1i8CjC9fk_L28TMYbR0H4l_7HIfmvbaQ7xDeedvhsfFi3Vl61R6dU2i1CEsOubSg73fvRUW0ZzJ5XN-Ky0824V8lBfXmjoKmhz30fuY0_Pu5R8wc1bYOsDJ4FoB8/3lw/qsUu4ZYrQ46G1DMB56kBYg/h0/XBDDrdTVdg2qtFi6NjujFGEtcY9Sa2wj-D_KDyUv8eg)

Peter, With the Supreme Court stacked against us, it will be up to Congress to codify Roe v Wade. For that reason, we must send Erica Smith, a strong ally on women's reproductive rights to the U.S. House. The last thing we need are moderates who are weak on choice and will side with the GOP like we have seen Sinema and Manchin do in the Senate. We stand with Planned Parenthood in our endorsement of Erica because we need to elect Democrats who will actually do what it takes to defend our right to choose! **Erica Smith is a pro-choice, pro-healthcare candidate running to hold a must-win open seat in NC-01 - and you're invited to a virtual fundraiser to help her ahead of her May 17 primary!** In the North Carolina General Assembly, Erica's opponent cast the deciding vote to override a Democratic veto of an anti-abortion bill, you guessed it, siding with the state GOP. We won't fall for his lies -- not when there's a clear record of where he truly stands on bodily autonomy. [**Join Erica for a virtual fundraiser TONIGHT, Monday, May 9 at 6:00pm PST / 9:00pm EST.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJoj0ag2lZEJm77NLA-h9A2JYXkXQc1Qh7jYNUhEwO08k69qvxWaY-jGeRC6W1_U47w7isFu0WcyLgFOQG0IFdEkQCZ2f9i2cYt85p1JuXNsCiUzDIg_v1N-f3V00GQFFafiTaA4YmbnznJQO1BrmIYTUvlteDt7JdpvLE9Ag9VCZ30LSO-70UbWgWij-9plvK9ubNnfNFJtyzMbMX9-T14I2zadPhTug0CbdTUQfRlV5PiszwVYDz86s2wK2alqaydEoZm9q_uXzx5XkdpNEUgu3RbAn7oGdXD9A6Qy8rUz-ganeSVqCzMIjIX8v5cU/3lw/qsUu4ZYrQ46G1DMB56kBYg/h1/mJXGt0CsA8puYBxJ_tFNgI7Ywu3-twzJwZfgmDGpEE0)

clean_body: The only pro-choice candidate in the Democratic Primary needs your support! | | Peter, With the Supreme Court stacked against us, it will be up to Congress to codify Roe v Wade. For that reason, we must send Erica Smith, a strong ally on women's reproductive rights to the U.S. House. The last thing we need are moderates who are weak on choice and will side with the GOP like we have seen Sinema and Manchin do in the Senate. We stand with Planned Parenthood in our endorsement of Erica because we need to elect Democrats who will actually do what it takes to defend our right to choose! Erica Smith is a pro-choice, pro-healthcare candidate running to hold a must-win open seat in NC-01 - and you're invited to a virtual fundraiser to help her ahead of her May 17 primary! In the North Carolina General Assembly, Erica's opponent cast the deciding vote to override a Democratic veto of an anti-abortion bill, you guessed it, siding with the state GOP. We won't fall for his lies -- not when there's a clear record of where he truly stands on bodily autonomy. | WHAT: WHO: Erica Smith, The Six PAC, Future Generations PAC, Elect Black Women, Her Bold Move, Progressive Caucus of the NCDP WHEN: Monday, May 9th, 9PM Eastern / 6PM Pacific WHERE: Virtually on Zoom! Can 't make it? Early voting is already underway - Every cent that we raise goes to funding our operations and volunteer resources. If you cannot donate, please join our volunteer-led organization to make calls, knock on doors, or text voters across North Carolina. Together we can beat the machine. In solidarity, Roza Calderon Executive Director, Future Generations | | Future Generations is a youth-founded, youth-led movement guided by the Seventh Generation philosophy, building a sustainable world for the next seven generations. We partner with progressives up and down the ballot to stop the climate crisis, and fight for universal healthcare, racial and economic justice. We don't take money from corporate PACs or lobbyists. In 2020 we helped re-elect GND champion Sen. Ed Markey and flipped crucial down-ballot seats. We're building a powerful slate for 2022, and we need your help. Join our people-powered movement in the fight for the future. | | Connect with us by clicking on the links below: | | | Paid for by Future Generations PAC. ---|--- Future Generations PAC P.O. Friend, Over the weekend, our campaign held an event in Baltimore County for a special announcement:**Maryland House Speaker Adrienne Jones endorsed the Moore-Miller ticket for Governor!** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45113455/344529310/-1651203132?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220509speakerjones_wm_90da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODYwNTVlMC1kZWNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R44OaJXOfLZEK0lhYh-fbT8DYNcxX87DU-EIh1w6r78=)
---
Speaker Jones has represented Maryland’s 10th legislative district in the House of Delegates for over two decades. In 2019 she made history when she was elected Speaker of the House, making her both the first woman and the first African American to serve as the presiding officer in the Maryland House of Delegates as well as the highest-ranking Democratic delegate in the chamber. Here’s why she’s on our team:
_"Wes Moore has the fortitude, lived experience, and motivation to lead us into a new era of equity, opportunity, and achievement for all Marylanders. He is the governor Maryland needs to put us on the best path forward.”_
---
The Speaker has spoken! From her groundbreaking Black Agenda to her leadership on abortion rights, Speaker Jones’ legendary service is transformative in Maryland. Aruna and I are deeply humbled by her endorsement.
**It further goes to show that our campaign’s momentum in this race for governor is truly unmatched!**
**[Help us keep it going all the way to the July 19 primary in just over two months: pitch in $10 or whatever you can afford to help Aruna and me win so we can move Maryland forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45113456/344529311/-1651203132?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220509speakerjones_wm_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODYwNTVlMC1kZWNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R44OaJXOfLZEK0lhYh-fbT8DYNcxX87DU-EIh1w6r78=)**

It further goes to show that our campaign’s momentum in this race for governor is truly unmatched! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for making this possible. Now let’s keep it up! Elevate, Wes | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Wade Herring
subject: Our voting rights are in danger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringtv?refcode=whem0509 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringtv?refcode=whem0509]
Peter –
Growing up in Georgia during the Civil Rights Movement made me aware at a very young age of our precious right to vote.
Politicians around the country – especially those in our very own state – are working relentlessly to restrict the basic American right to vote. The laws Georgia passed in early 2021 make it difficult for many disadvantaged Americans to vote.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringtv?refcode=whem0509 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringtv?refcode=whem0509]
Recently I had the opportunity to march at a voting rights rally hosted by faith based leaders at & around the Gilbert Civil Rights Museum.
My mother has voted in every single election she could ever since she registered to vote. But she’s 86 now, and she can’t drive to the polls, doesn’t have a driver’s license, can’t use a computer, and can’t stand in long lines. She is just one person who would benefit from federal protections of early voting, mail-in voting, and simplified voter registration.
Let’s keep things simple – voting is a fundamental American right that needs to be protected. I entered this race after I saw Buddy Carter blatantly disregard our rights by voting to overturn the 2020 election results and refusing to support basic voting protections.
No matter who you vote for or how you prefer to vote, I will do whatever it takes to allow you to do so. It should be easy for every American to make their voices heard – not just those who the Republicans know will vote for them.
Sincerely,
Wade Herring
P.S. If you want to learn more about how you can vote early in Georgia, click here: https://georgia.gov/vote-early-person [https://georgia.gov/vote-early-person]
If you want to make your plan to vote in person on May 24th, click here: https://georgia.gov/vote-in-person-election-day [https://georgia.gov/vote-in-person-election-day]
SUPPORT WADE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringtv?refcode=whem0509]

www.WadeHerringForCongress.com [https://www.wadeherringforcongress.com/] | Info@WadeHerringForCongress.com

clean_body: Respond now >> >> Friend, we noticed your record is out of date! In a moment of global crisis, Biden was clear-eyed about the stakes – and provided the kind of leadership we desperately needed after years of failed GOP leadership at the federal level. But with the GOP attacking him at every turn, we need to stand with him NOW. But your record must be updated before our midnight deadline! name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Standing up for life
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0sj1m9g7rtp8p4rn0hk3gsrnjh2fjigc971u0c8_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj68o74c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onlcdp36ddhe2qb2dj3ciom4dr1ejjb4odm6lge7d34c6pm0sbh6pq72c9gm6oe1puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6ccdgmdge0slhcor69cr2cuobapbi4no)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhbel6c7tskhvi3tie2e4fk6l8uod8p6mh77cr3g_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj68o74c5h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2af673b9q33miskape6smq7sgedtgq8v26l4ggo_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj68o74c5h2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlum5mc2mttpnud9tlgqbielac2lbqeoho6j6rgo_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj68o74c5h2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive. Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. name: Jessica Cisneros
subject: Reaching out
body:
Despite the news from SCOTUS, there is still a fire within us to fight for change.
#
Peter,
We stood up against SB8, Texas’ extreme abortion ban — which has no exception for rape or incest.
Yet Henry Cuellar sided with Republicans and voted against our health care and our rights. He voted against codifying _Roe v. Wade_ and against the right to abortion care.
[But on May 24, we can have the last word. Please split a contribution of $3 to my campaign and Justice Democrats to help us defeat the last anti-choice Democrat in the House.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/106200?refcode=em20220509-23274&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=23274%2E1203867%2EcIwM4p)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/106200?refcode=em20220509-23274&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=23274%2E1203867%2EcIwM4p)**
Our teams are working overtime to reach voters, run ads, and Get Out The Vote in this runoff election. I know that we can win. But Henry Cuellar has $1.4 million and anti-Democratic super PACs spending to support him so we need the resources to compete.
[I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t critically important. Please split a $3 contribution right now to my campaign and Justice Democrats — let’s win this runoff.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/106200?refcode=em20220509-23274&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=23274%2E1203867%2EcIwM4p)
Thank you,
Jessica Cisneros

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=22&akid=23274%2E1203867%2EcIwM4p) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=23&akid=23274%2E1203867%2EcIwM4p) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220509-23274-footer&t=24&refcode2=23274_1203867_cIwM4p&akid=23274%2E1203867%2EcIwM4p)**

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: my decision
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
For me, this has always been not just about today or tomorrow but about the next generation and the world we want for them.
#

Hi there, this is Cheri Beasley. I have a few moments of free time in my schedule this morning and wanted to write you a note to share a few reflections about my decision to run for Senate — and why your support is so important to our success.
The truth is the Senate is not working for our families. Too many people have been left behind and ignored by leaders who only respond to corporate interests and the wealthy and well-connected.
For me, this has always been not just about today or tomorrow but about the next generation and the world we want for them. That means taking real action to protect voting rights, the planet, reproductive freedom and more.
So that's why I got in this race — to be a voice for you and anyone in our country who is looking for a fair shake and a fair shot.
This is shaping up to be one of the closest and most expensive races in the country. I've known that would be the case from the start, and it does not scare me. But the truth is it takes more than courage to take on and shake up the status quo. We need a whole team of people to support us in this fight.
You're an important part of whether we have what it takes to win. When this race could come down to just a handful of votes, everything we do can make a difference. So I’m asking:
[**If you can, please contribute today to help us flip North Carolina and expand the majority. I’m determined to protect our progress and deliver real change, but we’re going to need a lot of support from people like you to win this race.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?refcode=em220509-1-T1&refcode2=849.357359.h9DNF1&t=1&akid=849%2E357359%2Eh9DNF1)

I’m so grateful for all of the people who’ve joined our team. With all that’s on the line in November and the tough general election ahead of us, it means the world to me to have your support.
Thank you,
Cheri Beasley

name: Fetterman HQ
subject: An update on Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We cannot let the party of MAGA win.
#
Did you hear about this, Derek?
**FIRST:** Donald Trump endorsed Dr. Oz — which means there’s a tidal wave of MAGA money approaching PA right now.
**THEN:** Trump threw a rally for Oz in PA, where they were joined by MAGA Republicans Mike Lindell and J.D. Vance.
**NOW:** We are just over ONE WEEK away from the primary election and we need *everyone* on board to help us win this primary so John can go on to beat Dr. Oz or whatever out-of-state millionaire Republicans run in November.
[**We wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t so urgent, Derek. Will you rush a donation right now to make sure we can compete with the MAGA money flooding PA? Seriously, anything you can spare this close to the primary will be a huge help.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220509-1?refcode=em20220509-5732&refcode2=5732_434096__p3CMQ&akid=5732%2E434096%2E_p3CMQ)
**[Rush $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220509-1?amount=5&refcode=em20220509-5732&refcode2=5732_434096__p3CMQ&akid=5732%2E434096%2E_p3CMQ)**
**We absolutely cannot let the party of MAGA win.**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220509-1?refcode=em20220509-5732&refcode2=5732_434096__p3CMQ&akid=5732%2E434096%2E_p3CMQ)
_Donald Trump + Dr. Oz in Greensburg, PA last week_
If we all come together right now, we can out-fundraise, out-organize, and out-campaign the GOP money machine just by the sheer force of our numbers.
But quite frankly, Derek, we are running out of time. With less than 8 days until the primary election, we need all hands on deck if we’re going to continue to mass-mobilize voters across PA.
**[If you’re ready to help John win the most expensive Senate race in the country, please chip in a donation of whatever you can afford right now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220509-1?refcode=em20220509-5732&refcode2=5732_434096__p3CMQ&akid=5732%2E434096%2E_p3CMQ)**
**[Rush $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220509-1?amount=5&refcode=em20220509-5732&refcode2=5732_434096__p3CMQ&akid=5732%2E434096%2E_p3CMQ)**
With your help, we’ll be able to keep up with whatever Trump, Dr. Oz, or GOP super PACs throw our way.
Let’s win this,
Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220509-5732-footer&t=1&refcode2=5732_434096__p3CMQ&akid=5732%2E434096%2E_p3CMQ)**

We are down to the final hours and we can all feel the momentum! We are surging all the way to victory.

Hey folks,

We are just about a week out from the primary and I have been on the road every single day. Some will say this isn't a conventional way to run a Senate race – after all, our campaign needs money and I'm not at the big corporate donor dinners to ask for it.

But this is the way that feels right to me, and this is the way to win that I know the people of Pennsylvania _deserve_. Every single person in this country deserves a representative that is willing to go to your bus stops, union halls, community centers, and favorite coffee spots to listen to what you have to say about the changes that need to happen. Every single person in Pennsylvania and across the country deserves that respect.

That's what I'm choosing to spend my time on – with the folks in my state, working families, children, community leaders, answering questions and putting in the work to prove that I will show up for our communities. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45113782/344530837/-863248123?refcode=em22_220509_conornote&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTJjNWQ2ZS1lMGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i254ZdB303CjY4cUbOQDPugA_vUnpx1FGXVCCLafoa8=)

name: Greg Casar
subject: We need to KEEP THIS UP.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94297/images/Greg%20Casar%20Email.png]
Hi Peter,
We just got a much-needed progressive win for working families in our state! This weekend, voters in Austin and San Antonio approved bold, progressive measures – proving that progressive policies are popular in Texas.
In Austin, voters permanently decriminalized marijuana and banned no-knock warrants in a landslide victory. And in San Antonio, we saw another huge win with voters passing the city’s first-ever affordable housing bond.
Despite extremist state officials trying to drag us backwards, Texas voters are moving us forward. Can you chip in $35 today to help us take this progress to Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=05.09_email]
CHIP IN TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=05.09_email]
I’m so proud of these progressive victories, which will help thousands of working families from Austin to San Antonio. It shows the power of community organizing.
In Congress, I’ll fight to expand these protections and policies nationwide – legalizing marijuana, reforming policing, and investing in affordable housing – for working families across America . Can you help us keep up the momentum by becoming part of our team today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=05.09_email]
Let’s keep organizing,
- Greg
Greg Casar
Democratic Nominee
Texas Congressional District 35

name: Tim Ryan
subject: J.D. Vance on abortion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Hello,
Last week, the Supreme Court’s draft decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ was leaked. **And we found out my GOP opponent is right-wing, anti-abortion extremist, J.D. Vance.**
Overturning Roe would be catastrophic for Ohio, where Republicans have introduced one extreme proposal after another to ban abortion before most women even know they're pregnant.
Our work has never been more important than right now. A 50/50 Senate has failed to protect abortion for people across the country. From the minority, Republicans abused the filibuster to block the Women’s Health Protection Act that would have codified _Roe._
**50/50 is not enough. If we want to make an impact on the issues that really matter, we must expand our Democratic majority—and that means we must win this race.**
[**I wouldn’t say this if I didn’t mean it: one of the most important things you can do to fight for reproductive rights is make a donation to this campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand’s. If we can flip this seat, we can expand the Democratic majority and protect the right to an abortion.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45114030/344532007/-1790534979?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3449-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTZlNzgxOS1lMmNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BN0ZlitMD_YezZQQ7DUG5UQVITQy3_Z94FHOYFU2rR0=)

Overturning Roe would be catastrophic for Ohio, where Republicans have introduced one extreme proposal after another to ban abortion before most women even know they're pregnant. Our work has never been more important than right now. A 50/50 Senate has failed to protect abortion for people across the country. From the minority, Republicans abused the filibuster to block the Women’s Health Protection Act that would have codified Roe. 50/50 is not enough. name: Rick Scott
subject: Have you read our plan?
body:
Peter,
The time is right for Republicans to **RESCUE AMERICA**.

_We have the American people behind us, and we have the momentum to take back control of our great country from the radical Left._

**My 11-Point Plan to RESCUE AMERICA is a road map to taking back our great country, and I need every single patriot to read it if we’re going to defeat the radical Left’s infiltration of our institutions once and for all.**

[**Read our 11-point plan to RESCUE AMERICA now and join the fight for a conservative future!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=7075c5dad64349cdaf6d92f7cf2a1297&_e=OLtxgiUXoM01Dij-lJ6NVOy98oBgH-IhX4z1jENHledNrGUzUPYSDUY8EeKctlRFPXNDPGf1uSVqHGlRsgaFhs0V7zieJ6BID1B1A0h72LE1uF4rI_pViKdDq08U9hWSHhh3pQfP2uUcjHmlezicjyTEDXlQVGU6fIJGt84-GLV1STnw1-vw1Yb9VnWMzRJLLWalbcUYpOv0AGd3gMOP8ichxpD-h856d_P3D05CelkrhYYNL07aPtSe2JW-Yo9DPgO_02CoYAb2N9zy0aTXjAOOeaPILGEAZ7V0aIInibTsFK5GWANsPpynQ7VqxE4yaIiZh7MceKuCm-5o6k2I69DzfNADJR7-isRBdGg3giraXasW0BuiwIFp4tFmFDZt5pznrjvtGDpxMHR-Yop_xjIb_Qqekqpwx4XrMFwDalnw-2PVaylDV5s1W_R6eHQD) [**READ THE PLAN**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=7075c5dad64349cdaf6d92f7cf2a1297&_e=OLtxgiUXoM01Dij-lJ6NVOy98oBgH-IhX4z1jENHledNrGUzUPYSDUY8EeKctlRFPXNDPGf1uSVqHGlRsgaFhteuQanjWnzfSe7o4rgwbZ7RRx1h1-0Q3NvunWItiCmjNWn0iVLDEZne7ZjkUMrjkTMZJjFKHFZSMSQSCgaPp52r4zETjXBi7l65dttI1iPGtdCGbd78ithgBl4r7wMSo0B68W0l7T8sfO1ghnExr-N4HSbLyEF5OPG73yZPq7pT6_C8IyyEDOpTdr_FbN7vhsg18VHiHthg0UPvNkH8wjR-VX1Bdorgr40kukVnvuP4Ryv8VGWtlPDwRLGg4i--fKjYeELTSbDD2xBaxJH_1vcCBs9EQlPTVKh1lZ-q2miFqVG0j0QmPA8Y5UhLm2nXUWu_OEvZwj540T5ILQRzYAWZnhYWfcTApj2cd6vxJ8xXSmnFuBx4FW868hYdh3O-Jg%3D%3D) If Republicans return to Washington’s business as usual, we don’t have a chance at saving our great country, Peter.

We need to _aim higher_ than the Republican Congresses before us and _truly commit_ to putting our conservative principles into action.

This plan isn’t for the faint of heart - but it is **our best chance to take back America before it’s too late.**

[**Read our 11-point plan to RESCUE AMERICA now!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=7075c5dad64349cdaf6d92f7cf2a1297&_e=OLtxgiUXoM01Dij-lJ6NVOy98oBgH-IhX4z1jENHledNrGUzUPYSDUY8EeKctlRFPXNDPGf1uSVqHGlRsgaFhs0V7zieJ6BID1B1A0h72LE1uF4rI_pViKdDq08U9hWSHhh3pQfP2uUcjHmlezicjyTEDXlQVGU6fIJGt84-GLV1STnw1-vw1Yb9VnWMzRJLLWalbcUYpOv0AGd3gMOP8ichxpD-h856d_P3D05CelkbgP9HhtoIWJUC1rklTXwsTYJjZmUasiyELRXZaWHcuEkVugZ2sJ7x9U8npUK9kjmcNMkjj2tPUxVXzponTB2XHn_xlV1GQvFGC6Slf-jbKZOTspkJdwWBv8tDp8_6K98OJMgsZUnOA7fIrsOP9bapIogq3sK5RIVeGsOksGZdevRQnUUspufpSSC46KNUALmSL2tRHwDuseVVzL6eKism) [**READ THE PLAN**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=7075c5dad64349cdaf6d92f7cf2a1297&_e=OLtxgiUXoM01Dij-lJ6NVOy98oBgH-IhX4z1jENHledNrGUzUPYSDUY8EeKctlRFPXNDPGf1uSVqHGlRsgaFhs0V7zieJ6BID1B1A0h72LE1uF4rI_pViKdDq08U9hWSHhh3pQfP2uUcjHmlezicjyTEDXlQVGU6fIJGt84-GLV1STnw1-vw1Yb9VnWMzRJLLWalbcUYpOv0AGd3gMOP8ichxpD-h856d_P3D05CelnWgbQOUn5Qgtf-vt7zLAJzl1oeqbObzD8FgrOyiUdfhRe2zIdQbb3hoT1hJGrhyR4Wze5jp0s9yaufpSPXejDs68kGr3oKjpKOLC6tdqWNP7115a0TVQW3op4GHcQGHPKBaLPMyFtyWhyJavo2gOXtVnvPoBFmEqqN-d2UR4RkFHB-qFZrptJJcU2IougMT1N6yAIWyi-27YmWWTtFvd9C) Thank You, Rick Scott Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Taking back the U.S. Senate is no small task. 5 Republicans are retiring, and we must win all those races and one more. Please make a [contribution](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=7075c5dad64349cdaf6d92f7cf2a1297&_e=OLtxgiUXoM01Dij-lJ6NVOy98oBgH-IhX4z1jENHledNrGUzUPYSDUY8EeKctlRFjYvXNh2XeHg6B48JTpYm42W-1AL5wyCTx6itRRujJ1oKp5UnHl4Qm9GSAFF_Pu5tOwD9V2Sgi_-YOXAkCJ9rBkoKGHLay9umvjXvqUGpufdlXGdM6hbmntTSxxnSaPntm5-tuLkcZe-wkXJs9dNukv916U_C9JCzyuNDg3MUAR_BFgap5ZVe1VFMU0aOt19P2Pe0pI-IgCaG4m4GpxeBXXLmcml0VU-UnUDiXKsT5kiPziLYmvZVa7vkMcPvBsDn8MwxQHItH_ib4xWvuafqVkuJaFvl9h0sySbZkUfh3ilQhXHfjAONiKHnyPNiBcEl4PKhQP2sjbMTAjEaGZm2FdcdXO_I2galSNdYWoklwH8%3D) today to help our campaign do our part to take back America. Thank you for your ongoing support of me and Senate Republicans.

— President Barack Obama_

clean_body: | | “The midterm elections are on pace to be held on the fairest maps in a generation, but...the gains we’ve made in this redistricting cycle are fragile.” — President Barack Obama = The good news is that, thanks to the work of our grassroots movement, the November congressional elections are on pace to be held on the faireset maps we’ve seen in decades. That’s huge! But the bad news is that Republicans are desperate to protect their gerrymandering schemes, and they’re fighting back with everything they’ve got.That means we’re still at risk of losing ground. Our work isn’t done yet, so we can’t let our guard down. Will you pitch in now to help us protect the gains we’ve made from Republican efforts to manipulate maps and undermine elections? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Daniel Wasta
subject: I'm the luckiest guy in the world
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Hi there, it's Abby's husband, Daniel. When this photo of Abby was taken, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) had already been in Washington for well over a decade. She had no idea that she'd grow up to challenge him. Back then, she was living in a small, rural town in eastern Iowa called Sherrill. Today, it's still one of her favorite places in the whole world – and it has become one of mine, too.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45115376/344536103/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk847-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWI0NDExMC1lNGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6n1VNYuaIeXrGRnOrapKVSb2kEMLmI6wo8pWVbGBfug=)
Abby was raised in a working family: her dad was a union pipefitter-welder, and her mom worked in the school system. Her parents – Deb and Jerry – are some of the best people I know. They're the ones who taught Abby the values that define her today:** treating people with respect, never thinking you’re better than anyone else, and always saying "yes" when there is work to be done or a problem to solve. [If that's the sort of leader you'd like to send to the U.S. Senate, then chip in a donation of $5 or more now to elect Abby, defeat Chuck Grassley and expand our Democratic majority](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45115377/344536105/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk847-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWI0NDExMC1lNGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6n1VNYuaIeXrGRnOrapKVSb2kEMLmI6wo8pWVbGBfug=).**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45115379/344536106/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk847-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWI0NDExMC1lNGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6n1VNYuaIeXrGRnOrapKVSb2kEMLmI6wo8pWVbGBfug=)
When Abby's community needed a fighter in the Iowa State House, she stepped up and won her first election at only 25. **Just four years later, she ran for Congress and became the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue.** Within her first two weeks in Congress, amidst a government shutdown, Abby became the youngest woman to pass a bill through the House of Representatives with her legislation to help small businesses, especially those in rural America.**[__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45115381/344536108/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk847-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWI0NDExMC1lNGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6n1VNYuaIeXrGRnOrapKVSb2kEMLmI6wo8pWVbGBfug=)****[_If you want to see a young woman continue to get things done for the American people, then donate $5 now to elect my wife, Abby, as Iowa's next U.S. senator._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45115383/344536110/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk847-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWI0NDExMC1lNGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6n1VNYuaIeXrGRnOrapKVSb2kEMLmI6wo8pWVbGBfug=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45115386/344536112/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk847-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWI0NDExMC1lNGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6n1VNYuaIeXrGRnOrapKVSb2kEMLmI6wo8pWVbGBfug=)
Witnessing Abby’s service to Iowa and our country while she was in Congress was inspiring. Abby respected her office, took her responsibilities seriously, and never deviated from her deeply held values of public service. We deserve more leaders like Abby.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45115388/344536115/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk847-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWI0NDExMC1lNGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6n1VNYuaIeXrGRnOrapKVSb2kEMLmI6wo8pWVbGBfug=)
**I'm already the luckiest guy in the world as Abby's husband – and with your help, she'll become my senator, too!****** You see, Sen. Grassley is facing RECORD-LOW approval with Iowa voters, so we've got the best chance in decades to flip this seat blue and elect a real fighter for working families here in Iowa.**[__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45115390/344536117/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk847-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWI0NDExMC1lNGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6n1VNYuaIeXrGRnOrapKVSb2kEMLmI6wo8pWVbGBfug=)****[_Abby can only win with major grassroots support, and she needs your help to reach her $5,000 midnight fundraising goal. So, will you rush a donation of $5 or more now to seize this momentum, defeat Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45115392/344536119/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk847-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWI0NDExMC1lNGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6n1VNYuaIeXrGRnOrapKVSb2kEMLmI6wo8pWVbGBfug=)**
Abby's story is about service, community and understanding the value of hard work. She's never backed down from a challenge, and she's proven the naysayers wrong time and time again.
I know she can win this race: the polling data shows Iowans are ready for change, and no one is going to work harder than Abby to flip this seat – **but the GOP is sitting on a war chest of more than $44 MILLION to defeat challengers like her and take back the Senate.** She can only compete with those resources with you by her side.
**[So please, will you donate $5, or whatever you can spare, before midnight tonight to stand with Abby so she can defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our majority? This is a grassroots campaign, so Abby and I are really counting on your donation tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45115394/344536121/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk847-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWI0NDExMC1lNGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6n1VNYuaIeXrGRnOrapKVSb2kEMLmI6wo8pWVbGBfug=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45115396/344536123/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk847-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWI0NDExMC1lNGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6n1VNYuaIeXrGRnOrapKVSb2kEMLmI6wo8pWVbGBfug=)
---
Thank you,

Daniel
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45115398/344536125/428800054?refcode=jtk847-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWI0NDExMC1lNGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6n1VNYuaIeXrGRnOrapKVSb2kEMLmI6wo8pWVbGBfug=&emci=19a38df0-78cd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=aab44110-e4cf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=13784334)

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45115163/344535547/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmEzNDNjYi1lM2NmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NL93Jz0y9YWeUINz41R7jkL0xnmV0PvGOEjlQJDRw_I=&emci=37ca5f66-c9cf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3fa343cb-e3cf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=11385749)

Hi Peter,

California primary ballots will be arriving in voters' mailboxes TODAY for the June 7th primary. (If you're in CA, you can get voting information, including how to register, **[by going to the California Secretary of State's website.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45115164/344535548/-1136299304?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmEzNDNjYi1lM2NmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NL93Jz0y9YWeUINz41R7jkL0xnmV0PvGOEjlQJDRw_I=&emci=37ca5f66-c9cf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3fa343cb-e3cf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=11385749))**

You’d be hard-pressed to find a candidate more out-of-touch with hardworking Ohioans than JD Vance. He’s endorsed by Donald Trump and has the backing of Silicon Valley billionaire Peter Thiel’s $13.5 million super PAC.
But even with all of that on his side, I have a one-point lead on him in the polls—proving we have the momentum to flip Ohio blue. **But I’m going to need a whole lot of help because the stakes of our battleground race just got a lot higher.**
Now that the Supreme Court vote to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ has been leaked, we can’t afford to let JD anywhere near the Senate. He called pregnancy from rape “inconvenient” and said overturning _Roe_ would be a “victory.”
**JD has the full backing of the entire Republican Party on his side, and they’ve committed to spending hundreds of millions to try to take back Senate control.**

clean_body: Now that the Supreme Court vote to overturn Roe, we can't afford to let JD anywhere near the Senate. | | | Friend, it’s official—I’ll be facing millionaire right-wing extremist JD Vance in November. Bring it on. But before I go any further, I need your immediate help. = | | = You’d be hard-pressed to find a candidate more out-of-touch with hardworking Ohioans than JD Vance. He’s endorsed by Donald Trump and has the backing of Silicon Valley billionaire Peter Thiel’s $13.5 million super PAC. But even with all of that on his side, I have a one-point lead on him in the polls—proving we have the momentum to flip Ohio blue. But I’m going to need a whole lot of help because the stakes of our battleground race just got a lot higher. Now that the Supreme Court vote to overturn Roe v. Wade has been leaked, we can’t afford to let JD anywhere near the Senate. He called pregnancy from rape “inconvenient” and said overturning Roe would be a “victory.” JD has the full backing of the entire Republican Party on his side, and they’ve committed to spending hundreds of millions to try to take back Senate control. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Tim Ryan and Jacky Rosen: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Having JD Vance in the Senate would be terrible for Ohio, and I need your help defeating him so we can invest in Ohio families and finally cut workers in on the deal. This is the big one—so let’s do this. Happy to have you in my corner, —Tim = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Teller County Officials Endorse Erik
body:
Four county leaders!
| | | | | Endorsement | May 9, 2022
---
|
---
| Teller County Leaders endorse Erik Aadland
---
| Here is the latest from the Aadland for Congress newsroom:
(May 9, 2022) Today, decorated Combat Veteran and Republican candidate for Congress Erik Aadland announces the formal endorsements from Teller County leaders: Commissioners Dan Williams and Bob Campbell, Sheriff Jason Mikesell and Treasurer Mark Czelusta.
---
| |
---
Dan Williams Teller County Commissioner
---
|
---
Bob Campbell Teller County Commissioner
---
| |
---
Jason Mikesel Teller County Sheriff
---
|
---
Mark Czelusta Teller County Treasurer
---
|
---
| |
---
| "I am overwhelmingly grateful for the endorsement and support of these notable Teller County leaders," stated Aadland. "Each of these men have achieved distinguished careers in service to Colorado and this nation and their deep concern and passion for their country and state is a testament to their selflessness. Receiving the endorsements of such strong voices of conservativism and virtue is truly humbling."
---
|
---
| |
---
| | [Send Erik your Feedback](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ljG2BMrMQXVlXSoLIvBopHKXSbZCxO6Y62_fZvwqtfWeOEmG4Bx-pLPF5Ib9UdJW0C5yxCXiogUnDhMw2zGLVWrMa7NW_r0Q_wkxH6jhxSbWgEe5670JULXIGcij9RwUOaVx13l8EqjjVwLaEx_gjc--l03w3nA24T5Y9loJbIRwzQuVyxWHaN_PdhRJgenY3Ze5QSqw8x2XWamQPs-fvKlmkGjr69mDKIC7WFJNN-xaQ2eaxDbJfRjzB69mpEpeXe5VyFyH6Mc=&c=6CmJ3nTPT4QOOstmngckCnIEOVfE4TMO6yFcjxTr5leJKXzp4mL8pA==&ch=aycCdC5y5HqtIOwkQbF7yLPllYiPbXz9aL2At4uVKp6NzI0uAAztmQ==)
---
| |
---
| About Erik Aadland
---
Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children.
---
|
---
| About Aadland For Congress:
---
Erik's effort to represent Colorado District 7 (CD7) is a true grass-roots campaign.
There is no family fortune behind this drive; no generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization.
Volunteers and professionals began joining the cause to help send Erik to Washington in June of 2021. Staff personnel now cross the spectrum of political pundits, professionals, friends and neighbors.
If you are interested in an Area Coordinator opportunity with Erik's campaign, use the link below to send your information, or contact
[staff@aadlandforcolorado.com](mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com)
---
| [Learn about being an Area Coordinator](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ljG2BMrMQXVlXSoLIvBopHKXSbZCxO6Y62_fZvwqtfWeOEmG4Bx-pDh4MAYhqbD7tSHjiDUE4175fzncWChgD7zCjk1BrIujbA7llSnfPCW2r4UMqiV75YDw6qb2PhZnPAYTNzJH7PF6Uap79FS5RojyjWo5akBuJjMG9cxaYHVmnjRK22my0lEvQ8u7I_F7_DQUXVy1liU2CHS1qhG1eXH7IYga8ZoNqGq5b8acJX9W5m_64fUGcwPRr9pURIwAMWe-oRyiEtc=&c=6CmJ3nTPT4QOOstmngckCnIEOVfE4TMO6yFcjxTr5leJKXzp4mL8pA==&ch=aycCdC5y5HqtIOwkQbF7yLPllYiPbXz9aL2At4uVKp6NzI0uAAztmQ==)

clean_body: Four county leaders! | | | | | Endorsement | May 9, 2022 | | Teller County Leaders endorse Erik Aadland | Here is the latest from the Aadland for Congress newsroom: (May 9, 2022) Today, decorated Combat Veteran and Republican candidate for Congress Erik Aadland announces the formal endorsements from Teller County leaders: Commissioners Dan Williams and Bob Campbell, Sheriff Jason Mikesell and Treasurer Mark Czelusta. | | Dan Williams Teller County Commissioner | Bob Campbell Teller County Commissioner | | Jason Mikesel Teller County Sheriff | Mark Czelusta Teller County Treasurer | | | | "I am overwhelmingly grateful for the endorsement and support of these notable Teller County leaders," stated Aadland. "Each of these men have achieved distinguished careers in service to Colorado and this nation and their deep concern and passion for their country and state is a testament to their selflessness. Receiving the endorsements of such strong voices of conservativism and virtue is truly humbling." | | | | | == | | | About Erik Aadland Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children. | | About Aadland For Congress: Erik's effort to represent Colorado District 7 (CD7) is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive; no generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization. Volunteers and professionals began joining the cause to help send Erik to Washington in June of 2021. Staff personnel now cross the spectrum of political pundits, professionals, friends and neighbors. If you are interested in an Area Coordinator opportunity with Erik's campaign, use the link below to send your information, or contact mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com | == | | | == == == | PO Box 630552 Littleton, co 80163 (720) 464 4488 | | | | | | | Aadland For Congress | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | == Sent by mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com powered by == ==

body:
---
| | Team,

Our moment of truth is fast approaching, and we’re getting feisty — we’re running [this ad](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45116040/344538825/247910864?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_220509_1_1&refcode2=f6d0fdb1-e7cf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmQwZmRiMS1lN2NmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HM5U9rti9vJK8o2MOZpRNsExnqilUtBEpg2y2S8bagI=) during the Bucks game **_tonight!_**
