Peter,

When people ask Kelly and me why we keep going, and why we are still compelled to serve in public office, no matter how difficult the days, our answer is simple: _“This is for our children. For ALL of our children and grandchildren.”_

There is a very real question right now whether they will be able to enjoy the same liberty, security and opportunity that we have. **Freedom is imperiled today and there is a crisis at every turn.**

Kelly and I have four amazing kids ages 20 to 11, and we give our all every day to try to ensure that we can pass along the blessings of liberty to Hannah, Abby, Jack and Will, and everyone in the generation of Americans that follows us. I am certain that you share that same conviction.

[ ](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=ebbe4b15ceef4c4eb5edfa7cc7f5e7af&_e=eAd2cD13W7el77LU8ya3vDO2ohHFE9jnwjgPt_gwn92nIkCpp00vF7q7f6gYK8Pm7Mqe-betxRus4LBBfANcuB0cRsNcOhXeLli-iq3ihqcmTC9tvSq8U9WHoRVBBlmmgwkZFkUK-Vj3TiHoygsyIzrJdg7nz1zWi_eMCzLdkXwHa1gx4st5ANugR135ettB00k9j5pJJnExWTnZKT5KCkeSdgcY5glRuBT91QTTLdsBCWTvYH5mkyuWHvRjH3NuxdFQ9WrNUUqtcZzYDqjJPN8mRerTavsSjZ1IWA_HD5YsomsHah7lQ6ZHW2d__Evmle_Rz4mGS1tYpE8cPXos0SDAhTgu7KbVN03dVGpEI10Vgb7jlRNrbJEFDQVHs67v)
But Peter, the life that Kelly and I dreamed of giving to our kids is being threatened as we speak. Our economy is declining due to the Left’s absurd spending habits, our kids are being taught divisive ideologies in school, crime is raging in our cities, and freedom in America is disintegrating before our own eyes.

[**This is not the America I want my kids to grow up in, and this is not the America I want to hand off to the next generation.**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=ebbe4b15ceef4c4eb5edfa7cc7f5e7af&_e=eAd2cD13W7el77LU8ya3vDO2ohHFE9jnwjgPt_gwn92nIkCpp00vF7q7f6gYK8Pm7Mqe-betxRus4LBBfANcuB0cRsNcOhXeLli-iq3ihqcmTC9tvSq8U9WHoRVBBlmmgwkZFkUK-Vj3TiHoygsyIzrJdg7nz1zWi_eMCzLdkXz_nGy9NZcIVJCdAvArovwh9z2agzyQwEUlZPOToOvLDzCGP2K3GrYppPqGzYtivXwJ6SUQbKO9QVv1q9lMqa-Hd5Sy_3i20UK4qdgcw3cKs78IM4eNxW5cz_PLtMU1ktgJm-H3uwreC932NYc9xLVxUtC28AjMaoQjlDg0l0bcfHpBK2PojmagTGGT9xtRuxHILHtD_EsqCQz6MSSrPwBG)

[ **HELP MIKE SAVE AMERICA ➞ ** ](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=ebbe4b15ceef4c4eb5edfa7cc7f5e7af&_e=eAd2cD13W7el77LU8ya3vDO2ohHFE9jnwjgPt_gwn92nIkCpp00vF7q7f6gYK8Pm7Mqe-betxRus4LBBfANcuB0cRsNcOhXeLli-iq3ihqcmTC9tvSq8U9WHoRVBBlmmgwkZFkUK-Vj3TiHoygsyIzrJdg7nz1zWi_eMCzLdkXzSty2ge4dhD4aqS4BLksJoNB0kK2LaF0lodKBaEgkuwooo0YzF1kOz71BWCVElFbEQujdivb6Y63kOWz2IOIWN8GquYEsZyibZdGEkBjRzgKH5nh5MWP7H2fCfqPjMY-XYQuPp3MAKc1lhD_Ul_vAtYy8WzAPEQH2WoNROJu2hCH-l48n-90feoAJ5YMYu-spvEcIhkFDuWl5r6rWStjHr)
As a parent, I should have a say about what my child learns about in school – especially about matters of sexual education. Simply put: parents should not be labeled as “terrorists” by the government for simply protecting their kids.

The Left has turned many classrooms into places of indoctrination, where students are being taught to hate themselves and their country. Frankly, the agenda that Democrats are peddling on our children is un-American.

But we don’t have to accept this as our reality – [**there’s still time to fix this. I need your help, though.**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=ebbe4b15ceef4c4eb5edfa7cc7f5e7af&_e=eAd2cD13W7el77LU8ya3vDO2ohHFE9jnwjgPt_gwn92nIkCpp00vF7q7f6gYK8Pm7Mqe-betxRus4LBBfANcuB0cRsNcOhXeLli-iq3ihqcmTC9tvSq8U9WHoRVBBlmmgwkZFkUK-Vj3TiHoygsyIzrJdg7nz1zWi_eMCzLdkXz32A8eui6IG4eFul8RgLwRZV5xWZr0z1bmot4khcop7GEkp1nmtnrLSzhvPb0APA2oko5R3JWwpxR_Ace5sVCKvSs3ck9is_uap9iP5jMRhDwCuAMUfYdaiuW6cPPM2qk_7ieVQBF8-ih6zB4bVxqSNMTPgdRMnBeimRGhQ2mxKOfSBYV--aZd-0PKXdlIkdizWMakAdkUA-A9ZmsXnhJ9)

This race that we’re running—and this entire election cycle election in November— is about more than you and me. It’s about more than easing the economic burden of Joe Biden’s policies, removing the drugs and crime from our streets, and securing our borders.

clean_body: When people ask Kelly and me why we keep going, and why we are still compelled to serve in public office, no matter how difficult the days, our answer is simple: “This is for our children. For ALL of our children and grandchildren.” | Peter, When people ask Kelly and me why we keep going, and why we are still compelled to serve in public office, no matter how difficult the days, our answer is simple: “This is for our children. For ALL of our children and grandchildren.” There is a very real question right now whether they will be able to enjoy the same liberty, security and opportunity that we have. Freedom is imperiled today and there is a crisis at every turn. Kelly and I have four amazing kids ages 20 to 11, and we give our all every day to try to ensure that we can pass along the blessings of liberty to Hannah, Abby, Jack and Will, and everyone in the generation of Americans that follows us. I am certain that you share that same conviction. But Peter, the life that Kelly and I dreamed of giving to our kids is being threatened as we speak. Our economy is declining due to the Left’s absurd spending habits, our kids are being taught divisive ideologies in school, crime is raging in our cities, and freedom in America is disintegrating before our own eyes. As a parent, I should have a say about what my child learns about in school – especially about matters of sexual education. Simply put: parents should not be labeled as “terrorists” by the government for simply protecting their kids. The Left has turned many classrooms into places of indoctrination, where students are being taught to hate themselves and their country. Frankly, the agenda that Democrats are peddling on our children is un-American. But we don’t have to accept this as our reality – This race that we’re running—and this entire election cycle election in November— is about more than you and me. It’s about more than easing the economic burden of Joe Biden’s policies, removing the drugs and crime from our streets, and securing our borders. This election is about saving our country so that we have something to give to the next generation. When Kelly and I dreamed of our future, we certainly didn’t envision co-parenting with the government. As parents and patriots, we must make a change. First as a father and second as a public servant, it’s my duty to advocate for my children and yours. It’s time to do something. - God bless, Mike Johnson | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We need every single person reading this email to take action in defense of Roe v. Wade.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45116275/344539531/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk995-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzcyZTk0My1lOGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t3Zf1uQISN25mj2M45rYvNuylWBdVp1iPs_KZnJCaQ0=)

Hello,

My team often says we don’t need every single person reading an email to take action – that we don’t expect them to.

Today, that’s not true.
We need every single person reading this email to take action in defense of _Roe v. Wade_. More below, but if you’re ready to get involved now, here’s the link to donate: **[secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_email_mw](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45116276/344539532/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk995-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzcyZTk0My1lOGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t3Zf1uQISN25mj2M45rYvNuylWBdVp1iPs_KZnJCaQ0=)**.

Republicans across the country and conservatives on the Supreme Court are launching unprecedented efforts to eviscerate reproductive rights. And in state legislatures, Republicans have passed legislation defunding Planned Parenthood, banning abortion, and mandating unnecessary ultrasounds.
I’ll keep fighting for reproductive rights – no matter what attacks come my way. I'll be blunt: I need you to take action too. [**Join me by rushing an urgent donation of $3 or any amount to my reelection campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45116277/344539534/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk995-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzcyZTk0My1lOGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t3Zf1uQISN25mj2M45rYvNuylWBdVp1iPs_KZnJCaQ0=)
Efforts to codify _Roe_ into law won’t go anywhere without a Democratic Senate majority. My last race was the closest in the country, and if I lose here in New Hampshire, we’ll lose Democrats’ control of the Senate too.

Thank you for your strength, and thank you for taking action. I know this is tough and that it’s easy to feel hopeless. Please know that I’m fighting right here alongside you.

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

body:
as long as we continue to stand strong and stand together, we can take on anything they throw our way and WIN!
#

Hi,
We’re writing to ask you to make a $5 contribution to Alex Padilla’s campaign for U.S. Senate. But first, we hope you’ll give us a chance to explain why your contribution — _particularly right now_ — is so important to our success.
Alex is already facing millions of dollars in spending from a billionaire opponent, and with less than one month to go until the primary election, Republicans’ attacks are only going to ramp up from here.
**It’s incredibly important that we’re able to take on the deep-pocketed Republicans and special interests who are coming after this seat and keep Alex in the Senate, so we are asking you directly:**
[**Can you please make a $5 contribution to Alex’s people-powered campaign today? Every donation will go right toward the organizing and on-the-ground outreach that it’s going to take to win this race.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may22?refcode=em220509-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=794_159979__hyF7p&akid=794%2E159979%2E_hyF7p)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may22?refcode=em220509-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=794_159979__hyF7p&akid=794%2E159979%2E_hyF7p)**
The unfortunate truth is that Republicans here in California and across the country are more committed to preserving the status quo than solving the urgent problems we’re facing.
But as long as we continue to stand strong and stand together, we can take on anything they throw our way and WIN.
Thank you for doing your part to keep Alex in the Senate.
\- Team Padilla

name: =?utf-8?Q?DNC=20Community=20Engagement?=
subject: Reproductive Rights Under Attack
body:
SCOTUS to possibly overturn Roe v. Wade | | |
---
| | | |
---
|
---
|
##
**May 9, 2022**
---
| Dear Friends,

Last week, it became known that the Supreme Court of the United States plans to overturn Roe v. Wade, which grants reproductive freedom to all Americans. Roe has been in place for nearly fifty years and has ensured the fundamental right of pregnant people to have control over their own bodies. This opinion would be a devastating blow to reproductive rights and Americans’ fundamental freedom to make their own health care decisions.

Let’s be very clear: ending Roe does not end abortions. It ends access to safe and legal abortions for vulnerable communities nationwide. Democrats want to protect the right to choose and keep these decisions between an individual and their doctor, while Republicans have tirelessly prioritized taking away that right, advocating for a dangerous and harmful agenda.

Ending Roe means as many as 26 states could move quickly to ban abortion – including 13 states with “trigger” laws that could immediately go into effect – leaving tens of millions of Americans without control over their own bodies.

And this isn’t just about Roe or the right to choose. This decision to topple legal precedent would also be also a decision to weaken the basis of fundamental rights for all Americans.
If you are interested in getting involved in a local event or sharing your story with the Democratic Party, please visit www.democrats.org/protect-roe/ to find ways to get involved and fight back against dangerous bans.

Progress is rarely linear, nor expeditious – but in this long arc of the moral universe, only we can bend it toward justice. It is time for us to stand up for the fundamental rights of everyone in this country.

Sincerely,
Brencia Berry
Director of Coalitions and Community Engagement
Democratic National Committee
---
|
---
| | | | **The DNC released the following statement in response to reporting that the Supreme Court plans to overturn Roe v. Wade:**
“If this report is true and the Supreme Court votes to overturn Roe v. Wade, it would deal a devastating blow to reproductive rights and Americans’ fundamental freedom to make their own decisions about their health care and families. For decades, the Supreme Court has upheld precedent and protected access to safe, legal abortions, as well as the privacy of a decision made between women and their doctor. Now, due to extremist Republicans and conservative justices on the Supreme Court, women could lose access to the health care they need and that the overwhelming majority of Americans support.

“Make no mistake: reproductive rights will be on the ballot and this midterm election is more important now than ever before. Voters will make their voices heard, we will fight back with everything we have, and Republicans will have to answer for their party’s relentless attacks on Americans’ rights.”

---
|
---
| **Statement by President Joe Biden**
We do not know whether this draft is genuine, or whether it reflects the final decision of the Court.

With that critical caveat, I want to be clear on three points about the cases before the Supreme Court.

First, my administration argued strongly before the Court in defense of Roe v. Wade. We said that Roe is based on “a long line of precedent recognizing ‘the Fourteenth Amendment’s concept of personal liberty’... against government interference with intensely personal decisions.” I believe that a woman’s right to choose is fundamental, Roe has been the law of the land for almost fifty years, and basic fairness and the stability of our law demand that it not be overturned.

Second, shortly after the enactment of Texas law SB 8 and other laws restricting women’s reproductive rights, I directed my Gender Policy Council and White House Counsel’s Office to prepare options for an Administration response to the continued attack on abortion and reproductive rights, under a variety of possible outcomes in the cases pending before the Supreme Court. We will be ready when any ruling is issued.

Third, if the Court does overturn Roe, it will fall on our nation’s elected officials at all levels of government to protect a woman’s right to choose. And it will fall on voters to elect pro-choice officials this November. At the federal level, we will need more pro-choice Senators and a pro-choice majority in the House to adopt legislation that codifies Roe, which I will work to pass and sign into law.
###
_____________________________________________________________________

**Statement by Vice President Kamala Harris **
The United States Supreme Court has now confirmed that the draft opinion that would overturn Roe v. Wade is genuine.

Roe ensures a woman’s right to choose to have an abortion. It also, at its root, protects the fundamental right to privacy. What is clear is that opponents of Roe want to punish women and take away their rights to make decisions about their own bodies. Republican legislators in states across the country are weaponizing the use of the law against women.

The rights of all Americans are at risk. If the right to privacy is weakened, every person could face a future in which the government can potentially interfere in the personal decisions you make about your life. This is the time to fight for women and for our country with everything we have.
###
---

clean_body: SCOTUS to possibly overturn Roe v. Wade | | | | | | | | | May 9, 2022 | Dear Friends, Last week, it became known that the Supreme Court of the United States plans to overturn Roe v. Wade, which grants reproductive freedom to all Americans. Roe has been in place for nearly fifty years and has ensured the fundamental right of pregnant people to have control over their own bodies. This opinion would be a devastating blow to reproductive rights and Americans’ fundamental freedom to make their own health care decisions. Let’s be very clear: ending Roe does not end abortions. It ends access to safe and legal abortions for vulnerable communities nationwide. Democrats want to protect the right to choose and keep these decisions between an individual and their doctor, while Republicans have tirelessly prioritized taking away that right, advocating for a dangerous and harmful agenda. Ending Roe means as many as 26 states could move quickly to ban abortion – including 13 states with “trigger” laws that could immediately go into effect – leaving tens of millions of Americans without control over their own bodies. And this isn’t just about Roe or the right to choose. This decision to topple legal precedent would also be also a decision to weaken the basis of fundamental rights for all Americans. If you are interested in getting involved in a local event or sharing your story with the Democratic Party, please visit www.democrats.org/protect-roe/ to find ways to get involved and fight back against dangerous bans. Progress is rarely linear, nor expeditious – but in this long arc of the moral universe, only we can bend it toward justice. It is time for us to stand up for the fundamental rights of everyone in this country. Sincerely, Brencia Berry Director of Coalitions and Community Engagement Democratic National Committee | | | | | The DNC released the following statement in response to reporting that the Supreme Court plans to overturn Roe v. Wade: “If this report is true and the Supreme Court votes to overturn Roe v. Wade, it would deal a devastating blow to reproductive rights and Americans’ fundamental freedom to make their own decisions about their health care and families. For decades, the Supreme Court has upheld precedent and protected access to safe, legal abortions, as well as the privacy of a decision made between women and their doctor. Now, due to extremist Republicans and conservative justices on the Supreme Court, women could lose access to the health care they need and that the overwhelming majority of Americans support. “Make no mistake: reproductive rights will be on the ballot and this midterm election is more important now than ever before. Voters will make their voices heard, we will fight back with everything we have, and Republicans will have to answer for their party’s relentless attacks on Americans’ rights.” | | Statement by President Joe Biden We do not know whether this draft is genuine, or whether it reflects the final decision of the Court. With that critical caveat, I want to be clear on three points about the cases before the Supreme Court. First, my administration argued strongly before the Court in defense of Roe v. Wade. We said that Roe is based on “a long line of precedent recognizing ‘the Fourteenth Amendment’s concept of personal liberty’... against government interference with intensely personal decisions.” I believe that a woman’s right to choose is fundamental, Roe has been the law of the land for almost fifty years, and basic fairness and the stability of our law demand that it not be overturned. Second, shortly after the enactment of Texas law SB 8 and other laws restricting women’s reproductive rights, I directed my Gender Policy Council and White House Counsel’s Office to prepare options for an Administration response to the continued attack on abortion and reproductive rights, under a variety of possible outcomes in the cases pending before the Supreme Court. We will be ready when any ruling is issued. Third, if the Court does overturn Roe, it will fall on our nation’s elected officials at all levels of government to protect a woman’s right to choose. And it will fall on voters to elect pro-choice officials this November. At the federal level, we will need more pro-choice Senators and a pro-choice majority in the House to adopt legislation that codifies Roe, which I will work to pass and sign into law. Statement by Vice President Kamala Harris The United States Supreme Court has now confirmed that the draft opinion that would overturn Roe v. Wade is genuine. Roe ensures a woman’s right to choose to have an abortion. It also, at its root, protects the fundamental right to privacy. What is clear is that opponents of Roe want to punish women and take away their rights to make decisions about their own bodies. Republican legislators in states across the country are weaponizing the use of the law against women. The rights of all Americans are at risk. If the right to privacy is weakened, every person could face a future in which the government can potentially interfere in the personal decisions you make about your life. This is the time to fight for women and for our country with everything we have. | | | | Copyright © 2021 DNC Community Engagement, All rights reserved.

Worse, Mitch McConnell just acknowledged that Republicans could pursue a national abortion ban if Roe v. Wade is overturned. With Sinema’s help, a national ban could very well become reality. Sinema can tweet that she supports abortion rights all she wants but here’s the cold hard truth: Sinema is just as bad as Mitch McConnell, Sean Hannity, and the rest of the Republican party. She might even be worse — because she’s made a promise to her constituents and voters across the country that she would protect them and their rights, and instead, she keeps turning her back on them for money and power. Thank you for your support in this key moment, Primary Sinema Project | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC** | | Sent via . name: Andy Ngo
subject: I was nearly killed for exposing Antifa
body:
I was one of the first civilians savagely beaten by lawless Antifa thugs.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7c6e5q75qi2gsurus59goo7mim2v3mc6qff8svo_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj6eoj2clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65shmmqr62ddme9irctth6iqjad74cmrjecbkedprcshgm9q72djmchh6apr1esrrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p34phgmapmadtim9j33c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
My fellow concerned American, I was one of the first civilians savagely beaten by lawless Antifa thugs. And unless we do something to stop them today, I’ll be far from the last. **_[That’s why I’m asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me fund my landmark lawsuit that will bring Antifa and their members to justice.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp4tcajg2c34uu7gs13ke6pou71vn6lacvmj19no_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj6eoj2clh2bs)_** **You see, I was at Antifa’s “ground zero” in the summer of 2019.** This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they’d caused havoc before. I went to an Antifa “protest” as a journalist, to document and report on the event. As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety. The mob was angry and looking for a fight. Most of them wore masks -- and not the kind we’re forced today because of coronavirus. They wanted to act like criminals without getting caught. Many had on helmets and makeshift armor. Some carried weapons like metal pipes, chains, crowbars, and even bricks. I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on. **People like you needed to know what was happening. ** But I didn’t go unnoticed for long. Somebody recognized me and jeers quickly rose through the crowd. “F*** you, Andy Ngo!” and “Go home, fascist!” I tried to escape, but it was too late. **Projectiles started flying. Then came the fists. ** Before I knew it, I was being punched, kicked, and hit with flying objects. I tried to protect my head, but I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger. Not to mention they stole my camera. What they did to me is unacceptable. But this last summer, it became much worse than I could’ve ever imagined as Antifa set fire to entire cities for weeks on end. **And now, we’re watching Antifa and similar groups threaten mass riots and violence across the country.** **[Will you donate $35 or more to help me cover the costs of my lawsuit against Antifa?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaonhml375n7knfbtc5tp02jb86ltp2pntsn3cfg_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj6eoj2clh2bs)** This is bigger than me alone. You see, after I got away from the mob, police finally showed up to question me, but my attackers stole all my evidence. Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured the attack, clear as day. I hoped I’d get the justice I deserved. Wrong. To this day, over a year later, my attackers are walking free. Portland police did nothing. No charges. No convictions. No justice. It’s not much of a surprise, though. You see, radical politicians have long-since bowed to the dangerous mob that terrorizes their streets. And now, as you and I are watching Antifa’s nationwide takeover, more and more politicians across the country are following suit. It’s so bad that the justice system is buckling under the pressure of threats of violence from these disgusting thugs. We have to stop them and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family. **[That’s why I hope you’ll join the fight by donating $35 or more to fund my landmark lawsuit against Antifa and their members.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt2j3l7ifi1t489mgekj9b4suhfqo63uig29jubo_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj6eoj2clh2bs)** Because Antifa wants the end of America as we know it -- and they’ll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that’s not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse – open anarchists who want to tear down our society and remake it in their own twisted vision. By any means necessary, **_Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem. _** And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. It’s a sick strategy, but very smart – because so far, they’ve been right! **For the most part, they’ve gotten off scot-free.**** ** Our politicians and media are treating this deranged terrorist group like peaceful protestors! As we’ve seen, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continues to escape consequences. **So now I’m taking justice into my own hands – with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty. ** And, as I mentioned, we’re suing Portland’s Antifa Chapter. We’ve made a lot of progress in this case, but we’re far from victory. **[You can be a part of bringing Antifa to justice with a donation of $35 or more today.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zovbg8uq97kkong3ueo79kgk6gph12tru4sst0qo_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj6eoj2clh2bs)** Though I’m seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger. This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won’t. This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe. And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver. By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. **[Can I count on you to donate $35 or more to fund this critical lawsuit?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9a2tdveoeea8aqfcofrud8n8g5ut8f0kbdd1qu0_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj6eoj2clh2bs)** Please don’t wait – if we don’t fight back and win now, these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America, destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Andy Ngo Investigative Journalist P.S. I know firsthand that America’s troubles with Antifa aren’t over-- _**they’re just beginning**_. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out.[ Please donate as generously as you can right away.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6q4jksort124nuulikbkb39rr8sq54ve09lqtkg_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj6eoj2clh2bs) [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbp303ir61286qfbqprjn5emf9e2qdkgthf29o3g_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj6eoj2clh2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znm8pdc19iakfo61ubnc61pab7gpuprccr4o07co_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj6eoj2clh2bs) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmjgcl5009botg346v71qomtkttgpp9lh0fa2kg0_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj6eoj2clh2bs) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
© The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zabnsqgn6vt6krt2n9npobp6rhkff91qnfp869qg_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj6eoj2clh2bs) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Stand for those with no voice
body:
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/y3zDouqATsLSt6QTxxytLQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRkXBHEP0SeaHR0cHM6Ly9vZmZlcnMuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvcHJvLWxpZmUtc3RhdGVtZW50Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXByb19saWZlX3N0YXRlbWVudCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1SRVMtMjAyMjA1MDlXA3NwY0IKYnFBZnlihf8NSFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/y3zDouqATsLSt6QTxxytLQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRkXBHEP0SeaHR0cHM6Ly9vZmZlcnMuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvcHJvLWxpZmUtc3RhdGVtZW50Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXByb19saWZlX3N0YXRlbWVudCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1SRVMtMjAyMjA1MDlXA3NwY0IKYnFBZnlihf8NSFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/y3zDouqATsLSt6QTxxytLQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRkXBHEP0SeaHR0cHM6Ly9vZmZlcnMuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvcHJvLWxpZmUtc3RhdGVtZW50Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXByb19saWZlX3N0YXRlbWVudCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1SRVMtMjAyMjA1MDlXA3NwY0IKYnFBZnlihf8NSFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? ~ Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. This message was originally sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Sent to Republican Support subscribers. PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Court Orders FBI To Provide Details on Officials Listed in Strzok Memo That Opened Spy Operation Against Trump
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that a federal court has ordered the FBI to disclose additional details about FBI and other officials “cc-ed” on the memo used to justify launching the “Crossfire Hurricane” spy operation against President Trump and his 2016 presidential campaign.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | May 9, 2022
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58849&L=27326&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmJpLXRvLXByb3ZpZGUtZGV0YWlscy1vbi1vZmZpY2lhbHMtbGlzdGVkLWluLW1lbW8vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) | **[Judicial Watch: Court Orders FBI To Provide Details on Officials Listed in Strzok Memo That Opened Spy Operation Against Trump](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58849&L=27326&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmJpLXRvLXByb3ZpZGUtZGV0YWlscy1vbi1vZmZpY2lhbHMtbGlzdGVkLWluLW1lbW8vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)** Judicial Watch announced recently that a federal court has ordered the FBI to disclose additional details about FBI and other officials “cc-ed” on the memo used to justify launching the “Crossfire Hurricane” spy operation against President Trump and his 2016 presidential campaign. Judge Carl J. Nichols has given the FBI until June 16, 2022 to respond. The order comes in a September 2019 FOIA lawsuit Judicial Watch filed after the FBI failed to respond to a request for the memo, known as an “Electronic Communication” or “EC.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58849&L=27326&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmJpLXRvLXByb3ZpZGUtZGV0YWlscy1vbi1vZmZpY2lhbHMtbGlzdGVkLWluLW1lbW8vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58849&L=27296&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3RhdGVtZW50LW9uLWxlYWstb2YtZHJhZnQtb3Bpbmlvbi1kb2Jicy12LWphY2tzb24tY2FzZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) | **[Judicial Watch Statement on the Leak of the Draft Opinion in the Dobbs v Jackson Case](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58849&L=27296&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3RhdGVtZW50LW9uLWxlYWstb2YtZHJhZnQtb3Bpbmlvbi1kb2Jicy12LWphY2tzb24tY2FzZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)** The leak of the Supreme Court draft opinion on Roe is a dangerous obstruction of justice. And, it could very well lead to intimidation and violence directed at Supreme Court justices. This unprecedented leak fits with the Left’s continued assault against the Supreme Court. As soon as the news of the leaked opinion broke, left-wing protesters were at the Supreme Court. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58849&L=27296&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3RhdGVtZW50LW9uLWxlYWstb2YtZHJhZnQtb3Bpbmlvbi1kb2Jicy12LWphY2tzb24tY2FzZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)

[READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58849&L=27284&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbm9ucHJvZml0LW5vLWJpZC1jb250cmFjdC1hZnRlci1oaXJpbmctYmlkZW4tb2ZmaWNpYWwvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)

| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58849&L=27297&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmFub3BhcnRpY2xlcy1tYXRlcmlhbHMtb3V0c2lkZS1pbmplY3Rpb24tc2l0ZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) | **[Judicial Watch: Pfizer/BioNTech Study Found Lipid Nanoparticles Materials Outside Injection Site in Test Animals](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58849&L=27297&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmFub3BhcnRpY2xlcy1tYXRlcmlhbHMtb3V0c2lkZS1pbmplY3Rpb24tc2l0ZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)** Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 466 pages of records from the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) regarding biodistribution studies and related data for the COVID-19 vaccines that show a key component of the vaccines developed by Pfizer/BioNTech, lipid nanoparticles (LNPs), were found outside the injection site, mainly the liver, adrenal glands, spleen and ovaries of test animals, eight to 48 hours after injection. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58849&L=27297&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmFub3BhcnRpY2xlcy1tYXRlcmlhbHMtb3V0c2lkZS1pbmplY3Rpb24tc2l0ZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)

### [Justice Alito Cancels Public Appearance Amid Roe Leak, Threats ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58849&L=27327&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVzdGljZS1hbGl0by1jYW5jZWxzLXB1YmxpYy1hcHBlYXJhbmNlLWFtaWQtcm9lLWxlYWstdGhyZWF0cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) The Daily Wire U.S. Supreme Court Justice Samuel Alito pulled out of a public appearance Thursday in the wake of the unprecedented leak of his draft majority decision in a case that could reverse the landmark Roe v. Wade case which declared a Constitutional right to abortion. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58849&L=27327&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVzdGljZS1hbGl0by1jYW5jZWxzLXB1YmxpYy1hcHBlYXJhbmNlLWFtaWQtcm9lLWxlYWstdGhyZWF0cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)

### [Judicial Watch: Records Reveal Safety Lapses and Violations at U.S. Biosafety Laboratories that Conduct Research on Dangerous Agents and Toxins ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58849&L=27281&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcmVjb3Jkcy1yZXZlYWwtc2FmZXR5LWxhcHNlcy12aW9sYXRpb25zLWF0LXVzLWxhYnMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) Judicial Watch The Federal Select Agent Program “is jointly comprised of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention/Division of Select Agents and Toxins and the Animal and Plant Health Inspection Service/Division of Agricultural Select Agents and Toxins. The Federal Select Agent Program oversees the possession, use and transfer of biological select agents and toxins, which have the potential to pose a severe threat to public, animal or plant health or to animal or plant products.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58849&L=27281&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcmVjb3Jkcy1yZXZlYWwtc2FmZXR5LWxhcHNlcy12aW9sYXRpb25zLWF0LXVzLWxhYnMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)
---
### [Biden’s NIH May Have Colluded With University To Downplay Experiments On Babies ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58849&L=27260&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW5zLW5paC1tYXktaGF2ZS1jb2xsdWRlZC13aXRoLXVuaXZlcnNpdHktdG8tZG93bnBsYXktZXhwZXJpbWVudHMtb24tYmFiaWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=) The Daily Caller The National Institutes of Health (NIH) scheduled meetings with the University of Pittsburgh (UP) after a UP leader asked for help deflecting public criticism over its fetal research, according to documents obtained by Judicial Watch.

“Taxpayer funds obviously were being used because there were government officials at NIH working with the University of Pittsburgh to try to mitigate the public outrage at the fetal chop shop that was being run up there with public financing,” Tom Fitton, president of Judicial Watch, told the Daily Caller News Foundation. Judge Carl J. Nichols has given the FBI until June 16, 2022 to respond. The order comes in a September 2019 FOIA lawsuit Judicial Watch filed after the FBI failed to respond to a request for the memo, known as an “Electronic Communication” or “EC.” == ---|--- | | | | | The leak of the Supreme Court draft opinion on Roe is a dangerous obstruction of justice. And, it could very well lead to intimidation and violence directed at Supreme Court justices. This unprecedented leak fits with the Left’s continued assault against the Supreme Court. As soon as the news of the leaked opinion broke, left-wing protesters were at the Supreme Court. ---|--- | | | | == | == A nonprofit that hired a Biden administration official received a huge no-bid government contract that wasted $17 million on unused hotel rooms for illegal immigrants, a federal audit reveals. == ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 466 pages of records from the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) regarding biodistribution studies and related data for the COVID-19 vaccines that show a key component of the vaccines developed by Pfizer/BioNTech, lipid nanoparticles (LNPs), were found outside the injection site, mainly the liver, adrenal glands, spleen and ovaries of test animals, eight to 48 hours after injection. ---|--- | | | The Daily Wire U.S. Supreme Court Justice Samuel Alito pulled out of a public appearance Thursday in the wake of the unprecedented leak of his draft majority decision in a case that could reverse the landmark Roe v. Wade case which declared a Constitutional right to abortion. == Judicial Watch The Federal Select Agent Program “is jointly comprised of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention/Division of Select Agents and Toxins and the Animal and Plant Health Inspection Service/Division of Agricultural Select Agents and Toxins. name: Team Slotkin
subject: An inside look at how we combat attack ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220509&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220509&amount=28]
Team,
Recently, we emailed you about the $6.5 million in television attack ads reserved in Elissa’s new district for the fall. In addition, you may be seeing some negative ads about Elissa while you’re browsing online or checking your social media. That’s because a dark money group called the Congressional Leadership Fund recently bought $165,000 in online ads supporting our opponent, and it won’t be the last time they spend big to prop him up.
Since you’ll probably be seeing these more frequently as Election Day approaches, we wanted to shed some light on what’s usually a pretty muddled process: who are these dark money groups, how do we know what they’re up to, and what do we do about it?
The Congressional Leadership Fund (CLF) is one of the biggest Super PACs dedicated to electing Republicans to the House of Representatives. In 2020, they spent more than $165 million attacking Democrats, and as of April 1 of this month, they’ve already raised more than $103 million for the 2022 cycle – a number that’s bound to skyrocket up as November approaches.
As a Super PAC, the CLF can raise unlimited amounts of money, including from corporations. They can spend unlimited amounts of money too, as long as they don’t directly coordinate with campaigns.
How do we know that they just spent $165,000 on digital ads? Super PACs are required to disclose, within 48 hours, the spending that they do that’s directly in support or opposition of a certain candidate. So, we can see in their public filings that they spent on digital ads supporting our opponent.
But that’s where the trail runs dry. Some digital platforms, like Google and Facebook, require the groups placing political ads to make the content of those ads publicly available. But across the rest of the web, in the many other places where you might encounter advertising (like when you’re reading a news article online), there are no requirements that those ads be cataloged. We don’t know, unless someone sees one and sends it to us, what these ads look like, or who they’re targeted to.
In 2021 alone, well over $3 million was spent by outside groups in Elissa’s race. More than twice that amount was spent against her back in 2018. Given this is going to be one of the most competitive House races in the entire country, we’re anticipating there could be *even more* outside spending.
How do we counteract this? By running a positive campaign focused on the real issues affecting our pocketbooks and our kids. Running an issue oriented campaign takes a lot of time, energy, and resources, which means we rely on contributions from our grassroots supporters.
Will you chip in $10, $15, or $28 to help us counteract the outside groups pouring millions into this race? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220509&amount=28]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220509&amount=28]
Team Slotkin

Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

Hey Peter, With the Primary Election on May 24th, I am reaching out to constituents across Southern Minnesota to humbly ask for your support and tell you more about me, my family, and why I’ve decided to step up and run for Congress. I’m Matt Benda. I am a Christian, a grateful husband to my wife, Heather, and a proud father of two. I am a lifelong resident of Southern Minnesota and was born and raised on a farm in Jackson County.
---

I’ve had the great privilege of serving Southern Minnesota families, farmers, and small businesses as an Agricultural Law, Family, and Small Business attorney for over two decades. Community has always been one of the most important aspects of my life and I’ve worked hard to ensure that Southern Minnesota thrives. As I’ve traveled the district, I’ve heard how important it is to protect our rural way of life. Minnesotans want more money in their pockets, a secure southern border, safe and transparent elections, and energy independence. These issues and more are top priorities for me and I will get to work fixing them on day one. I would be honored to earn your support on May 24th. clean_body: With the Primary Election on May 24th, I am reaching out to constituents across Southern Minnesota to humbly ask for your support and tell you more about me, my family, and why I’ve decided to step up and run for Congress. | | | | | ---|---|--- Hey Peter, With the Primary Election on May 24th, I am reaching out to constituents across Southern Minnesota to humbly ask for your support and tell you more about me, my family, and why I’ve decided to step up and run for Congress. I’m Matt Benda. I am a Christian, a grateful husband to my wife, Heather, and a proud father of two. I am a lifelong resident of Southern Minnesota and was born and raised on a farm in Jackson County. | I’ve had the great privilege of serving Southern Minnesota families, farmers, and small businesses as an Agricultural Law, Family, and Small Business attorney for over two decades. Community has always been one of the most important aspects of my life and I’ve worked hard to ensure that Southern Minnesota thrives. As I’ve traveled the district, I’ve heard how important it is to protect our rural way of life. Minnesotans want more money in their pockets, a secure southern border, safe and transparent elections, and energy independence. These issues and more are top priorities for me and I will get to work fixing them on day one. I would be honored to earn your support on May 24th. If you can’t vote on May 24th, you can learn more about how to vote early God Bless, Matt Benda | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | Paid for by Benda for Congress Matt Benda, 1811 Broadway Avenue SE, Albert Lea, MN 56007

**_THE SOLUTION ➡_**

We don’t need another rambling mouthpiece that labels YOU as a terrorist for wanting a say in _**YOUR**_ child’s education – we need leaders that understand that the best parent for your child is **you** , not the government.

[**I’m running for Congress, to serve the American people,**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=16a2dadc4e334ad49314ac0bf7c5bfe8&_e=BIqhEb8tj-HRurO_sJURZY67nlOUshHxWx9VnFG9bdRP7LfLzFczWAncYxhOkUxB8e0aAn5EvlLIKRnxoT3R5d-vwGgaZh8rXqsO9VuPYIH2CSw8bZxsvgpuqVPqzhKMQFRzGfCWrLVieJ5FWrfck50tsAJM9v8Mt12poumjdx_hcj3Pw0DaA7nrrSY8LXuWkc--kerCXCy27lhVUiyK7n-RNFItWh0B42wb1n_9fdz3x-itk2lIpcD5zlX2yCQTWe4LeNxBxHSSVrEqwIg8KJ8SjlX-gBF45bg24XLJsnPWteyHMcu_XsoLrjCOtPiZSVs783kLfGPOxo80ho4GcAeBiVNJiW89_vVV9EMgsE4Q7sLu-HxbqsPrsSurtyBTf1_ThBhTdXy3Q0Ba-zSnt3oO_lcRuo6u8q0VlLaYqxO_w5epaFUF0eqwNU-P9_FJaIGdIyvwcvFmudW2I1DteJ_n-Y7jpGOsMAsTZTz7W30KI8LDv5TntpKdCNdP3flH) because we sincerely need someone to put their head down and get to work. Here’s something you should know...

I never dreamed of venturing into politics. In fact, I didn’t think I’d be good at it. Why? Because I didn’t grow up in this world where everyone knows everyone, and people live in fancy houses, and regular people can run for office. It’s just not me.

I met my wife when I was in high school, and we dreamed of starting a family. I joined the marines after college to serve my country. _And I thought that was that._

But when our nation started experiencing the early stages of tyranny from Democrat leadership, I knew that what made me so ordinary was going to be the very thing that differentiated me

[**At the end of the day, I’m a family man, a marine, and a political outsider who just wants what is best for our country.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=16a2dadc4e334ad49314ac0bf7c5bfe8&_e=BIqhEb8tj-HRurO_sJURZY67nlOUshHxWx9VnFG9bdRP7LfLzFczWAncYxhOkUxB8e0aAn5EvlLIKRnxoT3R5d-vwGgaZh8rXqsO9VuPYIH2CSw8bZxsvgpuqVPqzhKMQFRzGfCWrLVieJ5FWrfck50tsAJM9v8Mt12poumjdx_hcj3Pw0DaA7nrrSY8LXuWkc--kerCXCy27lhVUiyK7n-RNFItWh0B42wb1n_9fdz3x-itk2lIpcD5zlX2yCQTWe4LeNxBxHSSVrEqwIg8KJ8SjlX-gBF45bg24XLJsnPKi1I0JpWww-NmpgpR38_lcLRFy-K4TX_qvn4Wr_qKdk2yvGbID0mV8quABWQoXNnsDLQNvEuREhKrCODzPt8QxkzdngJUcqDlASkK84vPp4DbqSkvpfxgduwDkVBHh9OQ8B9is4OdjNrAq78mP_9LJiJHQeU2sH56PM4PCKVBBJ8U77ImJurwIP--pMhMp1y16KqYDz2P68VwOEK0kU0E) If you think DC needs another slick, fast-talking, boarding-school educated congressman, then honestly, I’m not your guy.

I believe in sitting down for dinner with my family, hanging out with my neighbors, going to my daughter’s dance recitals, and being proud of the work that I do.

The solution to the problem in Washington: [**regular ordinary people, like me going there and getting things done.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=16a2dadc4e334ad49314ac0bf7c5bfe8&_e=BIqhEb8tj-HRurO_sJURZY67nlOUshHxWx9VnFG9bdRP7LfLzFczWAncYxhOkUxB8e0aAn5EvlLIKRnxoT3R5d-vwGgaZh8rXqsO9VuPYIH2CSw8bZxsvgpuqVPqzhKMQFRzGfCWrLVieJ5FWrfck50tsAJM9v8Mt12poumjdx_hcj3Pw0DaA7nrrSY8LXuWkc--kerCXCy27lhVUiyK7n-RNFItWh0B42wb1n_9fdz3x-itk2lIpcD5zlX2yCQTWe4LeNxBxHSSVrEqwIg8KJ8SjlX-gBF45bg24XLJsnMK31wDdnB6TA_qs67f2Qo5IN_bKIuM4vemqT3dTXnT3Wcgew8KeP-An_2iXSgYYKcug_ecIe5GB1cYGWZatDGBBPdIOIOgJiC-bo3LjGI9e-KAoYJyfwwRBXBAYpH_iY5I_3Tb6GIOUZZaX1bGrxfSlX1sHAkKEDU-gJ9ol0TSvqH6d4hp8xmbRDcGXkIbbSNA6r5brSPQMzNiTggLm6zd)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20LaPierre?=
subject: THE VISION OF OUR FOUNDING FATHERS!
body:
THE VISION OF OUR FOUNDING FATHERS! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/30fdf37e4459/happy-new-year-6077553?e=6582090d83)
---
|
---
**TO: SOUTH CAROLINA REPUBLICANS** Dear Fellow Republicans, District 4 Citizens, and Brothers and Sisters in Christ,
The necessity of our day is to reclaim the American spirit of our Founding Fathers where the tie that binds our hearts and our national character is a faith and a confidence that is evident to us all.
This pragmatic populism of yesteryear of which I speak was undergirded with an unwavering faith in God Almighty. We must unite our Republican Party and rejoice in the conservative values found in our party platform.
We must be leery of anyone or anything that takes us away from the principles found in the Constitution, the principles found in our Republican Party Platform, and most importantly, the principles found in the very Word of God.
The LaPierre for House campaign team has been very deliberate and purposeful to incorporate these values into our political strategy, while denouncing Secular Marxism and denouncing those political practices that shut down the voices of those willing to serve and put themselves in harms-way during a primary contest.
All voices must be heard! Censorship, limiting the voices of our opponents, and canceling the thoughts of others, no matter how repulsive, is not the American way.
To this I say.....Long live the South Carolina Republican Party and long live the vision of our Founding Fathers. I pray that each of us be about the business of serving the GOD of our fathers and mothers and NOT the god(s) of our own making.

God bless you!VOTE Mike LaPierre for CongressSC District 4 – Greenville and Spartanburg CountiesI LIKE MIKE
God bless the beautiful state of SOUTH CAROLINA!
|
---
|
---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Hillsdale’s newest free online course
body:
Young people today grow up being told that their perception of reality is a matter of perspective. Recently, they are even told
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq1uk5s5eg2o6f8i25ghaicnomkjk9btb1pfmteo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpj8dr4c9pbedjk6uq6cd5ke4q64ohi6sq3eptkm6pj4dj56cp73djjmmo7ashgsv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666ob6o70eaomcslgmdh6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933clh68pj4sjh62oh5u)
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp2kh9ff3oskd3h6b2anvdu8cnpgp41vm6hbff8g_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj69p72c5h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Young people today grow up being told that their perception of reality is a matter of perspective. Recently, they are even told that women can choose to be men and men women. This denial of objective reality—including a denial of an objective good—is destructive of proper education, of religious faith, and of free government. Largely as an antidote to this destructive force, Hillsdale College is releasing its latest free online course,**“C.S. Lewis on Christianity.”** Taught by Michael Ward, a visiting distinguished fellow at Hillsdale and a professor of theology at Oxford University, this seven-lecture course covers Lewis’s philosophical defense of an objective good and his demonstration of its fulfillment in Christianity. **I am writing today to ask if you would consider****pre-registering for this free online course. You can do so at this secure link:** **** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-preregister/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0ln6d20vs10i8fuug0dq1gk3q04n4u94tc7eet8_rp22sh2s8i66pb2chj69p72c5h2bs)** **** **After pre-registering for****“C.S. Lewis on Christianity,” please help us****meet our goal of raising $500,000 by midnight on May 16 to promote this new online course effectively, especially to young people.** **** Hillsdale produces its free online courses, as it does all its work, while refusing to accept government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. We are entirely dependent on private donations. With your tax-deductible gift today, we can enroll tens of thousands of young people in this new free online course and expand Hillsdale’s other outreach efforts. Thank you for your friendship and support. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Team Ryan
subject: a choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3666%2E3611125%2EzP72Bh ][IMG]

Folks—this November, Ohioans will have to choose who they want
to represent them in the Senate: an out-of-touch millionaire or a champion
for hardworking families.

The choice couldn’t be any clearer.

Our polling shows that once voters hear Tim’s message about putting
workers first instead of greedy corporate special interests, they’re fired
up to help elect him to the Senate—so we need to get his ads in front of
as many people as possible.

JD Vance only cares about making his rich buddies richer, but Tim has
fought for and alongside Ohio families his entire career. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12184?t=1014&amount=25&akid=3666%2E3611125%2EzP72Bh ]Can you chip
in $25 to give Tim’s campaign the resources he needs to get his message in
front of voters, defeat JD, and cut workers in on the deal?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12184?t=1015&amount=25&akid=3666%2E3611125%2EzP72Bh ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12184?t=1016&amount=50&akid=3666%2E3611125%2EzP72Bh ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12184?t=1017&amount=100&akid=3666%2E3611125%2EzP72Bh ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12184?t=1018&amount=200&akid=3666%2E3611125%2EzP72Bh ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12184?t=1019&amount=250&akid=3666%2E3611125%2EzP72Bh ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12184?t=1020&amount=30&akid=3666%2E3611125%2EzP72Bh ]Other Amount

The choice Ohioans make will have far-reaching implications, because if we
want to finally deliver on legislation that will improve the lives of
working families, we need to expand our Democratic Senate majority and
break the gridlock in Washington.

We’ve known all along that this was going to be a tough midterm cycle for
Democrats, but Tim Ryan is our best shot to expand our Senate majority.

We absolutely must win in Ohio—and that starts with supplying Tim’s
campaign with the resources necessary to go head-to-head with JD Vance.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12184?t=1021&amount=25&akid=3666%2E3611125%2EzP72Bh ]Can we count on you to step up and pitch in $25 right now so that we
can reach as many Ohio voters as possible to spread Tim’s message and
vision for a better Ohio?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12184?t=1008&amount=25&akid=3666%2E3611125%2EzP72Bh ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12184?t=1009&amount=50&akid=3666%2E3611125%2EzP72Bh ]Donate $50

—Team Ryan

Peter,

It’s a huge understatement to say that the last 16 months under Biden and the Democrat-controlled Congress have been a **complete disaster**.

* Record high **inflation** and out of control gas, food and housing prices that are leaving families reeling.

* Unsecured **borders** with hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants streaming into our country and posing our greatest national security risk.

* A botched withdrawal from **Afghanistan** that cost American lives, wasted two decades of sacrifice and fighting, and left a void that was immediately filled by terrorists.

I could go on and on, but I know I don’t need to because **you and I are living this disaster every single day.**

clean_body: | | | | The Lincoln Project is after us | Peter! This is serious. Last week, a left-wing political action committee, The Lincoln Project , whose stated mission is, “First we defeat Donald Trump at the ballot box. The second was to ensure Trumpism failed alongside him.”, is now attacking Harriet! Take a look: In this video, Trygve Olson discusses how a vote for Harriet Hageman is a vote for President Trump. The Lincoln Project is so scared of Harriet, a Trump endorsed candidate, that they will say and do whatever they think it will take to knock her down. But I know Harriet. She is a fighter who understands the value of hard work, integrity, self-sufficiency, and honesty. And for over 30 years she has dedicated her career to fighting for the people! Here in Wyoming, WE DESERVE BETTER and WE DEMAND BETTER! | | | | | Let’s send Harriet to DC to represent Wyoming, and to take our state back from the Washington elite and Big Government. Thank you, Carly | | | | | DONATE BY MAIL: Hageman for Wyoming P.O. Box 4157, Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003

I had the great honor and privilege of growing up being raised by Dick and Lynne Cheney, two people who love American history and who love this nation.

They taught my sister and me how important it is to revere our history and to revere who we are as a country. I think a lot about the history of my home state of Wyoming and about the history of the people who came here first. I have two of my great, great grandmothers who walked across the Mormon Trail and a great grandfather and his brother who first settled in Wyoming in 1917. They settled in Wyoming in search of religious freedom, and in the hopes of finding economic freedom and economic opportunity.

**_The promise of who we are in Wyoming, the promise of the West, and the promise of who we are as Americans is an incredible and unbelievable promise._**

The durability of this promise is under attack, and I am asking for your assistance in my fight for what we have been promised. It matters to me, and I know it matters to you.

#
Friends —
We know that the Supreme Court is likely poised to overturn _Roe v. Wade._ That means blue states like New York have a moral responsibility to go above and beyond to protect individuals seeking abortions across the country and become true abortion sanctuary states. _
**[That’s why I spoke to The Cut about New York’s place in the fight to protect abortion. You can read the article by clicking here.](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/go/1562?t=1&akid=764%2E59515%2EdDMpxp)**
[](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/go/1562?t=2&akid=764%2E59515%2EdDMpxp)
Here’s what you need to know:
Even though the right to an abortion is codified on the state level, New York must do more to become a true sanctuary state. We must pass legislation to protect abortion providers from extradition, to support individuals traveling to New York state seeking abortions, and more.
**It is our responsibility to act immediately to make all of these protections a reality, and to improve access to abortion more generally. This includes financially supporting abortion providers and abortion access funds.**
There are bills currently sitting in the state legislature — that we could pass tomorrow — to expand access to abortion in New York State. These include a bill I introduced to create an Abortion Access Fund that would financially support people seeking abortion care, and the FIRE HATE Act which would offer legal protections to individuals traveling across state lines to obtain an abortion or gender-affirming care.
We have just a few weeks left of the legislative session in Albany, and I am continuing to push for this legislation to be passed so that New York becomes a sanctuary state once and for all.
Thank you for reading,
AB
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-may/?refcode=em220509-1-15&refcode2=764_59515_dDMpxp&akid=764%2E59515%2EdDMpxp)**

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=764%2E59515%2EdDMpxp).

clean_body: | | | With just one week left to Election Day, the heat is on, Peter. It's a mad dash to the finish line and the airwaves are flooded with ads. Of the eight folks on the ballot in our primary race, four are advertising on TV. And with all that noise going on it's important to remember one thing: Val Hoyle is the only candidate in the race with a proven track record of delivering for Oregon working families. That's why Val has earned the endorsement of Congressman Peter DeFazio and Oregon Senators Ron Wyden and Jeff Merkley. And that's why the Oregon League of Conservation Voters, the Planned Parenthood Action Fund, and the Oregon Working Families Party are all in Val's corner. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = The feedback from our voter outreach and field efforts is clear: people across this district know that Val is the right Democratic candidate to take on Alek Skarlatos in November and win this seat. More importantly, she's the right person to fight for us in Washington DC. = Team Hoyle = | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. ---|--- | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. body:
It’s our people-powered movement for NC-01 against super PAC attacks.
#
Hey we’re coming to you with some bad news:
**ANOTHER super PAC entered the race to support Don Davis — our anti-choice, anti-voting rights, corporate-backed primary opponent.**
And this super PAC — DMFI — just launched a smear ad on TV against Erica filled with false accusations because they’re afraid of what having another progressive Democrat in Congress will mean.
[**_We’re counting on a surge of grassroots donations today to fight back. Can you rush a $5 right now? It’s going to take all of us to stand up to the influx of super PAC money flooding into this race.](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/52731?t=1&akid=1166%2E3698%2EOBx_y7)**
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/52737?refcode=em20220509-1166&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1166%2E3698%2EOBx_y7)**
This smear ad is so dishonest that multiple TV stations have already taken it down — but our work doesn’t stop here.
Don Davis and his super PAC supporters are doing everything they can to try and defeat Erica and our people-powered movement.
[**That’s why we’re asking:**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/52731?t=22&akid=1166%2E3698%2EOBx_y7)**_[Can you rush $5 to help us respond to these false attacks and elect Erica on May 17? It’s critical we have the resources we need to fight back when we’re 8 days away from the primary election.](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/52731?t=23&akid=1166%2E3698%2EOBx_y7)_**
Thank you for your support in this critical moment,
Erica Smith HQ

name: John Fetterman
subject: I don’t know who needs to hear this, but
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The deadline to apply for a Mail-In Ballot is tomorrow.
#
Q: What’s the fastest + easiest way to apply to vote for *yours truly* in the Democratic primary on Tuesday, May 17?
A: Voting by mail!
**Derek, the deadline to apply for a Mail-In Ballot in PA is tomorrow. Have you applied for your Mail-In Ballot yet?**
**[Apply For Mail-In Ballot](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/6753?t=1&akid=5736%2E434096%2EMPImjG)**
I *really* can’t urge you enough. Voting by mail BEFORE Election Day just makes sense.
Don’t forget that a vote in Tioga County counts as much as a vote in Pittsburgh or Philly. 🔴🔵
Don’t forget your civic duty. 🇺🇸
Don’t forget to apply for your Mail-In ballot by TOMORROW!!! 👇👇
**[Apply For Mail-In Ballot](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/6753?t=2&akid=5736%2E434096%2EMPImjG)**
Thanks,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of PA

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220509-5736-footer&t=3&refcode2=5736_434096_MPImjG&akid=5736%2E434096%2EMPImjG)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=4&akid=5736%2E434096%2EMPImjG)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=5736%2E434096%2EMPImjG)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Andrew=20Roth?=
subject: Illinois Has Launched!
body:
The Illinois Freedom Caucus launched this week, marking the Network's fifth state freedom caucus. | | | |
---
| | | Patriots, **We are thrilled to share some exciting news with you in the battle to advance freedom!**

The State Freedom Caucus Network is **proud to officially announce** the launch of our newest affiliate: **the Illinois Freedom Caucus!** Left-wing politics and policy have long-dominated the state of Illinois, creating an environment of rampant cronyism, corruption, and big-government boondoggles. However, some state lawmakers are choosing to fight back, taking critical stands in defense of freedom and pushing many of their colleagues to take positions in stark contrast to decades of failed leadership in Springfield. Representing East Central and Southern Illinois, the self-described conservatives of the ‘Eastern Bloc’ include **State Representatives Brad Halbrook, Chris Miller, Dan Caulkins, Blaine Wilhour,** and**Adam Niemerg**. Together, they have emerged as true envoys of freedom in the Illinois State House and their impact is already making a difference.
---
|
---
Senator Jim DeMint speaks with founding members of the Illinois Freedom Caucus.
|
---
| In 2019, the bloated and deficit-increasing state budget passed with the support of nine Republicans in the House despite loud opposition from the ‘Eastern Bloc.’ The following year, every single Illinois House Republican opposed Governor Pritzker’s spending boondoggle as t**hese conservative leaders helped rally their colleagues to stand against the spending binge** threatening Illinois’ economy.
In 2021, these freedom leaders stood **arm-in-arm to oppose a toothless “ethics reform” package** that did little to advance accountability over legislators. Unfortunately, far too many of their Republican colleagues threw their support behind a bill that served as little more than a legislative fig leaf, allowing Democrat leadership to claim they did something when the reality was the precise opposite.
These conservatives were **vindicated for their opposition** when the Legislative Inspector General described the bill as a “paper tiger” and announced her resignation saying she could not adequately perform her job.
And earlier this year, these principled freedom fighters **initiated a fight on the House floor** to draw attention to the ongoing refusal of teacher union-dominated school systems to unmask children in schools. They, along with five of their colleagues, entered the chamber without masks to expose the**hypocritical mask theater by Democrat elected officials** who routinely attend fundraisers and galas without masks while **allowing unions to cruelly and unnecessarily cover the faces of school kids.**
This drew the ire of exposed Democrats who removed these freedom leaders from the chamber for “failing to follow” the hypocritical policies imposed by House leadership.
All of this is to say that the Illinois Freedom Caucus is ready to rumble.
The State Freedom Caucus Network will continue to create, cultivate, and develop networks of freedom-loving, liberty-minded state lawmakers all over the nation to equip them with the tools and resources they need to defeat the rising, radical Left and their enablers in the GOP establishment.
Your support for these efforts is vital if we are to succeed in restoring and advancing freedom in our great nation. Every dollar counts and every contribution matters. I**f you wish to help us in this fight, you can[contribute here.](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=2a3754d395&e=64ecec6d03)**
The battle for freedom continues and the work has only just begun!

Keep Fighting,
Andy Roth
President, State Freedom Caucus Network P.S. Again, your help is absolutely critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation’s state capitols. Please consider a **[contribution here](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=b7b43c0e68&e=64ecec6d03)** and join us as together we work to advance the cause of freedom.
---
| [ ](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=0e197f3de8&e=64ecec6d03)
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 State Freedom Caucus Network, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
State Freedom Caucus Network300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003-1021
[Add us to your address book](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1&e=64ecec6d03&c=70caf28d16) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1&e=64ecec6d03&c=70caf28d16).
---

name: Kina Collins
subject: Republicans are already planning contraception bans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KINA COLLINS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://click
body:

Trump-endorsed Kari Lake and Mark Finchem are teaming up to try to get vote tabulation machines banned. They’ve even brought in the “big guns” – Mike Lindell, who’s leveraged a pillow company into a worldwide voter suppression crusade.

Banning these machines from counting votes will lead to major expenses on local election officials and drag out elections as ballots have to be counted one-by-one by hand.

It’s ridiculous and shows how unfit to govern the AZ GOP has become.

clean_body: | | | Media is picking up on AZ GOP extreme shift | | | Team, the AZ GOP is once again heading to court in an attempt to make their voting fraud fantasies turn into voter suppression reality. AZ GOP leaders are worried about polling and not sure that the voter suppression laws they have passed will be enough to deliver victory, so once again they’re heading to court under one of Trump’s Big Lie pretenses. Trump-endorsed Kari Lake and Mark Finchem are teaming up to try to get vote tabulation machines banned. They’ve even brought in the “big guns” – Mike Lindell, who’s leveraged a pillow company into a worldwide voter suppression crusade. Banning these machines from counting votes will lead to major expenses on local election officials and drag out elections as ballots have to be counted one-by-one by hand. It’s ridiculous and shows how unfit to govern the AZ GOP has become.
