name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Newsom and Pelosi are Feuding
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Family Feud](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziooPcaH70MpAcjiaD8PzXOvY&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may9_final&n=1) Nancy Pelosi is not happy with Gavin Newsom. After the leaked court opinion, Newsom blasted Pelosi and other Democrats for not being as extreme as him, yelling, “Where the hell is my Party?” Yesterday, Pelosi rebuked Newsom on national TV. “I have no idea why anybody would make that statement,” she deadpanned. Pelosi’s cool insistence that she’s just as extreme as Newsom tells you everything about what’s happening to our country. The radicalism of California is rapidly spreading to Washington. It's truly frightening, given how radical our Capitol has become. Last Thursday, the Judiciary Committee advanced a bill removing parental consent for 12-year-olds to get vaccinated. A court already ruled this unconstitutional. Meanwhile, a Harvard study finds school closures caused “the largest increase in educational inequity in a generation.” Newsom and the Supermajority closed schools longer than any state and [opposed my legislation](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Trwmtk_uyVQ0nz6QZoJharMIdlbmCnT7UGw7uhvlBRrCQPR2_ILg7ctNEfg-oK1RRQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may9_final&n=2) to open them. Someone recently asked whether I plan to hang out with Pelosi if I’m elected to Congress. The answer is no (even if it meant access to her deluxe ice cream freezer). However, this I can say for sure: she will know who I am right away. I plan to fight Pelosi and Biden as fiercely as I’ve fought Newsom. And I’m increasingly hopeful it will be with a GOP Congress: at our Campaign HQ Saturday there was a level of enthusiasm like I’ve never seen, with over 100 volunteers. We’ve done so much together for our state even as part of the Superminority. Imagine what we can do for our country as part of the Majority. Kevin Kiley
California Legislator p.s. Ballots are out! [Help me get across the finish line so we can stop Biden and Pelosi from turning the whole country into California](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may9_final&n=3)
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may9_final&n=4).

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: re: Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=245%2E5257348%2EeIFPcH ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek, we got some tough news last Monday night when we learned
that the Supreme Court is readying to overturn Roe v. Wade.

Since Texas has a “trigger ban” in place, this decision will completely
ban abortion in our state, without exception for rape or incest. But we
have an opportunity to channel our frustration and anger into action, and
ultimately into victory. We must do so because winning political power is
the only way to meet this challenge — the only way to overcome this
crisis.

As governor, I will do everything in my power to guarantee that women have
control over their own bodies, their own health care, their own futures.
But, in order to win, I need your support to defeat Greg Abbott in
November.

And we need champions like Adam Schiff in the majority at the federal
level who will fight to codify the protections of Roe into law nationwide.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220509_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&refcode2=245_5257348_eIFPcH&akid=245%2E5257348%2EeIFPcH ]Will you split a contribution between this campaign and Adam's campaign
to protect the House, and to help me defeat Greg Abbott in November so I
can fight to protect the right to abortion care in Texas?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Beto O’Rourke and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220509_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=10&t=1005&refcode2=245_5257348_eIFPcH&akid=245%2E5257348%2EeIFPcH ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220509_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=25&t=1006&refcode2=245_5257348_eIFPcH&akid=245%2E5257348%2EeIFPcH ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220509_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=50&t=1007&refcode2=245_5257348_eIFPcH&akid=245%2E5257348%2EeIFPcH ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220509_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=100&t=1008&refcode2=245_5257348_eIFPcH&akid=245%2E5257348%2EeIFPcH ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220509_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=250&t=1009&refcode2=245_5257348_eIFPcH&akid=245%2E5257348%2EeIFPcH ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220509_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&refcode2=245_5257348_eIFPcH&akid=245%2E5257348%2EeIFPcH ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

These extreme attacks on abortion have never been about life. If it were
about life, then the current Texas governor wouldn’t allow so many kids to
die in the foster care system in Texas — the worst run foster care program
in the United States. This is about control. And this is about power.

Our side — the side of the people who believe in democracy, the
Constitution, and the rights of our fellow Americans — has to get serious
about political power. It’s on us, the people of Texas. We must do
everything in our power to organize, win, and protect reproductive health
care.

I will fight for every person’s freedom to control their own health care,
their own body, their own future. Derek, I need you in this
fight with me to protect reproductive rights in Texas.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220509_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&refcode2=245_5257348_eIFPcH&akid=245%2E5257348%2EeIFPcH ]Please, split a $10 contribution between Adam's and our campaign and
help me defeat an extremist governor who is actively tearing away people’s
reproductive freedom.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Beto O’Rourke and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220509_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=10&t=1012&refcode2=245_5257348_eIFPcH&akid=245%2E5257348%2EeIFPcH ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220509_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=25&t=1013&refcode2=245_5257348_eIFPcH&akid=245%2E5257348%2EeIFPcH ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220509_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=50&t=1014&refcode2=245_5257348_eIFPcH&akid=245%2E5257348%2EeIFPcH ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220509_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=100&t=1015&refcode2=245_5257348_eIFPcH&akid=245%2E5257348%2EeIFPcH ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220509_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=250&t=1016&refcode2=245_5257348_eIFPcH&akid=245%2E5257348%2EeIFPcH ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220509_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1017&refcode2=245_5257348_eIFPcH&akid=245%2E5257348%2EeIFPcH ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

With your support, I know that we can win this race.

Thank you,

— Beto

The Michigan Governor's Race is heating up, Peter. | | | **The race for Michigan Governor is heating up, Peter.**

[_The latest poll has Gretchen Whitmer trailing the GOP candidate by 1%_](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=1a53f71dcb&e=fe4b890356).

**Her disastrous record** \- destroying Michigan's economy, shutting down schools, and trampling on our constitutional freedoms - _is finally catching up with her._

This poll follows news that a [national Democrat group is dumping $23 million](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=b6849cc92d&e=fe4b890356) into Michigan to save her flailing campaign.

Building a grassroots army of Michigan patriots, Garrett Soldano has mobilized WE THE PEOPLE behind a message of freedom - _and he won't stop fighting until we defeat Gretchen Whitmer and Drain the Lansing Swamp._

Friends,

**_Liz Cheney is a champion of civil discourse and a defender of our founding principles. She recognizes that for our country to go forward in strength, we need serious leaders who will be loyal to the Constitution over a political party._**

Our Constitution is the unbreakable thread that runs through us each, and Liz is keeping this invisible string together. **[Team Cheney is asking for you to give your sustaining support to Liz Cheney right now if you can. If you stand by the defender of the Constitution, then now is the time to give financially to her campaign.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=c1671e97fa974c17b9180d9e330b368a&_e=NzeBQ5TEHpAW-1vbhCzddjiF1m53mci1B8sb3yveAwLbAuRY0JejLehsapZmruuH16rcZfLZ1q-3LL7ekTiBbHcfri_0ZRfyrEUYgGR_BvabGcOm5SjJ42uaM15aaLIgxM3Omx9q5FKt5X0O9bzQze_9u_DRjd2orLSj-03xsRPiVxPxya_68Y9plO8ZXTD5yDkYLvAoOsBS3zQMhJxnbhyO4KQ4DxxYwc4sW98tQ7FfJj9IkH1TSKGC0eLka-vkjgr8E7XBBH8_fYqSaT8VupMAClfBlc9ytkLc24vCmg-eqEqwQ9Yl5KsSkutESUPOSOfrjVg3h1VXz4r_-CeI2Hl3sM2jmArHWMUmOXzecyQ9ockwGeLE1Az197Abloq93-7AqLt7FjGRd-KGNDCLGhBoE1d-AYYwjRGp-F71Ny4sJVWeRXavzGTLMvMmpnF_glWVKYYBT5og42d6Q4zeCjwx27WvEtzNJu7angeImgPp5ObIITaqOVmppr5ONVizgqWAYR7Yp9_bGUtgdDGXBxLBNf167g8GHR3iO_C7nrg%3D)**

For America to succeed, we all know that some things must be more important than the daily political fights. We must be united in support of the things that all Americans value like, truth, respect for the rule of law, and a commitment to the Constitutional principles that have guided our nation for more than two centuries.

_We have to remember we are not enemies._ For Liz, this could not be more clear.

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4d1da338ca01/how-where-to-vote-on-may-21st?e=1669180a05)
---
| |
---
| |
# _**10TH DISTRICT REPUBLICAN FIREHOUSE PRIMARY:**_ SATURDAY, MAY 21ST FROM 9 AM - 4 PM
---
| _**ABSENTEE VOTING (CAN'T MAKE SATURDAY):**_ Absentee voting if you can't make it on Saturday will be on Thursday, May 12th from 4 PM - 8 PM at the Middleburg Barn at Foxchase Farm.

Click the button below to find your _**NEW**_ voting location:
---
| [FIND YOUR VOTING LOCATIONS (NOT YOUR NORMAL ONES)](https://maxforvirginia.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10255e504dfa87e77a677aee2&id=1802ca605f&e=1669180a05 "FIND YOUR VOTING LOCATIONS \(NOT YOUR NORMAL ONES\)")
---
| _**What is “ranked choice voting”?**_

Simply put, you the voter, will rank your candidate(s) in order of personal preference, from first to last. The winning candidate must garner 51% of the vote in order to secure the nomination. If no candidate receives 51% after the first round, the candidate with the least votes is eliminated, and voters’ second choice selections are distributed among the remaining candidates, and so on, until a winner is declared.

_Strategies to help your favorite candidate(s):_

**_Do’s_**

1) _Do_ limit your vote to one candidate if that’s the only one you support. (Voting for down ballot candidates will only dilute your support for your first choice).

2) _Do_ vote for each and every candidate you like (if more than one) as second, third, fourth, etc candidates’ votes are counted in each subsequent round(s).

3) _Do_ vote Caleb Max as your 1st Choice and clearly circle your choice.

4) _Do_ bring a PHOTO ID with you.

**_Do Not_**

1) _Don’t_ rank any one candidate multiple times as this will result in your ballot being discarded.

2) _Don’t_ list a candidate(s) on your ballot that you do _not_ support because down ballot rankings grow in significance as candidates are eliminated and subsequent voting round(s) occur.

3) _Don’t_ forget to vote.
---

Click the button below to find your NEW voting location: | "FIND YOUR VOTING LOCATIONS \(NOT YOUR NORMAL ONES\") | What is “ranked choice voting”? Simply put, you the voter, will rank your candidate(s) in order of personal preference, from first to last. The winning candidate must garner 51% of the vote in order to secure the nomination. If no candidate receives 51% after the first round, the candidate with the least votes is eliminated, and voters’ second choice selections are distributed among the remaining candidates, and so on, until a winner is declared. Strategies to help your favorite candidate(s): Do’s 1) Do limit your vote to one candidate if that’s the only one you support. (Voting for down ballot candidates will only dilute your support for your first choice). 2) Do vote for each and every candidate you like (if more than one) as second, third, fourth, etc candidates’ votes are counted in each subsequent round(s). 3) Do vote Caleb Max as your 1st Choice and clearly circle your choice. 4) Do bring a PHOTO ID with you. Do Not 1) Don’t rank any one candidate multiple times as this will result in your ballot being discarded. 2) Don’t list a candidate(s) on your ballot that you do not support because down ballot rankings grow in significance as candidates are eliminated and subsequent voting round(s) occur. 3) Don’t forget to vote. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Caleb Max for VA 25 Catoctin Cir SE Leesburg, VA 20177-8701 * USA

name: =?utf-8?Q?Congressman=20Marc=20Veasey?=
subject: Why I'm supporting Jane HOPE Hamilton
body:
Jane Hope Hamilton is the most qualified candidate in the TX-30 runoff election.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/e496b02f688c/super-pacs-dont-know-what-our-communities-need-9025587?e=c6ff015791)
Logo

Cresco,

There is no one more qualified to be in Congress than Jane HOPE Hamilton. Jane HOPE served as my chief of staff in Congress, and by my side, we were able to deliver real results and tangible change for North Texas.

Here are a few reasons to support Jane HOPE:
* Jane HOPE led the formation of the voting rights caucus in Congress.
* Jane HOPE helped me sue Gregg Abbott twice to protect our voting rights and WON.
* Jane HOPE stood shoulder to shoulder with our union brothers and sisters to save 24,000 American Airlines worker jobs.
* Jane HOPE was instrumental in securing hundreds of millions of dollars in federal funding for North Texas.
* Jane HOPE took the initiative to host workshops to help our local small businesses become government contractors.

Cresco, during my near decade in Congress, I have never seen this level of political polarization in Washington. We need leaders like Jane HOPE who can find solutions by bridging divides and bringing people together.

Jane HOPE will put the government on the side of working people; I proudly endorse her candidacy to be the next Congresswoman for Texas’ 30th Congressional district.

Please vote for Jane HOPE in Texas’ 30th Congressional District runoff. Early voting runs from May 16 - to May 20, and Election Day is May 24.

And if possible, can you kindly consider donating to Jane’s campaign today to help her get across the finish line?
DONATE HERE (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhhtvad?utm_source=Jane+Hope+Hamilton+for+Congress&utm_campaign=ea0ffd3398-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_04_22_05_05_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e512749a93-ea0ffd3398-596842679)

Thanks,

Congressman Marc Veasey (TX-33)

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: We’ve fallen behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc
body:
The stakes are high this election, and I’m counting on your support.
Peter,

In 2020, the Democrats spent over $130 MILLION to try and flip South Carolina blue, but it was only because of supporters like you I was able to fend off their attacks and win.

The Big Money Left is back this year, and now they’re attacking my good friend – Utah Senator Mike Lee. He is being outraised, so I am asking for your help. Mike can win in November, which will help Republicans Reclaim the Senate majority, but it will take everyone chipping in to ensure he can be competitive.

Mike has fallen behind his fundraising deadline, so I’m counting on hearing from you. Peter, In 2020, the Democrats spent over $130 MILLION to try and flip South Carolina blue, but it was only because of supporters like you I was able to fend off their attacks and win. The Big Money Left is back this year, and now they’re attacking my good friend – Utah Senator Mike Lee. He is being outraised, so I am asking for your help. Mike can win in November, which will help Republicans Reclaim the Senate majority, but it will take everyone chipping in to ensure he can be competitive. Mike has fallen behind his fundraising deadline, so I’m counting on hearing from you. Mike is in a unique re-election fight in Utah. His “independent” opponent - Evan McMullin - has been endorsed by the Utah Democrat Party, even though he won’t appear as a Democrat on the ballot. Therefore, all Democrats and Independents are being urged to vote for McMullin through a political sleight of hand, even though he won’t have “Democrat” next to his name. McMullin’s campaign is raising MILLIONS OF DOLLARS thanks to liberal groups like the Lincoln Project, and he’s showing no signs of slowing down. With the Senate on the line and Mike behind his fundraising deadline that ends at midnight, When my campaign was being outraised in 2020, you delivered for me. ---
| | [](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=f1816273321448088fcb3611e3b06263&_e=VsfhKWLhHkSMZxGAgJ5k8SnGugxZbFFyk4VFdHAlitnK3PwTCBVjUFFxS5ApIi6rFhFZVt3rpLOUaKwbRMxVcW9nRSm6V-26gzO_44-rXlKvomO7o-WNfteHIhLp4uryHIyu25QmP7b125YMxVXiDigb5fo57t9wBGMV9GPkTh5hWl80v3TxV7rRWsSVdsHYzgydTJu2rCHlf_7xCnJflGC-1S9e8kyqhTRGKQUNEFwvga-unz6GX5_YgEuj0wSVOqKpqmd3XVx8ATwBDq4gSq5qFUdF0oZPsID9kieP8ZI5VJCdV6UAGYdUbQURfEuOgW7uEKxM0Get6XR16YQJyeABRlMFn94LXw1Mxb38ai_KNPbKW6n9gbs62GhQhl4YMCvWa1Cq3DGf62TPF2Ug3a2cjn29d9haw1BpYaRzVZwfT7Houq0ZD0Tul4SFGxjSAMmrMi55-kI0tbAkzvF96Q%3D%3D)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I just got off the air with Rachel Maddow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
For nearly fifty years, Roe has protected a woman's fundamental right to make her own health care decisions. | | |
---
This is important – I just got off the air with Rachel Maddow where I spoke about the Supreme Court's impending decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade._ For nearly fifty years, Roe has protected a woman's fundamental right to make her own health care decisions. **This decision would have devastating repercussions for millions of Americans, pulling our country back decades.** I believe the right to abortion and contraception is a matter of personal autonomy, economic freedom, and health. But that right is now under attack, not just at the highest level of government but in states across the country, including my home state of New Hampshire. **The Republican men—and yes, they are all men—running against me are all pushing an extreme, anti-choice agenda.** One of my opponents spearheaded New Hampshire's first abortion ban in modern history and explicitly said he opposes ANY exceptions for rape or incest. Another has been an anti-choice activist for decades, promising to "end abortion once and for all." This is a fight not just to defend reproductive health care — but a woman's right to control her own destiny. With access to abortion on the ballot, we cannot afford to elect another anti-choice Senator. **[I need your grassroots support now more than ever. Can you rush a donation right now to defend our pro-choice Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45118982/344576149/-1829049351?refcode=mh-fr-maddow-20220509&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzFlNjFhMy0wOGQwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODFhODYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z3CNNliQKOqQM1cqrX_-Q5nZ88GcjxiZy8H4jDktDZk=)** | | [RUSH A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45118983/344576150/-1829049351?refcode=mh-fr-maddow-20220509&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzFlNjFhMy0wOGQwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODFhODYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z3CNNliQKOqQM1cqrX_-Q5nZ88GcjxiZy8H4jDktDZk=)

With every good wish,

clean_body: For nearly fifty years, Roe has protected a woman's fundamental right to make her own health care decisions. | | | This is important – I just got off the air with Rachel Maddow where I spoke about the Supreme Court's impending decision to overturn Roe v. Wade. For nearly fifty years, Roe has protected a woman's fundamental right to make her own health care decisions. This decision would have devastating repercussions for millions of Americans, pulling our country back decades. I believe the right to abortion and contraception is a matter of personal autonomy, economic freedom, and health. But that right is now under attack, not just at the highest level of government but in states across the country, including my home state of New Hampshire. The Republican men—and yes, they are all men—running against me are all pushing an extreme, anti-choice agenda. One of my opponents spearheaded New Hampshire's first abortion ban in modern history and explicitly said he opposes ANY exceptions for rape or incest. Another has been an anti-choice activist for decades, promising to "end abortion once and for all." This is a fight not just to defend reproductive health care — but a woman's right to control her own destiny. With access to abortion on the ballot, we cannot afford to elect another anti-choice Senator. = | | = Thank you for being in this fight With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

subject: Did you see this?
body:
Watch the KGW debate here! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/48dfaac3e3c7/did-you-see-this?e=7e91be8cad)
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=11a67e77f1&e=7e91be8cad)

---
| | Dear Friends,

Did you catch KGW's Republican gubernatorial debate last week? Thanks to you, _**we qualified for the debate as one of the frontrunners in this crowded field of GOP candidates!**_ As someone who went from being a **_homeless teen to a successful CEO_** , I know what it takes to turn things around in our beautiful state. [Hear about my positive vision for Oregon at the latest televised debate here!](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=ac1cece570&e=7e91be8cad)
---
| There was a clear difference between the candidates last week. As a CEO with real-world business experience outside of politics, I have what it takes to be the next CEO of this state. Whether it's rising inflation, failing schools, or skyrocketing crime, I'm ready to tackle the issues Oregonians truly care about: **_affordable communities, better schools, and safer neighborhoods._**

Folks, _the momentum is on our side heading into the May 17 primary. We can't let this opportunity go to waste._

**If you agree that Oregon's next CEO should have real-world experience as one, I hope I can count on your support in the Republican primary election, which is just over a week away! Can I count on you?**

Sincerely,

Jessica Gomez
Republican for Governor

P.S. Remember to vote by May 17!
---

body:

** Let's Make 2022 a Year to Remember!
------------------------------------------------------------

** Together We Can Win!
------------------------------------------------------------

** For the Colorado Governor's election in November, we must be all in.
------------------------------------------------------------

Will you donate $15, $25, $50 (https://www.lopez2022.com/donate?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=6f81e95906-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_06_06_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-6f81e95906-584862981&utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=e87a254458-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_09_10_14&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-e87a254458-584862049) today to protect Colorado from paying the price of another Polis administration?

Greg Lopez and his team are working around the clock to earn the votes we need to defeat Polis this November.

The Lopez Team

subject: POSTPONED: Meet me in Waukesha
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
body:
We still need your help... | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9399a4eccc28/i-am-running-for-congress-8983369?e=356c0699dd)
---
| | |
---
| | | Hello,

We were looking forward to seeing you all tomorrow, May 10th, but unfortunately we are going to need to postpone this event. Please keep a look out for an announcement from us soon about a future date where we can all come together.

In the meantime, we still need help with our nomination signatures. Please visit [MikeVanSomeren.com/nominate-mike](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=ca1229a728&e=356c0699dd) to download, circulate and/or sign papers on your own.
---
| [Help get Mike on the Ballot](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=eb5a8ea253&e=356c0699dd "Help get Mike on the Ballot")
---
| We need your help to collect the 2,000 nomination signatures and any amount helps. Even if it's just your own signature, or the signatures of a few friends, every signature helps us reach our goal.

Thank you for all your help!

Team Van Someren
---
|
---
|
****Event postponed, see above****
Hey there,

**Join me Tuesday, May 10th at the Neighbors Bar & Grille in Waukesha to support my campaign! **

I’m working tirelessly to out-work Fitzgerald and to #FlipThe5th this fall. We deserve a leader in Congress who is dedicated to serving all of us, while working to foster a strong middle-class, as opposed to extreme partisan politics and pitting us against each other.

**I am committed to unifying and leading, and I have concrete plans to make the 5th Congressional District a place where all families can have a chance at the American Dream.**
---
|
---
| **Tuesday, May 10 | 5:30 - 7**
The Neighbors Bar & Grille
S16W22255 Arcadian Ave
Waukesha, WI 53186
_**Levels of Support**_
$1,000. $500, $250, $100
Open communication and transparency are important to me, and I want to talk more about what you expect out of our Congressperson. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll join me on Tuesday.

**If you’re free, come meet me at the Neighbors Bar & Grille and hear my plans for our district and state, because the era of polarization and extreme party politics has to come to an end. RSVP HERE.**

I am working to make sure that every American family has the opportunity to enjoy the American Dream, and with your support we CAN do it!
---
| See you May 10th!

Mike Van Someren
---
| | | Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
---

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: We didn't correct the trend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

I’m writing to you today because things are getting even tougher for our
work at a critical time. Here’s the situation:

Our fundraising last month was the LOWEST it’s been in a year. That’s not
a sustainable trend, at all. Our next two primaries are only 8 and 15 days
away. We’re trying to send 6 more working-class progressives to Congress
as our fundraising continues to dip.

We operate on a pretty tight budget, especially compared to other
political organizations. It’s because we run solely on donations from
grassroots supporters like you. We don’t take a cent from corporate PACs.
We don’t have millions like the Super PACs spending against Jessica
Cisneros and Summer Lee.

Our average donation this year is just $17.68. We’re incredibly proud of
that. It means we rely on a lot of small-dollar donations to fuel our
primaries.

You may know by now, but we started Justice Democrats after many of us
worked on the Bernie 2016 campaign. We were all inspired and determined to
find a way to continue the message of Bernie’s campaign through electing a
Congress that truly represented the needs of the people.

That’s when we launched Justice Democrats and supported a lot of
candidates in our first election year (2018). We lost a bunch of races,
but then we won one big one: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez’s groundbreaking
victory against the 4th most powerful Democrat in the House.

We recruited and elected Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman in 2020, defeating
two more powerful corporate Democrats. This year we’ve already won our
first race — Greg Casar in Texas. Now, we have 5 more Justice Democrats to
elect so we can build the necessary support in Congress for Medicare for
All, a Green New Deal, and so much more.

We’re trying to lift Summer Lee to victory against a corporate Democrat in

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, I’m writing to you today because things are getting even tougher for our work at a critical time. Here’s the situation: Our fundraising last month was the LOWEST it’s been in a year. That’s not a sustainable trend, at all. Our next two primaries are only 8 and 15 days away. We’re trying to send 6 more working-class progressives to Congress as our fundraising continues to dip. We operate on a pretty tight budget, especially compared to other political organizations. It’s because we run solely on donations from grassroots supporters like you. We don’t take a cent from corporate PACs. We don’t have millions like the Super PACs spending against Jessica Cisneros and Summer Lee. Our average donation this year is just $17.68. We’re incredibly proud of that. It means we rely on a lot of small-dollar donations to fuel our primaries. You may know by now, but we started Justice Democrats after many of us worked on the Bernie 2016 campaign. We were all inspired and determined to find a way to continue the message of Bernie’s campaign through electing a Congress that truly represented the needs of the people. That’s when we launched Justice Democrats and supported a lot of candidates in our first election year (2018). We lost a bunch of races, but then we won one big one: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez’s groundbreaking victory against the 4th most powerful Democrat in the House. We recruited and elected Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman in 2020, defeating two more powerful corporate Democrats. This year we’ve already won our first race — Greg Casar in Texas. Now, we have 5 more Justice Democrats to elect so we can build the necessary support in Congress for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and so much more. We’re trying to lift Summer Lee to victory against a corporate Democrat in just 8 days, and fuel Jessica Cisneros’ victory against conservative, anti-abortion Democrat Henry Cuellar in just 15 days. name: Lindsey Graham

body:
The stakes are high this election, and I’m counting on your support.
Peter,

In 2020, the Democrats spent over $130 MILLION to try and flip South Carolina blue, but it was only because of supporters like you I was able to fend off their attacks and win.

The Big Money Left is back this year, and now they’re attacking my good friend – Utah Senator Mike Lee. He is being outraised, so I am asking for your help. Mike can win in November, which will help Republicans Reclaim the Senate majority, but it will take everyone chipping in to ensure he can be competitive.

Mike has fallen behind his fundraising deadline, so I’m counting on hearing from you. Mike is in a unique re-election fight in Utah. His “independent” opponent - Evan McMullin - has been endorsed by the Utah Democrat Party, even though he won’t appear as a Democrat on the ballot. Therefore, all Democrats and Independents are being urged to vote for McMullin through a political sleight of hand, even though he won’t have “Democrat” next to his name.

McMullin’s campaign is raising MILLIONS OF DOLLARS thanks to liberal groups like the Lincoln Project, and he’s showing no signs of slowing down.

With the Senate on the line and Mike behind his fundraising deadline that ends at midnight, [**will you act right now and help give his campaign the boost it needs to win?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8af3e185f6d343ca8f66d0207163471f&_e=mA-e5kvvb2doGut5RebhJZR_8lpswHUl0PIguCIM0ZG7t61tLO-wwjHDSS3iml9XC4CWgV9rzcMlGxeZbLTrKCNDZ0ZoKGoCbRBukVFxvM-rUjOBzpsPHLawYQxaqkRKO2Dvb0kFtWP7D5vDtE11guiYMR39LXBt21enCjZJpj4aUI3lE7PeVGC_o7x39ADuFHvGkAaibYHyprd8VqyJx3ErrXfdX_WlT8kVU42S1dpUYzT7GLpzgPGIepfaZhvsFYK69zOBSDcI1jbaOl4iC3Vr56s-1WBUF1OqMcMGIkOdvYrqJK4XizhJ-BJbtirmGtxr-mP9mPOOsYynZF7tqmF2vOwMPJ-vKMsJGqpBSsS2hx5nmX3easGiiBjqSGv0)

When my campaign was being outraised in 2020, you delivered for me. [**Can I count on your support again to make sure Mike wins this critical Senate race and Republicans win back the Senate majority?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8af3e185f6d343ca8f66d0207163471f&_e=mA-e5kvvb2doGut5RebhJZR_8lpswHUl0PIguCIM0ZG7t61tLO-wwjHDSS3iml9XC4CWgV9rzcMlGxeZbLTrKCNDZ0ZoKGoCbRBukVFxvM-rUjOBzpsPHLawYQxaqkRKO2Dvb0kFtWP7D5vDtE11guiYMR39LXBt21enCjZJpj5gB55jMshJlBhUQqGDIW0n1U8nfVuY_8hysFnpbvWeLXa2pc8UYdG5VjNzpoxFwgnRh0-mP9RrtqM9J60NyqGjW0fapwhLuV7S6f40CXMOyWRgBtmnLbaRHWXL8ttglRHdP3Sip-yUxnrpXVXK27go17OXWsTgm8ZeKncr2OO_iTRJXp4KvvtN57tJb0MuiMChDfPO99HDFuUVYcFuvaau)

Lindsey Graham

name: Tyler Kistner
subject: I believe in going to my daughter’s dance recitals.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS
body:
If you think DC needs another slick, fast-talking, boarding-school educated congressman, then honestly, I’m not your guy. | [](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=626af63aea1a4d9abc4fb7643284c060&_e=SbWbtJcqipZDJZ_XtZHRszZsbe1oikEIzM5-JpBFq48THxSl3YfPX42au-YiQiavsSjOL5gFVLR8CeXKeaafKvcwgRkcsZqDc7WvIn0Wp9IouIKGzn6kMlROd0WHlPFSGRle3xv1M01z-1PaN5NKTMBYH4bUNDkt9xWahnLDgDvXxWPigRnFlkqFuqN-vNT_fl8f0iAcWJWHOAT8CQkmguM0LQgByIA4Xec9qkUesz_ArayLRRG4uKYINtBhYrg44HtPRBx5GbjKeeJpXJOJgovVde63raN1C5hFZZuBnK3ZgrOoT9ESCail_2kb2cd64azbGG3fZ5-f_g6ZJZM8NJuW4gJwI0T5ArUuuTCoak0ZHD33UVxjMOllvmSGxGlAWt8rRBsPZhcdFSWd4kQNwJ-UWKmgtP-5PsTMFRe3dNZ43vGMijC5_4y-QneSGk0H8Qk2dX0OBlfWhZkaQCh01uku7SEv4n_i68UeQEk5Pfx-H1scCyd0F_PfVFG7N9zT)

---
**_THE PROBLEM ➡_**

We are facing an oppressive government who wants to strip us of our rights, ruin our economy, and dismantle our country. Democrats in DC have sold out our children’s futures for their own personal interests. As a nation, **we have lost trust in the people who are meant to SERVE us.**

**_THE SOLUTION ➡_**

[**Washington is in desperate need of proven leaders that understand holding public office begins with service to the people**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=626af63aea1a4d9abc4fb7643284c060&_e=SbWbtJcqipZDJZ_XtZHRszZsbe1oikEIzM5-JpBFq48THxSl3YfPX42au-YiQiavsSjOL5gFVLR8CeXKeaafKvcwgRkcsZqDc7WvIn0Wp9IouIKGzn6kMlROd0WHlPFSGRle3xv1M01z-1PaN5NKTMBYH4bUNDkt9xWahnLDgDvXxWPigRnFlkqFuqN-vNT_fl8f0iAcWJWHOAT8CQkmguM0LQgByIA4Xec9qkUesz_ArayLRRG4uKYINtBhYrg44HtPRBx5GbjKeeJpXJOJgovVde63raN1C5hFZZuBnK3XP1aEdfkfSS6FhDazjBKp6fXOK26p5EFvFrOB7SN4mJsITYeFP7uSZjxFNx9-lpe4bbwPmFNVTKFTR57wVV8i3YNC8fqqEnbYJri_98QJmtxnfimBYMCNj-S-l8xcmgOMTgNZ9VV5W-CJW1PuyEewdZtT4hn02jcQDj4GZHM0Y7sFE32RE-OpUzhvJG6Oygh7HOCg7NGADlV0Y8djx1i_) – _not someone who wants five seconds of fame on a news hit._

We don’t need another self-serving politician who is a yes-man for LIFELONG politician, Nancy Pelosi (like my opponent) – we need someone to put their head down and do the work of the people.

We don’t need another rambling mouthpiece that labels YOU as a terrorist for wanting a say in _**YOUR**_ child’s education – we need leaders that understand that the best parent for your child is **you** , not the government.

[**I’m running for Congress, to serve the American people,**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=626af63aea1a4d9abc4fb7643284c060&_e=SbWbtJcqipZDJZ_XtZHRszZsbe1oikEIzM5-JpBFq48THxSl3YfPX42au-YiQiavsSjOL5gFVLR8CeXKeaafKvcwgRkcsZqDc7WvIn0Wp9IouIKGzn6kMlROd0WHlPFSGRle3xv1M01z-1PaN5NKTMBYH4bUNDkt9xWahnLDgDvXxWPigRnFlkqFuqN-vNT_fl8f0iAcWJWHOAT8CQkmguM0LQgByIA4Xec9qkUesz_ArayLRRG4uKYINtBhYrg44HtPRBx5GbjKeeJpXJOJgovVde63raN1C5hFZZuBnK0NGojS1GLlUbAqbOFRjeqQ88N0ez_MRNe2COS_ESOLaaR58tVimOyJFAYHF8qlUN63iXUU0RMCOWU20VRA8rhpACtoCsN1to3NT3QiW8DGBQY6xc8uRl5d6qQvWh3HkoX6cQjhllJOx8Q9K3T8HU7qkZ-dBjT6pxI5YAiyresg78Sx5uGlbZ-enIVTDsqoSM6rygFs2SSmwD2_7AqYjSxQ) because we sincerely need someone to put their head down and get to work. We need someone who listens more than they talk and puts their country ahead of themselves.

[**If that sounds like something you can get behind, would you be willing to chip in a couple bucks today?**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=626af63aea1a4d9abc4fb7643284c060&_e=SbWbtJcqipZDJZ_XtZHRszZsbe1oikEIzM5-JpBFq48THxSl3YfPX42au-YiQiavsSjOL5gFVLR8CeXKeaafKvcwgRkcsZqDc7WvIn0Wp9IouIKGzn6kMlROd0WHlPFSGRle3xv1M01z-1PaN5NKTMBYH4bUNDkt9xWahnLDgDvXxWPigRnFlkqFuqN-vNT_fl8f0iAcWJWHOAT8CQkmguM0LQgByIA4Xec9qkUesz_ArayLRRG4uKYINtBhYrg44HtPRBx5GbjKeeJpXJOJgovVde63raN1C5hFZZuBnK1dkTAVlrTFNrcB49F5bPhFVdAC_LKn-cGyUh3_U2C5R3ML6jh-V6gwS8UhWfqRazpdVXfSsgA1dSb3wFtnKAe5npFexvaryrEbz0afAulyZ8RBxeRLMaUGNbFchiITH1lD1nOXG6Rs9kl9-z2KY0-ok29Yf73gmBrgc3zdC9BBsiVvOR8y7-qfSxivNll5Tg9SAZHx-SW1lHmnnIaCQvMJ)

Here’s something you should know...

I never dreamed of venturing into politics. In fact, I didn’t think I’d be good at it. Why? Because I didn’t grow up in this world where everyone knows everyone, and people live in fancy houses, and regular people can run for office. It’s just not me.

I met my wife when I was in high school, and we dreamed of starting a family. I joined the marines after college to serve my country. _And I thought that was that._

But when our nation started experiencing the early stages of tyranny from Democrat leadership, I knew that what made me so ordinary was going to be the very thing that differentiated me

[**At the end of the day, I’m a family man, a marine, and a political outsider who just wants what is best for our country.**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=626af63aea1a4d9abc4fb7643284c060&_e=SbWbtJcqipZDJZ_XtZHRszZsbe1oikEIzM5-JpBFq48THxSl3YfPX42au-YiQiavsSjOL5gFVLR8CeXKeaafKvcwgRkcsZqDc7WvIn0Wp9IouIKGzn6kMlROd0WHlPFSGRle3xv1M01z-1PaN5NKTMBYH4bUNDkt9xWahnLDgDvXxWPigRnFlkqFuqN-vNT_fl8f0iAcWJWHOAT8CQkmguM0LQgByIA4Xec9qkUesz_ArayLRRG4uKYINtBhYrg44HtPRBx5GbjKeeJpXJOJgovVde63raN1C5hFZZuBnK0uWlJXEVQFGzJySqqsvI1VvRRmsSAffmh8f2xAItipSJ2OvEo-3W6QjhCb3sQ6IywNBkoIY0bVi0TI5CAzeakOh5tzfk5ECSkpSBHFpM0A5czHtu3Mab4mYmbPkNsl78vwVUquWAOvt9gePVNP8ZveirvvSlGoOL1WDPUPipa-GV6-7v_OWkJYDtYgIDnwv-ubSX8esz57EnYRPtQDaOJr) If you think DC needs another slick, fast-talking, boarding-school educated congressman, then honestly, I’m not your guy.

I believe in sitting down for dinner with my family, hanging out with my neighbors, going to my daughter’s dance recitals, and being proud of the work that I do.

The solution to the problem in Washington: [**regular ordinary people, like me going there and getting things done.**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=626af63aea1a4d9abc4fb7643284c060&_e=SbWbtJcqipZDJZ_XtZHRszZsbe1oikEIzM5-JpBFq48THxSl3YfPX42au-YiQiavsSjOL5gFVLR8CeXKeaafKvcwgRkcsZqDc7WvIn0Wp9IouIKGzn6kMlROd0WHlPFSGRle3xv1M01z-1PaN5NKTMBYH4bUNDkt9xWahnLDgDvXxWPigRnFlkqFuqN-vNT_fl8f0iAcWJWHOAT8CQkmguM0LQgByIA4Xec9qkUesz_ArayLRRG4uKYINtBhYrg44HtPRBx5GbjKeeJpXJOJgovVde63raN1C5hFZZuBnK3CBd6BFw6W7ovXe3Yg5QGLcTqwZ4Ia4gJsquvLerX3HBP3ZwWspAd7Tu2CmoMyoVw8ArBy9BeggevCqdebQIosHxfOyc5SozAzXJ3e2LzUMViIwTuJq2E58E2CF87bAQOzk91UP4pSVIesGU4DSYpawhTE3PwIuRf7gFHSGsvuijnp-ZubbPpRcVWe3aIKeGH8MR5lY-b94JTGRSHvD5Ia)

name: Our Revolution
subject: TONIGHT: Our National Organizing Call with Rashida Tlaib!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Insider News from the Political Revolution!

------------------------------------------------------------
HEADLINES: Nina vs. SuperPACS | New Endorsements! Amy Vilela - Brittany Ramos DeBarros - Summer Lee | Bernie Calls Out Biden | Ro Khanna | NY Health Act | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1011&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz

Today, workers around the world celebrate May Day — the International Workers’ Day established by labor activists in 1889 to commemorate the Haymarket Massacre in Chicago and the struggle for an eight-hour working day.

Witnesses testified that none of the eight workers charged threw the bomb in Haymarket Square. Labor leader August Spies said: “I knew from the experience of the past that this butchering of people was done for the express purpose of defeating the eight-hour movement.”

Spies showed solidarity with his comrades through the trial, appeals, and at the gallows. Today, we mark the sacrifice and perseverance of workers striving for justice.

Become a member of Our Revolution, and receive your commemorative MAY DAY STICKER today! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5451?t=1012&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz)

★ ★ ★

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1013&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz

Join us this Tuesday at 8:30p ET/7:30 CT for a special Our Revolution Town Hall to Defend Democracy with our partners at Free Speech for People and lay out our campaign to bar insurrectionists from the ballot.

We’ll speak with courageous Our Revolution members - and their legal team - taking the fight directly to far-right extremists like Marjorie Taylor-Greene. And, we’re recruiting progressive patriots across the country to get engaged in this fight!

RSVP HERE (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5409?t=1014&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz)

★ ★ ★

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1015&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz

★ ★ ★

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1016&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz

OUR REVOLUTION vs. SUPER PACS

Billionaires and oil barons are lining up to line the pockets of our candidates’ opponents in the primaries. They’re funneling millions and millions into SuperPACs like DMFI, AIPAC, and now the new, “Mainstream Democrats PAC” to try to stop progressives from taking power.

Working-class fighters like Nina Turner, Rep. Andy Levin, David Segal, and Jessica Cisneros are being targeted with expensive smear campaigns from every direction. But, we have their back, and we know that M4A, a living wage, and climate action are the true mainstream positions of the people in this country.

The corporate establishment knows what’s at stake in these races, and so do we. That’s why we mobilized our ground game early and are waging the fight in each of these pivotal races.

Our candidates rely on the power of the movement — campaigns funded by small-dollar donations and fueled by our boots on the ground. Join our Phonebank Force (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4972?t=1017&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz) to connect with voters and help drown out corporate money.

★ ★ ★

The primaries are heating up, and we have some truly phenomenal candidates on the ballot – organizers, teachers, and diverse working-class fighters – stepping forward to lead with our movement. Become a Movement Builder today to help progressives seize the levers of power from corporate Dems. (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-newsletter-22&amount=10&refcode=OR_EM_NEWS_1MO_20220509_1_1&recurring=true?t=1018&refcode2=2886_5885482_hxJXsz&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz)

★ ★ ★

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1019&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz

NINA TURNER FOR CONGRESS - ROUND 2
THE HOMESTRETCH

Folks, this is not a drill —
This is our chance to elect Nina Turner to Congress!

Election Day is Tuesday and in-person early voting is happening right now! So far, turnout is low, so every vote we get for Nina will really COUNT!

If you know someone in Greater Cleveland, help them get out to vote before 7:30 pm Tuesday at Cuyahoga County Board of Elections, 2925 Euclid Ave.

“The energy on the ground is palpable!” Nina told us. “Now is the time to maximize our efforts together.”

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1020&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz

This is one of the most consequential primaries of 2022 — and the billionaires know it. But, our movement is rising up against the BIG money trying to buy this seat. As Nina says, “All that we love is on the line, and Cleveland is not for sale!”

As Katrina vanden Heuvel wrote in The Washington Post (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5452?t=1021&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz) , noting Our Revolution’s support for Nina: “The contest has come to represent a battle for the soul of the party.”

“Turner’s election to Congress would provide progressives with a skilled, dedicated, and powerful reformer, an inside ally for the progressive movement that is driving the change vital to this nation’s democracy and security,” she stated.

“Change will take place only if citizens organize to force it — both with movements that drive the debate and with leaders such as Nina Turner who frame the issues and help lead the fight,” says Heuvel. We wholeheartedly agree.

NINA & THE FIGHT FOR M4A

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1022&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz

Nina has been in the trenches with Our Revolution for Medicare for All since Day 1, and on Thursday, we hosted a fundraiser for her centering around just that.

“The commodification of healthcare in America is not by accident. It’s inhumane and cruel,” Nina said. “I won’t get any peace until we get Medicare for All, and I won’t let anyone else get any peace either.”

Our Revolution National Organizing Coordinator Anna-Marta Visky spoke on the call about our work to grow cosponsors for federal legislation and pass M4A Resolutions in cities in Nina’s district.

“This work is paying off big time,” Anna Marta said. “Lakewood and Cleveland Heights have passed M4A Resolutions. Talking one-on-one with folks results in a more engaged voter base, and we’re excited to see them early vote for Nina!”

Healthcare justice advocate Michael Lighty said, “Our Revolution walks the walk and that embodies what Nina and the Medicare for All movement are all about.”

“They would not be spending this kind of money if the other side wasn’t losing — we can win, and our win will have a ripple effect for other candidates across the country,” Nina said.

This is a new day and a new district — which includes all of Cleveland, where Nina won by 10 points, and neighborhoods like Lakewood that went for Bernie twice! We can bring this home if we put in the work. Let’s go!

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1023&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz

Nina isn’t taking a DIME from special interests or corrupt SuperPACs, which means she’s counting on us to power this final push and get out the vote.

So far, 150 Our Revolution volunteers have made 60k phone calls and sent 40k texts and 330k emails connecting with voters for Nina.

Help us reach even more folks up through the end of voting Tuesday night! With low voter turnout, the calls you make to get progressives to the polls could get Nina over the finish line.

VOLUNTEER FOR NINA (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4901?t=1024&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz)

★ ★ ★

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1025&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz

As one of our movement’s fiercest champions for Medicare for All, Our Revolution is honored to endorse Amy Vilela for Congress in Nevada’s 1st District.

Amy served as Nevada Co-Chair for Bernie Sanders’ 2020 campaign, and now she’s taking on a corporate-backed Democratic incumbent for this pivotal Vegas seat.

“I am running to represent the working class,” Amy told us on our National Organizing Call on Monday. “This is the right race at the right time, and stakeholders on the frontlines want a seat at the table.”

Amy’s politics and progressive values are deeply rooted in her lived experience. Raised in poverty, experiencing homelessness, and becoming a first-generation college graduate — she knows the struggle firsthand. Amy and her husband thought they were beating the odds to build their American Dream when tragedy struck in 2015.

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1026&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz

“The last thing I told Shalynne, as I held her dying body in my arms, was that she will not have died in vain.” Amy said she fully intends to make good on that promise — or die trying.

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1027&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz

Our Revolution and Our Revolution-NY Progressive Action Network are backing Brittany Ramos DeBarros for Congress in NY-11!

Brittany is an Afro-Latina Staten Islander, community organizer, former Army captain, and anti-war activist running a bold campaign to empower working people in her community.

“I feel for our people in my bones, and nothing could stop me from standing up boldly about the truth of that suffering and a vision of a future we know is entirely possible,” Brittany said on our National Organizing Call (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5453?t=1030&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz) on Monday.

The Amazon Labor Union drives are right in her district, and Brittany said she’s proud to help them organize. “These workers have the kind of grit it’s going to take to have a powerful, organized working class for a real revolution of values in this country.”

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1031&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz

Brittany grew up in a conservative, military family, believing the American ‘bootstraps’ story — though they struggled and she went to college on an Army scholarship.

“Once I deployed to Afghanistan as a platoon leader responsible for 40 lives, I saw corporations were running the show,” she said. “Nobody should have to carry a gun - potentially killing and dying - just to afford an education.”

Medicare for All and a Green New Deal are two of her top priorities. “I'm fighting alongside my community for dignity, for housing justice, economic justice, racial justice, and criminal justice reform,” Brittany said.

In the primary, she’s up against conservative former Democratic Rep. Max Rose, who lost the seat in 2020 to GOP Nicole Malliotakis. The incumbent supported the Jan. 6th rioters and calls herself the “right-wing answer to The Squad.”

If you’re in NY-11, you can apply for your absentee ballot now to vote in the June 28th Democratic Primary. Click here to get started (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5434?t=1032&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz) !

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1033&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz

“This race is a huge opportunity,” Brittany said Monday. “We have the people-power on our side. If we put in that groundwork, we will win this and we will make history.”

We hope you’ll help Our Revolution ramp up our ground game to give candidates like Brittany a decisive edge. Your calls will make a huge impact in this district!

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1035&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz

Our Revolution is thrilled to endorse Summer Lee for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 12th District!

Summer worked as a labor organizer with the Fight for $15, organizing to protect worker rights, and went on to lead voter mobilization efforts to strengthen our democracy.

In 2018, she made history as the first Black woman from Western PA ever elected to the state legislature. Throughout her time in office, State Rep. Lee has been a voice for working families and an ally of Our Revolution.

“Organizing is the center of my work. It’s where I come from and it’s integral to how I serve in office,” Summer said on our National Organizing Call (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5453?t=1036&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz) on Monday.

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1037&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz

“As legislators, we have platforms and some resources, but when we use them to organize people on the outside — that’s a powerful movement right there,” she said.

In Congress, she’ll be a champion for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, voting rights, and taking on corporate power to restore the voice of the people in our democracy.

“The number one support for lazy incumbency is low voter turnout and voter suppression. If they can keep working people home, they can stay in their seats serving corporate America forever,” Summer said.

“We’re expanding the electorate, connecting people to their own power, and we’re changing the political landscape.”

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1038&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz

Rep. Lee has been endorsed by Bernie Sanders and Our Revolution Pennsylvania. Help us elect progressive allies like Summer to make democracy work for all of us.

This weekend, Our Revolution joined Bernie and AOC as they hit the road to rally with workers fighting to unionize against some of the most powerful corporate forces on Earth.

On Sunday afternoon, Bernie addressed (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5454?t=1044&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz) Amazon Labor Union ahead of their 2nd union election at the LDJ5 facility in Staten Island. By evening, he was speaking to a crowd at a concert (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5455?t=1045&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz) for Starbucks Workers United in Richmond, Va.

On Tuesday, Bernie was live on the Senate floor (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5456?t=1046&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz) calling out Amazon’s “illegal anti-union tactics” and calling on President Biden to issue an executive order prohibiting any company that engages in union-busting from getting federal government contracts, Reuters (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5457?t=1047&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz) reports.

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1048&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz

“Amazon is the poster child for why this anti-union busting Executive Order is needed,” Bernie said. “President Biden, you promised to prevent union-busters like Amazon from receiving lucrative contracts from the federal government. Keep that promise.”

Rumors of Bernie 2024 are circulating, but the truth is — Our Revolution and the progressive movement are doing the work today to build the worker power we need to forge a better future.

It takes labor power, organizers like us, and elected allies all lifting together to advance our progressive mission forward. Bernie lit the match and he’s still out here with us. Today, workers around the world celebrate May Day — the International Workers’ Day established by labor activists in 1889 to commemorate the Haymarket Massacre in Chicago and the struggle for an eight-hour working day.

Witnesses testified that none of the eight workers charged threw the bomb in Haymarket Square. Labor leader August Spies said: “I knew from the experience of the past that this butchering of people was done for the express purpose of defeating the eight-hour movement.”

Spies showed solidarity with his comrades through the trial, appeals, and at the gallows. Today, we mark the sacrifice and perseverance of workers striving for justice.

LARRY COHEN ON THE LABOR FIGHT

Our Revolution Board Chair Larry Cohen, a lifelong labor leader, joined our National Organizing Call (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5453?t=1053&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz) on Monday to dig into the rise of worker organizing.

“This is an exciting time — not only at Amazon and Starbucks, but there’s all kinds of organizing at workplaces across the country. The first Apple retail store joined my union CWA,” Larry said. “This is organizing from the bottom up, and that’s what we believe in here at Our Revolution.”

Why now? Larry told Aaron White of Open Democracy (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5458?t=1054&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz) that “fueled by inflation, the pandemic and a shortage of people to do these jobs, working-class people are much more confident and not willing to just take whatever is thrown at them.”

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1055&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz

RO KHANNA TALKS POLICY FIGHTS

Also on our latest National Organizing Call (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5453?t=1056&akid=2886%2E5885482%2EhxJXsz) , Our Revolution Board Chair Larry Cohen asked US Rep. Ro Khanna about legislation to end taxpayer subsidies to the fossil fuel industry.

“Greta Thunberg testified and said it would be a gut punch for Democrats to have both chambers and the presidency and not repeal fossil fuel subsidies,” Ro told him. “And, she’s right. This is something we can and must do.”

To Larry’s inquiry into Biden’s Billionaires Tax, Ro said: “There are a lot more working class and middle-class folks than billionaires, and they rightly resent the fact that they’re not paying their fair share. Instead, they take loans against their values and never realize the capital gains.”

Ro also spoke on the need for Democrats to deliver to strengthen democracy. “Folks don’t believe the promises anymore,” he said. “They watch presidents and congresses come and go, and their lives are worse — decades of off-shoring jobs, towns shrinking, kids moving away. We need a systemic policy for economic revitalization in this country.”

Larry agreed, saying: “Ro helps us build Our Revolution and build this outside political pressure we need. Now, it’s time to get more allies for the Ro Khannas in Congress.”

FIGHTING FOR HEALTHCARE IN NY

On Tuesday, Our Revolution joined Campaign for NY Health and other groups in Albany for a Day of Action calling on the state to pass the NY Health Act to provide universal healthcare to every New Yorker and end medical debt.

Organizers, activists, labor leaders, and legislators all came together to march, rally, and speak in one voice to demand New York electeds prioritize healthcare justice before they go on recess on June 2 to campaign for re-election.

Our Revolution NY Organizing Coordinator Jennyfer Almanzar spoke to attendees at the rally: “Every New Yorker — and every person in America — deserves full healthcare and to be free from the burden of medical costs. Our lives are on the line.”
